subject: Shocking Mail In Ballot Blunder Confirms Benda's Election Integrity Position
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | May 20, 2022
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
---
For more information contact:
Lukas Severson 507-508-3148
---
|
## SHOCKING MAIL IN BALLOT BLUNDER CONFIRMS BENDA'S ELECTION INTEGRITY POSITION
---
| Albert Lea, Minnesota – Matt Benda, Republican candidate for Congress in Minnesota’s First Congressional District Special Primary Election, today discovered an [unpublicized mail in ballot blunder](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=763f2f5192&e=58a207e9d5) that has the potential to disenfranchise as many as 200 Freeborn County voters. The mistake has been attributed by Freeborn County Auditor-Treasurer Pat Martinson to an unnamed “mail ballot outsourcing company” and was discovered by Benda late Friday afternoon, just four days before the May 24 election.

“Because of my work on election integrity, a supporter from Carlston Township contacted me with news that his Township Supervisor had called to inform him that due to a delay in delivery of mail in ballots, he should travel to the county courthouse to vote in person. As a candidate in Tuesday’s election, I was not made aware of this mistake until I personally called the county Auditor-Treasurer, who admitted that township officials were attempting to contact voters in Carlston Township to inform them of the mistake,” said Benda.

“While I commend township officials for their efforts, how many Carlston Township voters will not be contacted for various reasons? How many votes will not be cast? How many people will lose the right to vote in this critical election? This mail in ballot blunder confirms my position that we must make election integrity a top issue as there are too many vulnerabilities in our current system. Furthermore, mail in balloting and drop boxes should be prohibited,” stated Benda.

Carlston Township, in west central Freeborn County, has a population of 287 according to the 2020 census. In the 2020 election, data from the Minnesota Secretary of State indicates there were 200 registered voters. The township is heavily Republican, with nearly 69 percent of its residents voting for Donald Trump.

“Sadly, I’m not surprised at this news. It raises legitimate and troubling questions about how many other mistakes have been made by this mail ballot outsourcing company, and how many other voters across the First District may be disenfranchised. It is exactly why I have demanded election system transparency through public data requests to multiple county election officials to test their systems for vulnerabilities. I will now add Freeborn County to that list,” stated Benda.

“I urge voters in mail in ballot precincts who have not received ballots to contact our campaign. We will fight to ensure your right to vote is preserved and that your vote is properly counted. As your congressman, I’ll continue my relentless pursuit for election integrity. The future of our democratic republic, indeed, the future of our country, demands it,” Benda concluded. ###
---
| _Matt Benda was born and raised on the family farm in Alpha, Minnesota and he and his family have deep connections to Minnesota’s agricultural community. For 25 years as an attorney, Benda has worked shoulder-to-shoulder with farmers, families and small business owners to help them succeed. Benda graduated from the University of Minnesota with a degree in Agricultural Business Management, and with honors from Drake University Law School. He has long been involved as an advocate for rural Minnesota and his hometown of Albert Lea._
---

body:
She has spread hate and pushed radical politics throughout America. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=65cb6cdb3b85455dba58642ca8b81eb7&_e=_siUMKPodARgD5IcjEWl7qIM0pRNfmPA0de_kr19kpBDsa3UAJuiU1GWjP0_8-omznhy-sdnvmLPpumw3HAMyCci4oXUaGQJZrtoZ_t49vtOFQF09gGq7hotXzX7HcKIpYmr3cDla63t6OsfQN9whYfD1qEry6lUeCBDPrliJaFiHszdsXTq5iGnWXjUdrUR5HICqkYMKGmg7wJ0pD4p6o1qkeGQFqtTauiG9EeoMZOpHHxZvLabKZBUq8_RwJUvPatVerHM8CP8oxSp8LIc2yL3N-zuMCAxDSSPLeadxYHNuOaR9Vvk_MzY4e1Gb8yGgMzbtmvcmGhLrPfFcCer8GdiCJpCH9YvmqBrcHExoS0WCitkG9gPY3bD43SEeiOvaox1Mh6ciZBJuTO6tSYukOtmcGAJAHDO0g4HnHyOkIqUUfJfir87kGEPijkUJxDIfObTxRKImc54X8o0AgWiKw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I'm running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because my community, my state, and our nation needs to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I'm fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you're familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial division to gain power. [**I'm here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=65cb6cdb3b85455dba58642ca8b81eb7&_e=_siUMKPodARgD5IcjEWl7qIM0pRNfmPA0de_kr19kpBDsa3UAJuiU1GWjP0_8-omznhy-sdnvmLPpumw3HAMyCci4oXUaGQJZrtoZ_t49vtOFQF09gGq7hotXzX7HcKIpYmr3cDla63t6OsfQN9whYfD1qEry6lUeCBDPrliJaFiHszdsXTq5iGnWXjUdrUR5HICqkYMKGmg7wJ0pD4p6o1qkeGQFqtTauiG9EeoMZOpHHxZvLabKZBUq8_RwJUvjOCGPoeHvmyhefURN4UevrmmkhRCSNlV-D_bpaqIIBmn5PnmxmwDThGoJhf7qpWOW42MXFBdtYpq7tIi1OxjEmNh2pSW8iT1jGE9XilNFdD9d78KhyT3eB1A-BnfGMLem2KkvHeRJMMi-f--_Paf9GTcY6LAhPRV9TNkFOLIEBiiuKMWWQpuK8qNDZGlCkNBVQ61z3bq9pwgQj8oQ9eV8w%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=65cb6cdb3b85455dba58642ca8b81eb7&_e=_siUMKPodARgD5IcjEWl7qIM0pRNfmPA0de_kr19kpBDsa3UAJuiU1GWjP0_8-omznhy-sdnvmLPpumw3HAMyCci4oXUaGQJZrtoZ_t49vtOFQF09gGq7hotXzX7HcKIpYmr3cDla63t6OsfQN9whYfD1qEry6lUeCBDPrliJaFiHszdsXTq5iGnWXjUdrUR5HICqkYMKGmg7wJ0pD4p6o1qkeGQFqtTauiG9EeoMZOpHHxZvLabKZBUq8_RwJUvzM5SlVHmaEhS5VpPdd0515Kd-XyxihPAJqgtUQ0UY1_fzWKfQGy8isKa4EmkGCL4YyePJ6PkneB4mPsLUSkJTdiI7DBQAuaYYvJF9b-7THevMDztuk8ZOcsY4hbtAt-MUC-RLU1wjdCScYGP4kljIWRE87yfGT9llZ1SHtsFREK4-BI_nNYxKJcgPj55fTmG_4ns5efUZeh0PrK-1SdH7g%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics across this nation. **She pushed my city to defund the police, and now it's a breeding ground for crime with murders alone on pace to make this the most violent year in our history.**

Omar praised Antifa and BLM when they set fire to our communities, while also bashing the very country that welcomed her and her family with open arms. She does this while enjoying more freedoms than in any other nation in this world.

**_ENOUGH IS ENOUGH._** How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? clean_body: She has spread hate and pushed radical politics throughout America. | Fellow American, I'm running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because my community, my state, and our nation needs to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I'm fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you're familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial division to gain power. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics across this nation. She pushed my city to defund the police, and now it's a breeding ground for crime with murders alone on pace to make this the most violent year in our history. Omar praised Antifa and BLM when they set fire to our communities, while also bashing the very country that welcomed her and her family with open arms. She does this while enjoying more freedoms than in any other nation in this world. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation like I do, then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at a time. I need your help to restore what made our nation great to begin with, and it starts with communities like mine. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Watch WINS
body:
Big Court Victory in California!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COURT DECLARES CALIFORNIA’S GENDER QUOTA FOR
CORPORATE BOARDS UNCONSTITUTIONAL
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27377&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj03azAyeXQ4OE9ScyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

In a historic victory for the rule of a law, a California court found
California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional.
The verdict comes after a 28-day trial (_Robin Crest et al. v. Alex
Padilla_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=14906&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LWV0LWFsLXYtcGFkaWxsYS13b21lbi1vbi1ib2FyZHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTI3NTYxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(Case No. 19STCV27561)).

This verdict follows a similar ruling
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27068&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtY291cnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1leHBsYWlucy1oaXN0b3JpYy1ydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
in our favor last month that found California’s diversity mandate
for corporate boards unconstitutional.

We filed the gender quota lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27378&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZGVjbGFyZXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLWdlbmRlci1xdW90YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in Los Angeles County Superior Court in 2019 on behalf of California
taxpayers Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries. The lawsuit
challenged a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which required every
publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least
one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its
board of directors by December 31, 2019.

The law also required corporations to have up to three such persons on
their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board.
We argued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=26424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLW92ZXItZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLW1hbmRhdGUtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that the quota for women on corporate boards violated the Equal
Protection Clause of the California Constitution.

California Superior Court Judge Maureen Duffy-Lewis agreed with us and
“determine[d] that SB 826 violates the Equal Protection Clause of
the California Constitution and is thus enjoined.”

In the court’s 23-page verdict
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27362&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS12ZXJkaWN0LWNhLW1heS0yMDIyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
it specifically found that “S.B. 826’s goal was to achieve general
equity or parity; its goal was not to boost California’s economy,
not to improve opportunities for women in the workplace nor not to
protect California taxpayers, public employees, pensions and
retirees.” Further, the court found that “putting more women on
boards demonstrated that the Legislature’s actual purpose was
gender-balancing, not remedying discrimination...” And, “[t]here
is no Compelling Governmental interest in remedying discrimination in
the board selection process because neither the Legislature nor
Defendant could identify any specific, purposeful, intentional and
unlawful discrimination to be remedied,” Judge Duffy-Lewis wrote.

The court also found that California had “offered the testimony of
the stereotypical virtues of women such as “consensus builders”
and “less risky behavior in investments.... The Court is unpersuaded
by this offer of stereotypes for a justification of S.B. 826.” The
court also found that Judicial Watch attorneys presented persuasive
evidence in “ILLEGALITY OF ACTIVITY” (emphasis original) in the
implementation of the gender quota mandate.

The court eviscerated California’s unconstitutional gender quota
mandate. This is the second California court decision finding that
quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left’s
unprecedented attacks on anti-discrimination law has suffered another
stinging defeat.

Thankfully, California courts have upheld the core American value of
equal protection under the law. Our taxpayer clients are heroes for
standing up for civil rights against the Left’s pernicious efforts
to undo anti-discrimination protections. We have helped protect the
civil rights of every American with these successful lawsuits.

JUDICIAL WATCH CIVIL RIGHTS LAWSUIT AGAINST CHICAGO’S LIGHTFOOT
DISMISSED AFTER MAYOR ENDS HER RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY

We struck a blow against leftist racial discrimination in Chicago.

Our federal civil rights lawsuit on behalf of the Daily Caller News
Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori
Lightfoot was dismissed after Lightfoot said she will not limit
one-on-one interviews to “journalists of color” in the future
(_Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=24999&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No. 1:21-cv-02852)).

In dismissing the case, our attorneys noted:

As testified to by her Communications Director and as stated in her
motion to dismiss, Mayor Lori Lightfoot has no plans or intentions in
the future to exclusively provide one-on-one interviews with
journalists of color.
We filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27359&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGlnaHRmb290X2NvbXBsYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
against Lightfoot
on May 27, 2021, after Catenacci, a white journalist, emailed
Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor.
The mayor’s office never replied to the request or to two additional
follow-up emails from Catenacci. Catenacci’s request came on one of
the days that the mayor admittedly was discriminating against
journalists based on race.

On May 18, 2021, Lightfoot’s office informed multiple reporters that
she would grant one-on-one interviews “only to Black or Brown
Journalists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=24997&F=T&
The next day, the mayor released a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=24998&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21heW9yLWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1qb3VybmFsaXN0cy0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
confirming her discriminatory policy. Our lawsuit alleged that
Lightfoot’s refusal to be interviewed by Catenacci was a violation
of the Daily Caller News Foundation’s and his First Amendment rights
and Catenacci’s right to equal protection.

On July 26, 2021, after the lawsuit was filed, Mayor Lightfoot told
_The New York Times_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=25446&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8wNy8yNi9vcGluaW9uL3N3YXkta2FyYS1maXNoZXItbG9yaS1saWdodGZvb3QuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
that she would “absolutely” engage in racial discrimination again.
When pressed on the issue by our attorneys, her spokesperson testified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1kZXBvc2l0aW9uLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtbWFyY2gtMy0yMDIyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
under oath in this lawsuit that Lightfoot promised not to engage in
any more of this type of racial discrimination:

Q Okay. Have you spoken to the Mayor about whether she intends to
exclusively provide one-on-one interviews with journalists of color in
the future?

A Yes.

Q Okay. What did the Mayor tell you about that?

A She does not have plans to do so.

Q Does she intend to do so?

A No.
Mayor Lightfoot’s attorneys also told
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27360&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1tb3Rpb24tdG8tZGlzbWlzcy0wMjg1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
the Court the same thing in their most recent filing.

“I’m glad that Mayor Lightfoot finally realized that her racist
policy was untenable. I hope all elected officials take note of our
case and think twice before issuing similar policies,” Thomas
Catenacci said.

“It’s amazing and sad that we had to do this in America 2022. A
government official discriminating based on race is as wrong as it
gets. We are relieved that she finally relented,” Daily Caller News
Foundation President Neil Patel said.

It is incredible, in this day and age, that it took a federal civil
rights lawsuit to force Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot to retreat from
her racial discrimination against reporters.

CENSUS BUREAU KEEPS HIRING ‘UNSUITABLE INDIVIDUALS’ WITH CRIMINAL
RECORDS

The federal government apparently has no interest in protecting you
from felons it hires to conduct the census. Our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27369&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc3VzLWJ1cmVhdS1oaXJpbmctaW5kaXZpZHVhbHMtd2l0aC1jcmltaW5hbC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
why the American people should be concerned about who is working at
the U.S. Census Bureau:

Thirteen years after a federal investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27380&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2FvLmdvdi9hc3NldHMvZ2FvLTEwLTEzMnQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
blasted the U.S. Census
Bureau for hiring criminals to enter American homes to gather
statistics for the decennial count, a new audit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27381&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2lnLmRvYy5nb3YvT0lHUHVibGljYXRpb25zL09JRy0yMi0wMjEtSShSRURBQ1RFRCkucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
reveals the disturbing practice continues. In fact, more than a decade
after the problem was exposed workers for the 2020 count were not
properly vetted and many with criminal records had direct interactions
with the public. The most recent probe, conducted by the Department of
Commerce Inspector General, found that “dozens of employees who
worked on address canvassing in advance of the 2020 census had major
issues flagged on their investigations, which typically means
employees are automatically disqualified from their federal jobs.”

Chunks of the 28-page report are redacted but the gist is well
conveyed, that the Census Bureau has long failed to screen its
workforce and therefore endangers the public. It’s not like there
isn’t a vetting system in place. When one of the 248 regional
offices recruit a candidate, the Census Investigative Services (CIS)
at the agency’s headquarters in Suitland, Maryland is charged with
conducting a pre-employment suitability review. The process includes
sending fingerprints to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and
a credit history as well as self-disclosed criminal record to CIS for
review. Nevertheless, the Bureau still hires felons—including sex
offenders—at regional offices nationwide. As an example, a few years
ago the Charlotte, North Carolina Area Census Office (ACO) employed a
man convicted of a felony
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27382&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc3VzLWJ1cmVhdS1zdGlsbC1oaXJpbmctZmVsb25zLWNoaWxkLXNleC1vZmZlbmRlcnMtcGFzcy1iYWNrZ3JvdW5kLWNoZWNrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
involving sex with a child as a regional recruiting manager because
despite his criminal record, he passed the Census Bureau’s
background check.

The Bureau’s negligent security practices have been on the radar of
federal lawmakers for years. Over a decade ago, Congressional
investigators slammed the agency for failing to adequately conduct
mandatory background checks for tens of thousands of workers,
resulting in the hiring of hundreds of violent criminals. At the time,
the probe found that more than 35,000 temporary census workers were
employed without the proper criminal background check, which includes
fingerprinting. That means that more than one-fifth of the canvassing
workforce did not get properly processed or fully screened for
employment eligibility, creating an obvious security risk. More than
200 of those were subsequently determined to have criminal records yet
were in constant contact with the public while canvassing for the 2010
census. Investigators said the criminal record checks were bungled
because the Census Bureau’s incompetent staff was poorly trained to
conduct them.

Twelve years ago Judicial Watch reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27383&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc3VzLWhpcmVzLXNleC1vZmZlbmRlci1ob21lLXZpc2l0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that the Census Bureau knowingly hired a registered sex offender with
a long criminal history to make home visits even though such convicts
are banned from working for the agency. The embarrassing gaffe came to
light when a young mother in a New Jersey suburb recognized the census
worker who came to her home from the state’s registered sex offender
database. She initially thought it was safe to provide the man with
information because he was a legitimate government worker with a badge
and bag sporting the U.S. Census Bureau’s official logo. Incredibly,
the sex offender used a fake name to get the census job but failed a
fingerprint check after getting hired. The agency still let him to
complete four days of training and allowed him to visit homes even
though he did not pass the background check.

The latest audit, released last week, shows that virtually nothing has
changed after all these years and that the Bureau has done little to
improve its derelict hiring practices. Investigators found that at
least 6,802 census workers were not properly adjudicated, “resulting
in persons with significant issues working for the Bureau and, in some
instances, contacting households during the 2020 Census NRFU
[Nonresponse Followup] operation.” In cases when CIS adjudicators
actually vetted employees, the watchdog found that they often failed
to request necessary documentation to assess the severity of the
issues raised. Stressing that background checks are a critical process
to help protect the nation’s interests by establishing trust in the
federal workforce, the IG points out the obvious in its recent report:
“The lack of oversight increases the risk of unknowingly allowing
unsuitable individuals into positions of public trust, which could
cause harm to the bureau.”

HISTORIC JUDICIAL WATCH GERRYMANDER WIN COULD SET NATIONAL PRECEDENT

There is more than one way to rig elections, including gerrymandering
– which is state legislatures creating congressional districts that
all but guarantee nakedly partisan results irrespective of voter
wishes. Judicial Watch is on the front line – and winning –
against this abuse of power. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative
reporter, provides an overview
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27384&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGlzdG9yaWMtanctZ2VycnltYW5kZXItd2luLWNvdWxkLXNldC1uYXRpb25hbC1wcmVjZWRlbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
in the _Investigative Bulletin_.

The judge was not pulling any punches. Siding with Judicial Watch in a
challenge to a congressional redistricting plan cooked up by Democrats
dominating the Maryland state legislature, Judge Lynne
Battaglia—herself a Democrat—threw haymakers. The Democrat
redistricting map was an “extreme partisan gerrymander.” Democrats
had attempted to “suppress the voice of Republican voters.” It was
drawn up with “partisanship as predominant intent.” It violated
state constitutional provisions on equal protection and free speech.
It subordinated “constitutional criteria to political
consideration.”

It was out. Making history—for the first time, a Maryland court
ruled that a congressional redistricting plan violated the state
constitution—Judge Battaglia banned the use of the gerrymander map
and ordered the Maryland General Assembly back to the drawing board.

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton hailed the decision. “This key
court victory against abusive partisan gerrymandering by Democrats in
Maryland could set a national precedent,” he said. Maryland Governor
Larry Hogan called it “an historic milestone.” Judicial Watch
filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=26523&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1tZC1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
on behalf
of twelve Maryland voters who objected to the state legislature’s
plan and was joined at trial by a second set of plaintiffs. The
argument? The gerrymandered maps diminished their right to participate
in a free and fair election on an equal basis with other Maryland
voters. The court agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27355&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWFyeWxhbmRtYXR0ZXJzLm9yZy8yMDIyLzAzLzI1L2p1ZGdlLXRocm93cy1vdXQtY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1tYXAtb3JkZXJzLWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLXRvLXRyeS1hZ2Fpbi1uZXh0LXdlZWsvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz].

The March ruling has begun to echo through the national debate. In New
York, in April, the state’s highest court rejected a new
redistricting map favored by Democrats dominating state politics. The
court ruled that the map violated a state prohibition on partisan
gerrymandering, saying it was created with “impermissible partisan
purpose.” Court observers say the Maryland case was discussed in
briefings and oral arguments in New York.

In 2019, the Supreme Court rejected political gerrymandering claims
brought solely under the federal Constitution. Since then, the battle
over redistricting has spread to state courts throughout the country.
According to experts surveyed by Judicial Watch, cases related to
gerrymandering and redistricting are underway in nineteen states.
Among the states are the electoral powerhouses Texas, Florida,
Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Ohio. You can read about some of the
upcoming cases here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27356&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yZWRpc3RyaWN0aW5nLmxscy5lZHUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz].

Tough anti-gerrymandering measures are one way to start cleaning up
dirty election practices, says Robert Popper, Judicial Watch’s
director of voting integrity efforts. Gerrymandering is a “method of
cheating [that] has been around for 200 years,” Popper told
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58952&L=27357&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aW1jYXN0LmNvbS9uZXdzL2V4Y2x1c2l2ZS1tYXJ5bGFuZC1jb3VydC1ydWxlcy1hZ2FpbnN0LWRlbW9jcmF0cy1pbi1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy1jYXNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
journalist Tim Pool. “If you’re a state that doesn’t have an
anti-gerrymandering provision, then suddenly it’s a political issue.
Why don’t you? You want districts that are ugly and screwed up for
partisan advantage, you want to cheat opponents in state elections.”

In Maryland, the state legislature quickly capitulated in the face of
the court ruling and signed on to a new, fairer redistricting map. In
New York, redistricting has been turned over to a special master. But
Popper warns of trouble in states where political gerrymandering
survives, with partisan operatives possibly turning to “new,
computer-generated maps” that could become “so convoluted that’s
it’s effectively like you don’t have a district at all.” We’re
not there yet, says Popper. “But if we don’t deal with
gerrymandering, my prediction is, that’s coming.”
Until next week...

clean_body: Big Court Victory in California! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COURT DECLARES CALIFORNIA’S GENDER QUOTA FOR CORPORATE BOARDS UNCONSTITUTIONAL [==] In a historic victory for the rule of a law, a California court found California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional. The verdict comes after a 28-day trial (Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla [==] (Case No. 19STCV27561)). This verdict follows a similar ruling [] in our favor last month that found California’s diversity mandate for corporate boards unconstitutional. We filed the gender quota lawsuit [=] in Los Angeles County Superior Court in 2019 on behalf of California taxpayers Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries. The lawsuit challenged a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which required every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law also required corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board. We argued [] that the quota for women on corporate boards violated the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution. California Superior Court Judge Maureen Duffy-Lewis agreed with us and “determine[d] that SB 826 violates the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution and is thus enjoined.” In the court’s 23-page verdict [==], it specifically found that “S.B. 826’s goal was to achieve general equity or parity; its goal was not to boost California’s economy, not to improve opportunities for women in the workplace nor not to protect California taxpayers, public employees, pensions and retirees.” Further, the court found that “putting more women on boards demonstrated that the Legislature’s actual purpose was gender-balancing, not remedying discrimination...” And, “[t]here is no Compelling Governmental interest in remedying discrimination in the board selection process because neither the Legislature nor Defendant could identify any specific, purposeful, intentional and unlawful discrimination to be remedied,” Judge Duffy-Lewis wrote. The court also found that California had “offered the testimony of the stereotypical virtues of women such as “consensus builders” and “less risky behavior in investments.... The Court is unpersuaded by this offer of stereotypes for a justification of S.B. 826.” The court also found that Judicial Watch attorneys presented persuasive evidence in “ILLEGALITY OF ACTIVITY” (emphasis original) in the implementation of the gender quota mandate. The court eviscerated California’s unconstitutional gender quota mandate. This is the second California court decision finding that quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left’s unprecedented attacks on anti-discrimination law has suffered another stinging defeat. Thankfully, California courts have upheld the core American value of equal protection under the law. Our taxpayer clients are heroes for standing up for civil rights against the Left’s pernicious efforts to undo anti-discrimination protections. We have helped protect the civil rights of every American with these successful lawsuits. JUDICIAL WATCH CIVIL RIGHTS LAWSUIT AGAINST CHICAGO’S LIGHTFOOT DISMISSED AFTER MAYOR ENDS HER RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY We struck a blow against leftist racial discrimination in Chicago. Our federal civil rights lawsuit on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot was dismissed after Lightfoot said she will not limit one-on-one interviews to “journalists of color” in the future (Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot [] (No. 1:21-cv-02852)). In dismissing the case, our attorneys noted: As testified to by her Communications Director and as stated in her motion to dismiss, Mayor Lori Lightfoot has no plans or intentions in the future to exclusively provide one-on-one interviews with journalists of color. We filed the lawsuit [=] against Lightfoot on May 27, 2021, after Catenacci, a white journalist, emailed Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The mayor’s office never replied to the request or to two additional follow-up emails from Catenacci. Catenacci’s request came on one of the days that the mayor admittedly was discriminating against journalists based on race. On May 18, 2021, Lightfoot’s office informed multiple reporters that she would grant one-on-one interviews “only to Black or Brown Journalists [= The next day, the mayor released a letter [==] confirming her discriminatory policy. Our lawsuit alleged that Lightfoot’s refusal to be interviewed by Catenacci was a violation of the Daily Caller News Foundation’s and his First Amendment rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection. On July 26, 2021, after the lawsuit was filed, Mayor Lightfoot told The New York Times [==] that she would “absolutely” engage in racial discrimination again. When pressed on the issue by our attorneys, her spokesperson testified [==] under oath in this lawsuit that Lightfoot promised not to engage in any more of this type of racial discrimination: Q Okay. Have you spoken to the Mayor about whether she intends to exclusively provide one-on-one interviews with journalists of color in the future? A Yes. Q Okay. What did the Mayor tell you about that? A She does not have plans to do so. Q Does she intend to do so? A No. Mayor Lightfoot’s attorneys also told [=] the Court the same thing in their most recent filing. “I’m glad that Mayor Lightfoot finally realized that her racist policy was untenable. I hope all elected officials take note of our case and think twice before issuing similar policies,” Thomas Catenacci said. “It’s amazing and sad that we had to do this in America 2022. A government official discriminating based on race is as wrong as it gets. We are relieved that she finally relented,” Daily Caller News Foundation President Neil Patel said. It is incredible, in this day and age, that it took a federal civil rights lawsuit to force Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot to retreat from her racial discrimination against reporters. Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton hailed the decision. “This key court victory against abusive partisan gerrymandering by Democrats in Maryland could set a national precedent,” he said. Maryland Governor Larry Hogan called it “an historic milestone.” Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit [=] on behalf of twelve Maryland voters who objected to the state legislature’s plan and was joined at trial by a second set of plaintiffs. The argument? The gerrymandered maps diminished their right to participate in a free and fair election on an equal basis with other Maryland voters. The court agreed []. The March ruling has begun to echo through the national debate. In New York, in April, the state’s highest court rejected a new redistricting map favored by Democrats dominating state politics. The court ruled that the map violated a state prohibition on partisan gerrymandering, saying it was created with “impermissible partisan purpose.” Court observers say the Maryland case was discussed in briefings and oral arguments in New York. In 2019, the Supreme Court rejected political gerrymandering claims brought solely under the federal Constitution. Since then, the battle over redistricting has spread to state courts throughout the country. According to experts surveyed by Judicial Watch, cases related to gerrymandering and redistricting are underway in nineteen states. Among the states are the electoral powerhouses Texas, Florida, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Ohio. You can read about some of the upcoming cases here []. Tough anti-gerrymandering measures are one way to start cleaning up dirty election practices, says Robert Popper, Judicial Watch’s director of voting integrity efforts. Gerrymandering is a “method of cheating [that] has been around for 200 years,” Popper told [==] journalist Tim Pool. “If you’re a state that doesn’t have an anti-gerrymandering provision, then suddenly it’s a political issue. Why don’t you? You want districts that are ugly and screwed up for partisan advantage, you want to cheat opponents in state elections.” In Maryland, the state legislature quickly capitulated in the face of the court ruling and signed on to a new, fairer redistricting map. In New York, redistricting has been turned over to a special master. But Popper warns of trouble in states where political gerrymandering survives, with partisan operatives possibly turning to “new, computer-generated maps” that could become “so convoluted that’s it’s effectively like you don’t have a district at all.” We’re not there yet, says Popper. “But if we don’t deal with gerrymandering, my prediction is, that’s coming.” Until next week... [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Mo Brooks
subject: We need another Ted Cruz in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
| | | **THIS IS OUR DECIDING MOMENT.** _**_Who will represent Alabama?_**_**__****_A proven conservative_**** _ -- _****_or just another “Republican”?_** Fellow patriot, _This is it -- the final hours of our primary race._ Every poll says this primary will come down to these final few days. **Our latest polls show upwards of****15% of voters UNDECIDED****in our critical Senate primary.****These critical voters will make the last-minute choices that will decide our race.** _**We need to reach these voters -- and we need to reach them NOW.**_ I know that we can persuade them if we make sure they know that **I’m the only conservative fighter in this race.** But it’s hard to get that message out when you’re fighting against $12 million of attack ads funded by special interest groups and beltway insiders. The Swamp is emptying their pockets in this primary, desperate to stop me from making it to the Senate because they know I’m a true conservative who cannot be bought. And guess what? Even with all of their big-spending, _**_they still haven’t been able to knock me down._**_
But to reach this critical segment of undecided voters in the final hours of our primary, I need help. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you.**
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61333%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cFQwOI69B4NcX49FvA5Zfg&sysid=1)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks - I represent Alabama’s 5th Congressional District in the U.S. House. But I’m running for the Senate because I’m tired of seeing radical, destructive policies under Chuck Schumer’s feckless leadership.**
---
I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles - and the accolades to back it up:
* _A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List_
* _100% rating from the National Right to Life_
* A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry
* Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene
* Dr. Kelli Ward
* Mark Levin

---
[**JOIN THEM SUPPORT MO BROOKS**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61334%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SgBPVzjQzHpha9rrHVi4UQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow patriot, in the Senate, we need proven conservative leaders that aren’t afraid to shut down the Left and their disastrous policies. **I have no problem standing up for our values -- and I have the record to prove it.** This is a critical moment for Alabama and for conservatives. Do we want a Senate full of conservative fighters? Or do we want to let a bunch of special interest money buy Alabama’s Senate seat? **
**[**It’s up to you to decide, fellow patriot. Will you join me?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61345%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y8YoZeThfyR9mvjFXlinpQ&sysid=1)

---
[**DONATE $75**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61347%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6stLgOqQvv89Ga%2fYaGYjw&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61348%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6UC4rYjQ1nHyJUKaS0FgrA&sysid=1)

Thank you,

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2if9cskctrnrl570heiucla1da2cgreu3bjcteg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5nmgrj4t3imeqr6djledqjbdr26lqn9cr1moqe8pthmkrb3dj6cdo7codk65jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p36phgm2pmadtim9j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bsto3q9guseu5s4b19v8r3jfiav8t69kfbqpj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfa45120u99rm941gseaoois0j9hvicbqvvb5kd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvmc3d8cmiu19naaia4p7ch8qecl0mvc89i88t8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Will you please open this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
(1) Incoming message from President Trump's endorsed candidate for Congress
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd0b6qitcime6ihra99n2igcr287mi0abk82etoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb6e5jm1pr1m4pm1cb7mlq70s746hi31dpjc4on8s3mclo7bcj1ceq72sbimcrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljc3jr5dr66jib6phnm2qmash5u)

(1) Incoming message from President Trump's endorsed candidate for Congress

__************[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3kfb3d0ekth1sh13vbn95e1bp1a8qk4hscq3bsg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) Friend, this is Former Alaska Governor and Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for Congress, **Sarah Palin**. _**I was one of the FIRST Republicans to officially endorse President Trump in his 2016 race. **_ Mainstream "Conservatives" LAUGHED at me for this. They said he would never win and that Trump would be the WORST President in history. Now, it's not just the Never-Trump Republicans who are coming after me. _**Every outlet in the Fake News is writing a hit piece on me to destroy every hope I have of winning my race.**_ But I'm an Alaskan, I've seen bears and moose that are scarier than most of my opponents, and I would never give up on making America great again. **I know for a fact that if I quit, Democrats will destroy this country with their evil America Last policies.****I won 't let that happen.** But I can't do it alone. I need Trump's top allies on my side in order to win. **That 's why I'm working with President Trump's NUMBER ONE ally in Congress, Rep. Ronny Jackson** - he was Trump's White House physician and now he represents the most MAGA strong district in the nation, & he's a battle tested warrior who retired from the Navy as a Rear Admiral. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuj7h5sg6qaar43calkt5mf3js6bln19rcqqfus8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) But even with our proven track record of supporting President Trump and the America First agenda, _**we 're getting demolished by Nancy Pelosi's billionaire buddies who want nothing more than to lock up President Trump and throw away the key.**_ It's why I'm coming to you first, Friend. Ronny and I have seen that you've supported Trump and the MAGA movement with everything you have. So we're coming to you one more time, in desperation to humbly ask for your endorsement & your full support. [**Will you support America First Patriots, Sarah Palin & Ronny Jackson for Congress?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze03q7cjs59b5gblsrmlk633oo8ve035p4dkgk1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) ****************************[**YES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlkc67s3ls9b5g6cn7vmfjfb67tq3gl0drete7vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) ******************** ****************************[**NO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z020b0fnvl16j56efji2g01gmcfcn8kih37mn74o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) ******************** Please, Friend, without your simple endorsement, we have no way of getting Trump back in the White House. _**So, we 're pleading: before we're forced to call it quits, will you pledge your support?**_ [**Endorse Sarah Palin & Ronny Jackson for Congress**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn58rhun6s7ocf87outbbd6vbs2mo8qnkec710vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) America will be destroyed without a leader like Trump back in office. That's why we're running for office - **to kick the America Last Democrats out of DC and to restore Trump 's America!** But we won't last another day without your support. Pelosi is closing in on us. If you withhold your support, Pelosi will steal our seats and steal back the majority. If that happens, the entire country will go down in flames. It's now or never, Friend. Please don't let us down. ************************[**ENDORSE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfethp8njaphktnpeqfer4ij6r1lu3vm5b0v2rvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj4cph2bs) **************** We hope to see your name at the top of our supporter list, _Sarah Palin
Ronny Jackson_****
**** ****

**** **** **** ******** ******** **************** **************** ******** ************************ ************_****_********************

**** **** ******** ********

**** ******** ******** ******** | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: re: Why I fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
When people ask me why I want to serve in Congress, here’s what I tell them: serving my country is all I’ve ever really want
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbheh561ga1eiqfjq3iaq0ohdlbdijhb9nl4gsd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongs9pmeob5m4rmecr6ehirbd31csom6dj569qm1orkcjgjec9lmorjdddmctg61puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdimdgefclncoqe1cr2cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqnovubbcjfp42k3usmaji03v2g6sp4o5phoop4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend,

When people ask me why I want to serve in Congress, here’s what I tell them: **s _erving my country is all I’ve ever really wanted to do._** It runs in my family, and I love this country with every fiber of my being.

What we have here is the envy of every other nation in the world: freedom to speak our minds, freedom to choose what is best for ourselves and freedom to live our American Dreams. I want my kids to grow up knowing this life - not the life of subjugation found in Communist China.

That’s why, no matter the inhibitor to our independence, I will fight for these freedoms with the tenacity I did in war. Our country deserves no less from its representatives in Congress.

But this year, if I want to keep up that fight, I need the votes of thousands of folks who have never even seen my name on a ballot before. You see, I’m running in a newly-drawn district that is currently represented by a far-left Democrat. Flipping this seat is critical to taking back the House from Pelosi and her minions.

**[_So please, will you help me get the above message sent out to these new voters?_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvajpp6rpj863l6ida2e7igk0et7jpqjooo8h7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)****We’re trying to contact them before Pelosi’s team floods their inboxes full of far-left propaganda, and we need to raise another $2,100 to fund the effort.**
---
| [PLEASE, HELP ME TELL THEM WHY I FIGHT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6e2fiq31k5gp9linuimnv7bv9lrq0l3gd1fkqfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "PLEASE, HELP ME TELL THEM WHY I FIGHT")
---
| [RUSH IN A $20.22 DONATION TO GET THE WORD OUT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztgos2dq0qj0plq71as18pvjai4493i8n7pbosp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "RUSH IN A $20.22 DONATION TO GET THE WORD OUT")
---
| [HELP WITH EVEN MORE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4hb8vigq6pvl5uno28vj1j564k8e7gmvmb0c7jo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "HELP WITH EVEN MORE")
---
| **Let’s remember:__the freedoms we have in America won’t endure unless we fight for them.__**

_Just look at Afghanistan. It’s been less than a year since the Taliban took over thanks to Joe Biden’s abject failure. Already the Taliban is implementing their totalitarian decrees!_

Having lost both of my legs in the fight over there when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me, I’m sure as hell not going to let the same thing happen here. I’m going to keep up my service for America by winning in this new district, fighting Democrat tyranny in the halls of Congress and making sure this remains the greatest nation on the planet.

[_Please, will you help? >>_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6l08g9eq2esovn6pqll4moca1kkv0hlc0rj7tmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs)
---

---

---
| [RUSH IN $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeppofi6e32pe780gj09ime27spgrbd47n80r19o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "RUSH IN $50")
---
| [RUSH IN $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaefo2a6p9ddo3tiv4s07ih3hi2m8j33meehska8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "RUSH IN $100")
---
| [RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zms7e7qsclqqb6h3p9ue9kborps80007aolm5010_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c5h2bs "RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT")

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhf7re7g1v2lh6u4nnob4bq5e0bb6v3ov5fiupug_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfctjic1on8srle9j6acr6cmq7asticoqrcddic5q3at1meji6fdr7c6qm1pb4eurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmcc5gmdijfclicoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze43tuvs226rvma1aenok103iqtosbm8p257pfkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdu5htujm2rm0jock9qbt2p2mqedqm5hc6pl6cq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9puav88f0jfas8u1to811ncf8hd83tarrtu1qgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chh6eoj2c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: Open this email to accept Trump’s friend request
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Cindy Hyde-Smith for US Senate

### _Monday, May 16, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Show, I am joined by a good friend of the podcast Jason Pye of the Due Process Institute. We discuss the gridlock on Capital hill and what we could get done in the area of Criminal Justice if we look for real solutions and not gridlock. We also take a look at what is real criminal justice reform and what is simply bad policy. This episode we name names and give you the inside truth. **I need your help.**

I just stepped out of a meeting with our lawyer and we are about to be hit with [**HUGE legal fees**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60431623:JxY5sfoNw:m:1:3317145305:7E61E47D19DE6F4B60E3E21B1B54BE9E:r) related to the recount efforts. | [ **RUSH A DONATION** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60431623:JxY5sfoNw:m:1:3317145305:7E61E47D19DE6F4B60E3E21B1B54BE9E:r)

name: Young Kim (R-CA)
subject: Patriot, we have a major problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
We have a major problem. This report just landed on my desk and it broke my heart:

Patriot, we have a major problem. [**This report just landed on my desk and it broke my heart:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432050:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
**ON JANUARY 20:** My radical left opponent launched his campaign
**AS OF JANUARY 31:** He raised an eye-popping $435,000 plus
**THIS MORNING:** New intel shows he is the **TOP FUNDRAISING DEMOCRAT CHALLENGER** and has raised over **$1,000,000** in just **ONE MONTH**
The real tragedy... he's averaging nearly $2,000 plus on every donation. That means liberal mega-donors and Hollywood elites are shelling out cash to **FLIP** my seat **BLUE****!**
I don't have the luxury of mega-donor dollars to help me... _I am relying on a grassroots surge of Conservative patriots to help me keep this seat**RED.**_
[**So, it 's with a humble heart... I request just $50 or $100 today to help me win this seat to continue fighting for YOU in the People's house. Can I count on you?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432050:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
[**COUNT ME IN FOR $50 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432051:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
---
[**COUNT ME IN FOR $100 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432052:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
---
[**COUNT ME IN FOR $250 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432053:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
---
I promise you, this isn't just about a few seats in Congress. This is about national Democrats and radicals scheming to take complete control of our country.
I'm determined to **NEVER** let that happen... even if I am the last Republican standing in deep-blue California! [**Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432050:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
Thank you,
Young Kim (R-CA)
* * *
We'll get straight to the point, Patriot:
We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.
_YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations._
[_**So, we 're humbly asking for $30, $50, $100, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432054:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432054:JoakTfoN0:m:1:3299561967:9CF52FE65E3E209F4FB3A7C76EF31DEE:r)
---
Also, don't miss a message from Young! To receive texts from Young Kim and our team,**text YOUNG to 67074.**
Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
---

3532 E. Chapman Ave.
Orange 92869

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcrscl4f65bka5bfgl2pv387rojm8lakd0n4p4po_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr6s3lm5r36clnm5ined5j69pj0tpgearmaob5cpgeecdkm5gb1pb66confdb0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj31cljc5jr4sb661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh8b48qotpme9b03128pl1ee4ofor33jmm6n6t1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph2bs "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsrfe003qi8ttfc3c0ud54cdtpc0ij1ssamsrlb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph2bs)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfl35plccpadga09l2qi031995cea4f6v6stviug_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph2bs "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8i5tsed4g7qpsb3kmvmq8fbmnphfd46g2fsrqd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph2bs "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvv8qd10qn8c68nfgsjupve32in9o0m2h3jcqg8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj64or4cph2bs)

name: American Update
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9016%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Xt9FsQx%2ff4WC5nIwAR%2fbvg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fD6rR0Qw07SP2Wpwxu9X9Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BO3UGnf7XnfLCpD6egfWqQ&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BO3UGnf7XnfLCpD6egfWqQ&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9016%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Xt9FsQx%2ff4WC5nIwAR%2fbvg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9016%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Xt9FsQx%2ff4WC5nIwAR%2fbvg&sysid=1)

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 5/20
body:
1st District events, National Police Week, and joining the campaign
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 5/20/22
Good evening,The march to November continues. We're working hard everyday to spread our message across Ohio's First Congressional District. Read on for our latest update from the Campaign Trail. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Cincy Cinco Festival_ Recently, Congressman Chabot stopped by the Cincy-Cinco Festival. He spoke to several of the attendees and vendors. It was great to see so many people out enjoying the festivities! _National Police Week 2022_ This week is National Police Week. This week is designated to remember, honor, and thank our law enforcement officers. We're thankful everyday for the sacrifice law enforcement officers make to keep us and our communities safe.Unlike Greg Landsman, Congressman Chabot will never support defunding the police and will always stand up for our law enforcement. _Join the Team!_ As the Election begins to heat up, we'll need volunteers to help us carry our campaign's message across Ohio's 1st Congressional District. Volunteering is a great way to help us ensure that we're able to win this race and keep Nancy Pelosi's former staffer out of Congress. This year we'll need help with the following:
1. Knocking doors
2. Making phone calls
3. Letters to the Editor
4. Walking in parades

If you are able to help, please [sign up here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-y/) or reply to this email and let me know! _This Week 's Blog - "An Orwellian Idea"_This week's blog is about the Biden Administration's push to create a Disinformation Governance Board._" Look, we don't need the federal government creating a Ministry of Truth, or Disinformation Governance Board, or whatever you want to call it. We have a First Amendment protecting free speech in this country. We don't need Washington calling balls and strikes for us."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-j/). Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-t/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-u/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyiljdit-l-p) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyiljdit-961825B2-kujkulhluu-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tyiljdit-kujkulhluu-v/)

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: TOMORROW: Interview with Today Show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Earlier this week, I was interviewed by the Today Show about the topic of political messaging. It was such an amazing experience working with the crew, and I am incredibly grateful for my team who helped make this happen.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=nbctoday1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=nbctoday1]
I knew from the start that it was never going to be easy running against an incumbent, and to be honest, it’s not! So I knew getting my story and shared lived experiences out there was essential in winning over voters with minimal name recognition. Since then, I’ve met many second-generation immigrants who grew up going to work with their parents when they could not afford childcare. I’ve connected with people of all backgrounds, from veterans to young college graduates who had similar troubles finding quality, affordable mental health care. Because of this messaging, I’ve been better able to connect with people in Virignia's 8th and across the country.
To have an opportunity on a national platform is exciting, and I wanted to share with you that the segment will air THIS SUNDAY, May 22nd from 8am-9am EST on NBC.
Will you be watching the segment on Sunday? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=nbctoday1]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria

EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1&refcode2=EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1&refcode2=EL25&express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1&refcode2=EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=nbctoday1]
