Hello,
__**FIRST:**__ The Des Moines Register released a poll showing Chuck Grassley’s approval rating is lower than it’s EVER been. Only 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
_**_THEN:_ **_Admiral Mike Franken raised over $1.8 million from 55,000 grassroots donors like you to turn Iowa blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
__**AND NOW:**__ We just started airing a massive new TV ad buy against Chuck Grassley!
The polls show Mike Franken can defeat Chuck Grassley. The pundits say if we do, we’re guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority. But we can’t do it without your help now.
**We need to raise another $100,000 before our fundraising deadline on Monday to keep our new TV ads up and turn Iowa blue, but right now, we’re falling dangerously short. And unless grassroots donors like you give right now, we might have to scale back our buy – or worse, take our ads down – and lose our one chance to defeat Grassley.**

The pundits say if we do, we’re guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority. But we can’t do it without your help now. | Dear Peter,
I want to share with you an endorsement from the former Police Comissioner of New York City during 9/11.
---
|
---
|
---
| Republicans in the 1st Congressional District deserve real, responsible America First leadership, not irresponsible opportunists pretending to be Republicans. Anthony Figliola -- a lifelong resident of the district -- is that America First leader. Unlike his opponent, Figliola is pro-America, pro-family, pro-police, and pro-life. With an impressive career in both the public and private sectors, he knows how to create jobs and make the tough decisions.
Anthony Figliola is the real deal. His opponent is a career politician, and 3x failed political candidate who proposed to defund the police in his own hometown of Amityville. The people of District 1 deserve better. I am honored to endorse Anthony Figliola for New York's 1st Congressional District.
---
| | [Support a True Pro-Police Candidate >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kB6oF50oFeUedwJdZgRJb0XpQAwSMbKMaUUXooNjKtFf19I5o6GdHgcSiopRTvSBT-55gQVIRDsLhk3-WoQp--J0zwfUnm8elRZsb3PnzNErfM0AdYYT2TYS3ZoeWPeV9-03sxbdAbReCEzt4nNuiUVIOJfpvd05muokal5owsVmvSz-iMOeImRdfSW1bnN3RMKHiI7onSo=&c=wQXQVyVl2jSeXvAOFeGozbrb0s0xDcT0dLb5KbCI-kZUbI5A2MAmLw==&ch=JHjAmoOO6HIs4MRnU2aULk4Zo37Hc5ac11JoPR-ptQplUUPyGXxebA==)

| I have a track-record of supporting the police, and I have NEVER led any movement to abolish, downsize or defund the police. Our law enforcement officers and staff are our brothers, sisters, friends, and neighbors.
Our police deserve genuine leadership in Washington, and not just hollow soundbites used to raise money and collect votes.
America must come first! Our police are the tip of the spear in protection of our communities. As your Congressman, I will fight the Marxist anti-police agenda. I will ensure our police have the resources they need to do their jobs safely - all in support of our communities.

Peter,

Hey, it's Sarah Palin.

I haven't reached out in a while, and you know I wouldn't unless it was really important.

By now, you've heard that I'm running to replace the late Don Young and represent the great people of Alaska. Our country desperately needs President Trump's America First values restored, and I am exactly the right person for the job.

**I recently even received President Trump's full support - he formally announced his endorsement of my campaign.**

I could not be more proud or humbled to receive the endorsement of the 45th President of the United States. Together, we will work to put _AMERICA FIRST_ and get the radical Left OUT of power.

YOU are vital to our movement, Peter. _I've been told you're one of our most loyal supporters, and I need to know I can count on you during this time._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Democratic governors are on the front lines of defending reproductive choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is how we keep abortion safe, legal, and accessible: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45573632/346546512/823540626?refcode=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5NzFlZi0wNWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGVxzGMPndLYfIE6svsa_cL0iIgh62OxIudwMpBYUhQ=&emci=e92d7d57-59d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1049176)
Peter, The Supreme Court is likely to strike down _Roe v. Wade_ at any moment. When that happens, for the first time in half a century, the right to reproductive choice will not be guaranteed at the federal level. Now more than ever, Democratic governors are on the front lines in the fight for reproductive freedom, and the Democratic Governors’ Association is leading the charge to elect Democrats from coast to coast in the midterm elections. **[Will you join me in supporting DGA’s work by splitting a donation between our team and theirs today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45573635/346546515/1877277611?refcode=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5NzFlZi0wNWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGVxzGMPndLYfIE6svsa_cL0iIgh62OxIudwMpBYUhQ=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45573640/346546518/1877277611?refcode=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5NzFlZi0wNWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGVxzGMPndLYfIE6svsa_cL0iIgh62OxIudwMpBYUhQ=)
---
**26 states are certain or likely to ban abortion when _Roe_ falls. The burden that will place on women from those states seeking essential reproductive care is unacceptable.**
I’m committed to keeping abortion safe, legal, and accessible in North Carolina — despite what our GOP-controlled legislature might want. And as long as I have veto power, I will use it to block anti-choice Republican bills that would threaten the right to choose.
My Democratic colleagues across the country are joining me in standing up for the right to choose. 36 state gubernatorial seats (including 16 currently held by Democrats) are on the ballot this year, and the more Democratic victories we can secure, the more states where we have the chance to defend the right to abortion access.
**[Electing Democratic governors is how we keep abortion safe, legal, and accessible. Please, split a donation between our team and DGA right now to say you’re with us>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45573649/346546528/1877277611?refcode=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5NzFlZi0wNWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGVxzGMPndLYfIE6svsa_cL0iIgh62OxIudwMpBYUhQ=)**
[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45573652/346546536/1877277611?refcode=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.f12971ef-05d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5NzFlZi0wNWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGVxzGMPndLYfIE6svsa_cL0iIgh62OxIudwMpBYUhQ=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
I cannot win in Florida without you.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45574683/346550046/23351974?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1008-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDFiOWNhNS0wNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OksmnFhihtZKf3M5rCoApeb2tR1M63W1bHm-6zt0g2c=)
Peter, I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as we're coming up short of our next midnight fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn.**
A recent poll shows the numbers are close (I'm just a few points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge _ahead_ , Peter – because if Abby Finkenauer and I flip these seats blue, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to hold Senate control. **We need your help to hit this $10,000 fundraising goal, and missing it simply isn't an option.**
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points _(__10,033 votes_ _)_ , so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $48.8 million last quarter, **missing my goal tonight could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
**[So with polls showing Marco Rubio and me neck and neck, I've got to ask: Will you split $5 or more between Abby Finkenauer's campaign and mine to expand our Democratic majority? Every single grassroots donation is absolutely crucial ahead of tonight's midnight deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45574687/346550077/23351974?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1008-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDFiOWNhNS0wNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OksmnFhihtZKf3M5rCoApeb2tR1M63W1bHm-6zt0g2c=)**

clean_body: I cannot win in Florida without you. | | | = Peter, I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. And right now, as we're coming up short of our next midnight fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. A recent poll shows the numbers are close (I'm just a few points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge ahead , Peter – because if Abby Finkenauer and I flip these seats blue, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to hold Senate control. We need your help to hit this $10,000 fundraising goal, and missing it simply isn't an option. Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (10,033 votes ) , so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $48.8 million last quarter, missing my goal tonight could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win. Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. Your support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through and be split between Abby Finkenauer and Val Demings immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support, Val Demings | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5m7r2cagn8hegpc29p0q1vp5vgl8cgv4l5ngu3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj4o316prjao33mgrb4tdm6soj4odjclpbdcj76qqn5db7cor36p9nmjgj4tr76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6o70eao6ctb0mmq6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clj68pj0s5hm1oh5u)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpr5tkmt60cjd46q1agoisge832oagr7oh4qhduo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj61ob3c3h2bs "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcntnjr796htpqbid7nvpu8i211v5bmsueron70_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj61ob3c3h2bs)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafc1etkffduq964bdego5tu3etolpqfrekivhug_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj61ob3c3h2bs "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqim3gt51ap4b1jh0j4n3a3llm0ou7clnaeaan0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj61ob3c3h2bs "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6e19c77k14gd1nhtmh1hm384fgd9f70epfs0fvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chj61ob3c3h2bs)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45577577/346562831/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY4YzMxZi0wYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt9FhDao9XROqoTo7FS1Udw4rL1l0720sOB_KK8Nlu8=&emci=6c9e6a7d-66d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5d68c31f-0ad9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=26261389)
---

| | We've seen it happening across America: Republican hopefuls falling over each other to stake out the most hateful, hurtful, and consequential positions to win the endorsement of the extremists who have taken over the GOP. Now, we're seeing it right here in New Jersey, as **Andy's Republican challengers race to say the most dangerous, radical things they can before the primary.** [**So let's get right to it: we can't afford**** _any_****of that right now. Please chip in $3 now to elect leaders like Andy, who are focused on finding productive solutions to the**** _real_****challenges we face.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45577578/346562832/-821065315?refcode=2022-05-21-opponents&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d68c31f-0ad9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY4YzMxZi0wYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt9FhDao9XROqoTo7FS1Udw4rL1l0720sOB_KK8Nlu8=) So let's make sure we're clear on who it is we're up against. → One of Andy's opponents tried to make a name for himself by denying science and minimizing the threat of COVID. Just a few weeks ago, he headed to Mar-a-Lago, Florida,**to buddy up to Donald Trump**. → Another is an uber-wealthy heir to his family's luxury yacht fortune (really!), who's been releasing videos parroting **far-right conspiracy theories** about our schools. → And, at a recent debate, the two of them spent more time bickering back and forth than talking about actual policy. . _I wish I was joking._ But this is no laughing matter; these two candidates typify exactly what's wrong with Republican leadership today – how it caters to extremism, hate, and outright conspiracy theories, while ignoring the very real struggles working families face every day. Look we can't control what kind of nonsense Andy's opponents use to try and distract people, but we can make sure everyone in our district knows about Andy's record of service and good government. [**So, please, stand with Andy, and let's keep our focus in Congress on fighting for the people of New Jersey.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45577579/346562833/-821065315?refcode=2022-05-21-opponents&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d68c31f-0ad9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY4YzMxZi0wYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt9FhDao9XROqoTo7FS1Udw4rL1l0720sOB_KK8Nlu8=) clean_body: | | | We've seen it happening across America: Republican hopefuls falling over each other to stake out the most hateful, hurtful, and consequential positions to win the endorsement of the extremists who have taken over the GOP. Now, we're seeing it right here in New Jersey, as Andy's Republican challengers race to say the most dangerous, radical things they can before the primary. = So let's make sure we're clear on who it is we're up against. → One of Andy's opponents tried to make a name for himself by denying science and minimizing the threat of COVID. Just a few weeks ago, he headed to Mar-a-Lago, Florida,to buddy up to Donald Trump. → Another is an uber-wealthy heir to his family's luxury yacht fortune (really!), who's been releasing videos parroting far-right conspiracy theories about our schools. → And, at a recent debate, the two of them spent more time bickering back and forth than talking about actual policy. . I wish I was joking. But this is no laughing matter; these two candidates typify exactly what's wrong with Republican leadership today – how it caters to extremism, hate, and outright conspiracy theories, while ignoring the very real struggles working families face every day. Look we can't control what kind of nonsense Andy's opponents use to try and distract people, but we can make sure everyone in our district knows about Andy's record of service and good government. = Liz G Team Kim Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. | Peter,

We’ve had a lot of curveballs thrown our way, but we haven’t let them distract us from winning this race.

In fact, they’ve motivated me to work even harder and fight for the people of Upstate New York. And now that **new maps have officially been approved,** I’m ready to hit the ground running in the new 19th Congressional District.

We can win this election in November because the power of our grassroots supporters is strong. We’ve come this far due to grassroots contributions from working folks like you, Peter, pitching in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford.

[_**So, Peter, can you help us build momentum in our new district by pitching in $5 now and becoming one of our very first NY-19 donors?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45580163/346574025/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220521-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZlZjk1MS0wZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mfje09AuMAHaUQIoeY0bXmvPDmc5MLmaVxJCCCCOt1w=)

I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for working people, and I know Wall Street doesn’t need another vote in Congress. But, working families do.

That’s why I’m refusing to take contributions from corporate PACs. Instead, our movement is fueled by grassroots supporters like you.

It’s how we’ve consistently been running our campaign as the district lines have changed, and how we’re going to keep running our campaign in the new 19th district.

[_**So, Peter, once again: I’m personally reaching out today to ask. Will you make a contribution of $5, $10, to become one of our first NY-19 donors?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45580170/346574032/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220521-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZlZjk1MS0wZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mfje09AuMAHaUQIoeY0bXmvPDmc5MLmaVxJCCCCOt1w=)

Josh Riley

In fact, they’ve motivated me to work even harder and fight for the people of Upstate New York. And now that new maps have officially been approved, I’m ready to hit the ground running in the new 19th Congressional District. We can win this election in November because the power of our grassroots supporters is strong. We’ve come this far due to grassroots contributions from working folks like you, Peter, pitching in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for working people, and I know Wall Street doesn’t need another vote in Congress. But, working families do. That’s why I’m refusing to take contributions from corporate PACs. Instead, our movement is fueled by grassroots supporters like you. It’s how we’ve consistently been running our campaign as the district lines have changed, and how we’re going to keep running our campaign in the new 19th district. = With gratitude & high hopes, Josh Riley | | Text 'RILEY' to 30343 to stay up to date with the latest campaign news. If you are on your phone, to sign up! * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. Self-serving Ron Johnson has spent his time in Washington blocking meaningful legislation and using his power to enrich himself and his wealthy donor friends. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Republicans are doing everything they can to keep this Senate seat and block Democrats from continuing to make any progress for workers and families across the country. We have to continue keeping up and showing we can win this election. = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . # THE BECKWITH BRIEFING

#### News & Notes
from the Campaign
---
| **VOTE TODAY!**
---
| | **Today is the day we’ve been waiting for – the 10th District GOP Primary!** Today’s the day to **cast your vote** to send me to Congress to fight for a brighter future in VA10 and across our nation!
* **Still not sure where to vote? Click[here](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=d790111412&e=70e89e3dc3)!**
* **Tell your friends and neighbors to vote for me – it’s easy! Forward this email, send a text, or make a phone call!**
* **Help get others to the polls – don’t let transportation or schedule issues keep anyone from voting for me!**

I’m counting on YOU today! Next stop: Congress!
---
|
---
| | Voting Information
---
| **Don’t miss your chance to vote for Dave!**
* **Voting is today, _Saturday, May 21st_**
* There are **only 11 polling places **and they are not the “normal” sites
* Polls are open from **9AM to 4PM only**
* **Congressional Districts have changed!****** You may now be in District 10! Check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=876dacd90b&e=70e89e3dc3) for an interactive district map, list of polling places, and registration info.****
* **Find me on your ballot!** Candidates have been randomly placed on the ballot. Voters will rank the candidates in order of preference. I'll be the 11th name listed - but** I need your #1 vote!**

---
|
---
| | How You Can Help
---
| _Dave Beckwith for Congress needs your support!_
* **Make time to get to your polling place and VOTE FOR ME as your #1 choice!**
* **Urge your friends and neighbors to vote for me TODAY! **
* Help others get to the polls! Don’t let transportation or schedule issues keep anyone from voting for me!

---
|
---
---

| | Peter, **After much anticipation, at midnight last night, a New York State Supreme Court Judge finalized our new congressional maps.** The congressional districts in New York are now locked in. We're glad this lengthy, complicated process has come to a close, so we can get back in the field and focus on meeting with folks in our district face to face. We've built an incredible movement so far, Peter. And from now until August 23, we're going to invite every family in NY-03 to join us. **[Please chip in $3 to make sure we can get our message out to every corner of this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45581791/346579193/-1870678265?refcode=2022-05-21-maps&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f9c9e94e-0fd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWM5ZTk0ZS0wZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TEnDG4Wb7aVEsfN7tIzX5ECjMZuIGVnEidWlAOTZEIg=)** I have to tell you, I'm really happy with the new lines of congressional district 3. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45581792/346579194/-1870678265?refcode=2022-05-21-maps&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f9c9e94e-0fd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWM5ZTk0ZS0wZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TEnDG4Wb7aVEsfN7tIzX5ECjMZuIGVnEidWlAOTZEIg=) **I've already been serving and delivering for this community for a decade as a school board member and a Nassau County legislator.** I'm excited to go to Congress and continue delivering results for New Yorkers: increasing access to quality, affordable health care; lowering taxes; passing common sense gun laws; and reining in out of control inflation. The August 23 primary is right around the corner; we've got a lot of folks to talk to and a lot to talk about. Let's get to work! clean_body: | | | Peter, After much anticipation, at midnight last night, a New York State Supreme Court Judge finalized our new congressional maps. The congressional districts in New York are now locked in. We're glad this lengthy, complicated process has come to a close, so we can get back in the field and focus on meeting with folks in our district face to face. We've built an incredible movement so far, Peter. And from now until August 23, we're going to invite every family in NY-03 to join us. = I have to tell you, I'm really happy with the new lines of congressional district 3. Take a look: = I've already been serving and delivering for this community for a decade as a school board member and a Nassau County legislator. I'm excited to go to Congress and continue delivering results for New Yorkers: increasing access to quality, affordable health care; lowering taxes; passing common sense gun laws; and reining in out of control inflation. The August 23 primary is right around the corner; we've got a lot of folks to talk to and a lot to talk about. Let's get to work! More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. But we have a feeling we will be waiting a long time!_

[If you don't want to see someone too weak to stand up to extremists in his party representing us in Congress – please consider supporting Tom Malinowski now. body:
In Illinois in the 1960s, the infamous Daley “Chicago Machine” was known for taking names from tombstones, filling out voter registration cards with the dead person’s name and then having cronies vote in the name of the deceased as if they were still alive.
| [ ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWl4vQ72d5tWW3TFV-j5VkNsxW1h36Dw4Kl3_qN95jt8t3q8_QV1-WJV7CgQ60VTgdP_6cFZQ_W5052J04yMKd6W81gr3s3RrRTBW4nQxBF6vD1xTW1P851g7cVjB2VBLb_z1S4KyNW3M0gk742gfhKW1gSGQw704g99W8rwWqR2ZXvmBW1Lbt-W7Xz3CWW2vhds84Qq1FhN7_fQG4s_NFsW5_KRky198y_9W1SyLkQ5rs847W3Qxmtj53L06qN3fXhsvFN13gN6Pqy4_p-yc-W3HrV_c7YszV3W2T8MLb3Z96CDW21JG1F82BBp4W1kQNd41BSH7sW8lfFg92v-cD03cv11)

Peter, In Illinois in the 1960s, the infamous Daley “Chicago Machine” was known for taking names from tombstones, filling out voter registration cards with the dead person’s name and then having cronies vote in the name of the deceased as if they were still alive. Today, those who want to rig elections use more sophisticated methods such as ballot harvesting, strategically locating ballot “drop boxes” in areas with high concentrations of Democrat voters, loosening absentee ballot requirements and even going so far in some cities as allowing non-citizens to vote! I was the first candidate to watch and express outrage following the premier of the documentary [2000 Mules](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWl4vQ72d5tWW3TFV-j5VkNsxW1h36Dw4Kl3_qN95jt8N3q905V1-WJV7CgH2YW6S6Ldl3QdQzrW616ffb8tj9_FW6zwX8C8lStBbW6dSjpG5xDvFNV2YDXG2B14TWW70mtFV3j3P5LW1VM0tZ6ps2Q9W6PwR1m7fZYljW408BB62tK0Y6W3p7ml32M6kRTW52sm7_4pZTHSN4sKtjl7ZsczN6xt3BWZ_gTGW6hKCnh50BCmgN2PkMP__1RC5W46qZv32WgMlPW2mbVCr6-jyfqW5h0W-2122brNVMnPS565cSCQW1Xk6PZ8mtsbFW2rdPwj612X3KW722GBT6FnztVW3tmWDx7FplBQW39Njf13rJVfy35491).
---
| [ **It's Time To Make Our Elections Secure!** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWl4vQ72d5tWW3TFV-j5VkNsxW1h36Dw4Kl3_qN95jt933q90pV1-WJV7CgPwKW1hCmdH4k4fvQN74Bk8zbc8QxW1Ymm0f8xlnJxW2fkH3h4k8lnyW8z8slp8Qg6zGN8r79KyS8-5BW3-yZ9V48D0DmVtVRmb4xn6HRW58691-7pR-mtW3YMl232bVwb9N2y-S_qY8ZkHW5FNHlm5CL7bcN5d5TRmBMgDsW6CW5Wn1BygXZW61z7hT8ZPqHpN8kMYNn_jbmJW5hgDNJ6fJ0QTW5RJvBK55knGxN2Z8_19Wd3PNW8PsqDt7jS6C3W2fTm-w8QJhW4N3TVKdkDQGxcW22q4pW3-tndqW6_JlMn6ntnJLW1j6mCZ1dTMHzW7h6ptZ62FRkf38911)

Election integrity was an important issue in the 1960s and it’s an even more important issue today. Of all the candidates in the Republican Special Election Primary on May 24, I am the ONLY candidate who has aggressively investigated and sought out critical election systems information from county governments that administer elections. **_We must work together to remove the shroud of secrecy surrounding our local election systems!_** I’ve put my legal background and skills to work in demanding transparency through an initial set of public data requests to county election officials to test their systems for vulnerabilities. These counties include Olmsted, Fillmore, Blue Earth, Rice and Nobles. As your congressman, I’ll continue my relentless pursuit for election integrity. The future of our democratic republic, indeed, the future of our country, demands it. Please help me in this effort. I need your vote in the Republican Special Primary Election on May 24. You can vote that day at your regular polling place, or vote early at your [local county elections office](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWl4vQ72d5tWW3TFV-j5VkNsxW1h36Dw4Kl3_qN95jt9m3q90JV1-WJV7CgHlMW4_7VYN82r6pvW8NRjqr27cKQ1W8C8h0k66vQhQW50VbHN8dxRwlW1pPNQp2y1GLSV7HY787StrFCW7p1jpC4SrkvqV43mlq4w8hkWW3djqP_5LkrQbW7m8lw37RCF5VVyC2Kb1-D3l7VkzX5c8JrbzGW77YKn24Sy4CmVx1V5n1f7-4RW4Lnkj2954G5MW93PPCC3Bw1ZpW7v6c8d3n_j03W7Phnmj7VNxhwW1vmwct8hFVXXW94v94K8pHqpZW1SFpr05MM_dVW4Y-SwS1Yspk7W79sCPL3Vm8vVW8p8Sn-591rHzN7-frM9-v8DzW51Rs8Y88_R_3W6PdkTJ99rQdBW6d2bjY3BmJSW3kM-1). name: Heidi St. John
subject: Democrats have become the party of violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
Hi Peter,

Democrats have become the party of violence.

While leftists promise to be "ungovernable" and threaten a
"summer of rage" over their insistence on a perceived right to
kill the unborn, they also remain perpetually focused on taking
away the most basic of our rights as American citizens. I'm
talking, of course, about the right to keep and bear arms-and
there that right is being threatened right now.

As I woman, I am grateful for the Second Amendment. This
freedom means I can defend myself or my children if necessary.
Sadly, it is becoming more and more important, as the murder
rates in our cities continue to skyrocket. As usual, Democrats
insist the problem can only be solved by taking guns away from
people like me-law-abiding citizens who have done nothing wrong.

One need to look no further than democrat-controlled cities to
see the pattern of violence. Wherever there is a Democrat
governor, a Democrat mayor, or a Democrat prosecuting attorney
you will find violence. And those who are responsible for the
violence? They are routinely released to return to the streets
and continue their mayhem. Despite their "peace stickers" and
"coexist" stickers on rear windows, Democrats continue to enable
violence among us.

Whether it's the unthinkable violence of abortion, the violence
of gang wars, subway assaults, mass shootings, car jackings,
smash and grab robberies or the soaring number of criminals and
drugs crossing our southern border, Democrats facilitate and
defend violence.

Never has the Second Amendment been more important to normal,
working class men and women.

Those of us who love peace and reject violence must do more. We
must actively work to remove Democrats from office at every level
of leadership-from school boards to the oval office.

Practically, this means supporting Constitutional Conservatives
like myself with your vote, your voice and your financial
donations. We must vote out not only the Democrats, but the RINOs
like my current Congresswoman, who voted for so-called "red flag"
gun laws.

We must never allow Southwest Washington to become another
Portland or Seattle.

Washington State is worth fighting for-and together, we can
restore law and order to our nation and our state. Please help me
get to Congress by donating here.

Sincerely,

Heidi St. John

Candidate for Congress, WA-03

Introducing, Endorsed by We The People!

The Heidi St. John Campaign is built on the promise of
representing those mentioned in Article 1, section 1 of the
constitution "We The People". Let Heidi know that she has your
endorsement and every week we will add your name to the Website
under the "endorsements" tab. Heidi's promise is she will
represent you and not the establishment!

Endorse Heidi here!

News and Media

When Woke Trumps Wisdom: A Cautionary Tale and a
Message of Hope - The Flame News USA

Out and About ...

Heidi St. John officially files for the 2022
Primary election!

Canvassing in Clark County

Speaking with Patriots in Ridgefield, Washington!

Upcoming Events

P.O. Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604

| | Folks, Elaine has taken many oaths to protect and serve this country – over the course of her 20-year career in the Navy and two terms in Congress. Elaine does not take her oaths of office lightly – she’ll never back down when it comes to defending our country. And right now, defending our country means protecting it from the far-right extremists who want to limit our rights and freedoms. [**Will you chip in $25 or more to Elaine’s campaign today to give her the resources to fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584682/346592795/1679455200?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220521_FR_OathofOffice_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-mVXLwTotX3kxZYCMbEWUuCQjfKFlGquneXHV6xndU=) | | | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584684/346592796/1679455200?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220521_FR_OathofOffice_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-mVXLwTotX3kxZYCMbEWUuCQjfKFlGquneXHV6xndU=)

Elaine’s top Republican opponents are right-wing extremists who, if elected, will fight to roll back progress on everything Elaine’s been working toward.
Everything from raising the federal minimum wage to strengthening voting rights and allocating more resources towards our Veterans and Active Armed Forces, that’s why we can’t afford to lose her voice in Congress.

Peter,

_Deb at a demonstration supporting women's right to reproductive freedom_
**Meanwhile, national polling shows two-thirds of Americans _oppose_ the idea of overturning _Roe_.** By and large, people agree that women should have the right to control their own bodies and determine their reproductive futures.

Deb wants to know if you’re among them, Peter. We put together a poll for you, so you can let us know whether you support _Roe v. Wade_ and want to defend reproductive rights.
Should _Roe v. Wade_ remain the law of the land?
****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584728/346592933/790536734?refcode=ea.9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbDQv6PBeNkz6onW_7t_e-jHW4vVZax5maxAGqZOrvo=&emci=601a56bb-7cd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5944225)**** | ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584729/346592934/790536734?refcode=ea.9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbDQv6PBeNkz6onW_7t_e-jHW4vVZax5maxAGqZOrvo=&emci=601a56bb-7cd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=9ecf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5944225)****

Deb at a demonstration supporting women's right to reproductive freedom Meanwhile, national polling shows two-thirds of Americans oppose the idea of overturning Roe. By and large, people agree that women should have the right to control their own bodies and determine their reproductive futures. Deb wants to know if you’re among them, Peter. We put together a poll for you, so you can let us know whether you support Roe v. Wade and want to defend reproductive rights. Should Roe v. name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: Protecting Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

I’m a nurse and a parent. All my life, I’ve worked to help others. I have always believed people deserve quality, compassionate healthcare – including access to contraception and abortion care.
**But, the Supreme Court intends to undo the nearly 50-year-old precedent set by Roe v. Wade that guarantees people the right to choose an abortion.**
We need to protect the legal right to abortion, full stop. If the Court does overturn this ban, the state of Missouri would outlaw abortions without any exceptions, even in the cases of rape or incest.

Abortion care should be affordable and accessible for everyone. This especially includes low-income people and people of color, who will be disproportionately impacted.
To those reeling from this news, I'm here to say: _I'm with you._ As a healthcare worker, I believe everyone deserves access to the very best medical care. As a concerned citizen, I marched alongside my neighbors. **And as your next senator, I will work relentlessly for my constituents to be able to make their decisions with their doctors.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584653/346592756/-756528652?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk25-su-warmup8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDICkLdkMG_TQ9KqyvcN3Tglxr-Lr3f92Wsl-AZQVB8=&emci=29ae0116-b5d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=93cf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)
Extremist politicians won’t just stop at abortion. If we don’t act now, we will see even basic freedoms like access to contraception come next.

In a moment like this, we all need to raise our voices to protect reproductive freedom.** [Peter, please sign your name now to demand Congress immediately codify Roe v. Wade.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584656/346592765/-756528652?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk25-su-warmup8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDICkLdkMG_TQ9KqyvcN3Tglxr-Lr3f92Wsl-AZQVB8=&emci=29ae0116-b5d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=93cf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)**
| | [Sign Your Name >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45584667/346592773/-756528652?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk25-su-warmup8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NmNzNiNi0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDICkLdkMG_TQ9KqyvcN3Tglxr-Lr3f92Wsl-AZQVB8=&emci=29ae0116-b5d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=93cf73b6-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)

subject: [TODAY] Prince George’s County

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: We only need 1 SEAT to flip the balance of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Kamala has turned the 50-50 Senate into her own political weapon.
| Peter,
---
You don't have to dig very deep to realize just how much of a threat Kamala poses as the president of the 50-50 Senate...
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432398:6P9-rfogN:m:1:3317145305:0680D29CE3650F7F9B9F6C600BECEACB:r)
---
[Source: _Bloomberg_]
---
Over the last year and a half, her tie-breaking vote has been at the center of every one of the radical Left's extremist policies that are destroying our country.
---
_In fact, it 's been nearly 200 YEARS since a vice president has cast this many decisive votes in a 50-50 Senate._
---
**_But we only need 1 SEAT to flip the balance of power and take back the majority._**
---
That's why I've thrown all my support behind pro-Trump Navy SEAL Eric Greitens' U.S. Senate campaign as his National Chair. We MUST stop Kamala, here and now.
---
**[Please make a contribution to join me in helping Eric win the 1 Senate seat we need to END Kamala's 50-50 majority that is dismantling America as we know it. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432398:6P9-rfogN:m:1:3317145305:0680D29CE3650F7F9B9F6C600BECEACB:r)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: If you consider yourself a Pro-Trump American Patriot...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
As you may know, I tend to speak my mind and I never beat around the bush -- just like President Trump -- so believe me when I say this: I'm very worried.
Hey Patriot, this is Jim Jordan.
As you may know, I tend to speak my mind and I never beat around the bush _\-- just like President Trump --_ so believe me when I say this: **I 'm very worried.**
I just found out that Democrats already raised over $1 BILLION online this year alone. [**I 'm personally asking everyone on this list to pitch in just ten bucks before we completely fall behind.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432038:6M5frfoND:m:1:3299561967:BF7CF4401099A2A12A3BF0DFE9B02D1B:r)
This staggering number proves it. The Left's army of Trump-hating megadonors will do anything to defeat us and Democrats are CASHING IN. We can still defeat them but only with the support from EVERY LAST ONE of our Pro-Trump American Patriots.
When the stakes are this high, even just ten bucks can make a huge difference. Can I count on you to help save the day? I certainly hope so.
**[Pitch In Ten Bucks >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432039:6M5frfoND:m:1:3299561967:BF7CF4401099A2A12A3BF0DFE9B02D1B:r)**
**[Pitch In More >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432040:6M5frfoND:m:1:3299561967:BF7CF4401099A2A12A3BF0DFE9B02D1B:r)**
Look, I can't stand asking you for money. If there was another back-up plan, I would not be emailing you right now. **Unfortunately, this is an emergency.**
Democrat fundraising is SURGING and we are completely out of options.
If you consider yourself a Pro-Trump American Patriot, here's how we win: [**everyone reading this _\-- including you --_ must pitch in a few bucks by tonight. Can you help?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432040:6M5frfoND:m:1:3299561967:BF7CF4401099A2A12A3BF0DFE9B02D1B:r)
To victory,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432040:6M5frfoND:m:1:3299561967:BF7CF4401099A2A12A3BF0DFE9B02D1B:r)
Jim Jordan

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45585645/346596532/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY5OGFmZC0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Nuaiymyl_-PzN_JQ0EVdLQVI2EqskjXyFwraggb6Jk=&emci=37dad244-4ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5f698afd-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14943357) Peter, Recently, I shared that I was proud to be recognized as a _Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate_ in my race for Congress. And then, only a few days later, multiple mass shootings took dozens of lives—most notably, the horrific and racially-motivated shooting at a grocery store in Buffalo, New York. Americans are _constantly_ reminded of Congress’s failure to protect us from gun violence—at music festivals and nightclubs, elementary schools and colleges, and at the grocery store. Yet, common sense gun policies have long been supported by a majority of Americans, and voters have given Congress an urgent mandate to enact these life-saving provisions. So, why the delay? Money talks, and people like Ann Wagner listen. Since 2013, [Ann has actively fought against even the most popular, least controversial gun safety measures](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45585646/346596533/765017620?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY5OGFmZC0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Nuaiymyl_-PzN_JQ0EVdLQVI2EqskjXyFwraggb6Jk=&emci=37dad244-4ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5f698afd-16d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14943357) to keep cozy with right-wing agitators who have fueled racial resentment, division, and gaslit millions of people to commit violence against anyone who doesn’t fit their definition of a "real" American. And she’s done it so well, the NRA has consistently fawned over her. But I’m so damn tired of the "thoughts and prayers" we get from Washington power players like Wagner after Americans are senselessly slaughtered. **_If they truly cared, they would do something about it._** Wagner and her allies must own the outcomes of their rhetoric which compels domestic terrorists like Kyle Rittenhouse, Dylan Roof, and the murderer who took innocent lives in Buffalo this past weekend to commit violence. Their actions are byproducts of the same forces that keep Ann Wagner in office. And it's on us to work as hard as possible to defeat them to ensure they no longer have the platform to manipulate and divide us for political gain. In a society already awash with guns, their racist instigation has a predictable end. Lives are at stake, and we cannot afford to let these cynical politicians make decisions that will keep us, and our children, in a perpetual state of fear and danger. Sincerely, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45585648/346596534/95870112?refcode=mdgsc-em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY5OGFmZC0xNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Nuaiymyl_-PzN_JQ0EVdLQVI2EqskjXyFwraggb6Jk=) Trish Gunby for Congress

And she’s done it so well, the NRA has consistently fawned over her. But I’m so damn tired of the "thoughts and prayers" we get from Washington power players like Wagner after Americans are senselessly slaughtered. If they truly cared, they would do something about it. Wagner and her allies must own the outcomes of their rhetoric which compels domestic terrorists like Kyle Rittenhouse, Dylan Roof, and the murderer who took innocent lives in Buffalo this past weekend to commit violence. Their actions are byproducts of the same forces that keep Ann Wagner in office. And it's on us to work as hard as possible to defeat them to ensure they no longer have the platform to manipulate and divide us for political gain. In a society already awash with guns, their racist instigation has a predictable end. Lives are at stake, and we cannot afford to let these cynical politicians make decisions that will keep us, and our children, in a perpetual state of fear and danger. Sincerely, = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: you should see these photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I wanted to share a few important photos with you. Will you take a look?
| | |
---
I wanted to show you a couple of photos, and I thought you would like them.

When I was little, my parents instilled the value of hard work and service in my siblings and me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586110/346598598/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)
My Dad would ask the three of us what we planned to do for freedom that day as we hurried through a few bites of breakfast, and my Mom led by example through her work with Planned Parenthood.

When I went off to college, I thought I would become a doctor. I wanted to follow the example of my grandfather, who was a pediatrician. But over the course of my college career, between playing rugby, rowing crew, and meeting the love of my life, Tom, I found myself pulled in another direction – towards social services.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586111/346598601/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)
I’m now fortunate enough to have two beautiful children of my own, Ben and Meg. As my husband and I watched our community fully embrace our son Ben, who was born with serious disabilities, I was drawn to public service – to ensure that every child is given the opportunity to succeed as Ben was.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586112/346598602/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)
I have the privilege of serving New Hampshire in the United States Senate where I’m focused on making sure families like yours have the tools you need to get ahead and stay ahead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586113/346598606/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)
I’m on the front lines in the fight to protect safe and legal reproductive health care. I’m taking on corporate special interests. And I’m working tooth and nail to lower costs for Granite State families.

I’m also one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection. This month Rachel Maddow sounded the alarm saying I "have a difficult reelection fight ahead..." a recent poll shows me down by 2 points, and I won my last race by just 1,017 votes. This means that Mitch McConnell is hell-bent on flipping my seat. Without your help, he just might do it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586114/346598608/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)
I’m asking you personally: [**Please donate $3 or whatever you can to my campaign so that Democrats can hold control of the Senate and so that I can continue fighting for families like yours. Any amount helps and is greatly appreciated.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586115/346598610/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45586117/346598613/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ4NGI2NC0xN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEtf1hwNPRXF3U9mnczzSTwZjJekOOqhHj6xLuCFNtE=)**. clean_body: John Fetterman’s victory in Pennsylvania will flip the previously Republican-held senate seat blue. | = Peter, Lieutenant Governor John Fetterman won the Pennsylvania Democratic Senate primary and will face one of the Trump-backed Republican opponents in November. Fetterman’s victory is significant because Pennsylvania’s senate seat is open and plays a crucial role in expanding the Senate majority. = | = John Fetterman’s victory in Pennsylvania will flip the previously Republican-held senate seat blue and solidify the Democratic Senate majority. = | | | = | = | = | = | = * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, we made big progress in stopping Joe Biden's authoritarian "Ministry of Truth" that would silence political speech that the left doesn't like. I also continued to demand that Biden back away from his plan to let Title 42 expire at our southern border.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:

| End the Ministry of Propaganda
---
|
---
| |
---
| Huge news: we learned this week that Joe Biden's authoritarian "Ministry of Truth" is being PAUSED.
As a reminder, Joe Biden established a new "Ministry of Truth" at the Department of Homeland Security in order to "combat disinformation that poses a threat to the homeland."
We all know what that means: targeting speech from conservatives that the left disagrees with. It's more of a Ministry of Propaganda than a Ministry of Truth.
The left already tries to use Big Tech to censor conservatives. Now they want to set up a department in YOUR GOVERNMENT to do the same thing.
But thanks to patriots like you, who stood up and spoke out against this blatant attack on our First Amendment rights, Joe Biden is backtracking. This is what happens when we fight, when we make sound arguments about the dangers of the left's authoritarian goals.
This is great news, but now is not the time to get complacent. Now is the time to double down on our efforts to ensure this new Ministry of Propaganda is thrown in the ash heap of history where it belongs forever.
Please sign your name to the petition below demanding that Joe Biden NEVER attempt to use the government to silence our freedom of speech again.
Don't wait. Make your voice heard now.
[SIGN THE PETITION. END THE MINISTRY OF PROPAGANDA FOR GOOD. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cFniE-VZO-dalJCnjcJsCrmXyTqEweoCzXTYWfHU9DIfp7RKWFSVfolxR6XQeEqMtwTD0K_ljLfX8_s4J5lV97VsBR4HpAtltpzRXe8Iast_elLSl2GBpToJlYlNOgLjqkfTJjeKfmU9MVU0suGMFPnvlucmuvce-mbNxVufM10PArh67iZZrQ_12Pvfic71_IaKLiUl2T_SuOfycj1TGYE0jtk3Z9mF2qaB1Tnby1tIHdYFzRXaeB95IbGQPW4-aCTDkV7XgPxUmo9MEwHrEylAPdoF_cDq&c=4wzP-4ioXqKQxdHfLgKIUG3atyzGelH9LYab5qJg_NoSA2Q1mUJwPA==&ch=0SuyK7Oso3jlTVZAJFJ51-a0pyr2YKuS3CmFt7_3UxDbd8iYdOdItQ==)

| That's how many illegal immigrants could cross into our country EVERY DAY once Joe Biden rescinds Title 42. And he's planning on doing that ON MONDAY, MAY 23.
We are currently experiencing more than 7,000 illegal crossings every day as our border continues to be overrun. Remember, Obama's Homeland Security Secretary said that 1,000 per day was a crisis.
And just last month, there were more than 234,000 encounters at our southern border - the highest number of monthly encounters in the last two decades - and a 31% increase from 2021 (178,795) and a 1,286% increase from 2020 (17,106)
Joe Biden's border crisis is unlike anything we've seen before. And that's why we need to take action.
Critically, ending Title 42 will exacerbate another crisis: fentanyl overdoses.
Fentanyl is the leading cause of death for people aged 18-45 in the United States. There were 100,000 in 2021 for this age group, meaning fentanyl killed twice as many people as COVID-19, car accidents, cancer, and suicide.
As fentanyl pours across our border and into our communities, we need to extend Title 42 to be used to protect the American people from fentanyl smuggling at our border.
I'm supporting legislation to do just that but I need your help to put pressure on Joe Biden.
We need to ramp up the pressure to get Joe Biden to extend Title 42, and we have just 3 days to do that.
[DON'T WAIT. SIGN THE PETITION NOW TO EXTEND TITLE 42 AT OUR BORDER.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cFniE-VZO-dalJCnjcJsCrmXyTqEweoCzXTYWfHU9DIfp7RKWFSVfvwojndEB2FI06mM4EGLJYfVa3q8TORpJWNMvp43ArYvla3JYmhvkOonvIE9D9SlB4-w5zCzPOO1Jb8koTgPA3iI121J4oJyH8b4t0Pq9XI4IYgil9KUYSMF0vnPlZMKkZRhz_UeCtcGgFC3Z9gVY0-tnIG23DHQxVxjCf7cKPcQ8gvhSScV9FdCG-KQD-_CBRhibE5UecCVRIOoOM7Nm_w_kk-VdoP_cY1wFL_k2ea6&c=4wzP-4ioXqKQxdHfLgKIUG3atyzGelH9LYab5qJg_NoSA2Q1mUJwPA==&ch=0SuyK7Oso3jlTVZAJFJ51-a0pyr2YKuS3CmFt7_3UxDbd8iYdOdItQ==)

| Congressman Dan Crenshaw's EPIC Independence Day party is BACK by popular demand. This year, we're bringing the celebration of our great country to Starshine Texas Ranch - a 25-acre outdoor, recreational venue located in the heart of Humble, Texas. Starshine is home to a hillside concert arena, a lake, picnic areas, a luxurious clubhouse, and a playground for kids.
Join us for fireworks, floating on the lake, slip n' slides, beach volleyball, mechanical bull riding, inflatable axe throwing, and a live concert featuring country music star Chris Janson (with hits like "Buy Me a Boat", "Good Vibes", and "Fix a Drink") and rising singer/songwriter Shane Profitt.
All ages welcome. There is a large field in front of the stage where you're free to set up lawn chairs, umbrellas, and picnic blankets. You can also bring your own floats and inflatable rafts for the lake.* After the concert and fireworks, those who want to keep the party going will move inside for a live DJ show.
*Email events@crenshawforcongress.com for a full list of permitted items.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, we made big progress in stopping Joe Biden's authoritarian "Ministry of Truth" that would silence political speech that the left doesn't like. I also continued to demand that Biden back away from his plan to let Title 42 expire at our southern border. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | End the Ministry of Propaganda | | | | Huge news: we learned this week that Joe Biden's authoritarian "Ministry of Truth" is being PAUSED. As a reminder, Joe Biden established a new "Ministry of Truth" at the Department of Homeland Security in order to "combat disinformation that poses a threat to the homeland." We all know what that means: targeting speech from conservatives that the left disagrees with. It's more of a Ministry of Propaganda than a Ministry of Truth. The left already tries to use Big Tech to censor conservatives. Now they want to set up a department in YOUR GOVERNMENT to do the same thing. But thanks to patriots like you, who stood up and spoke out against this blatant attack on our First Amendment rights, Joe Biden is backtracking. This is what happens when we fight, when we make sound arguments about the dangers of the left's authoritarian goals. This is great news, but now is not the time to get complacent. Now is the time to double down on our efforts to ensure this new Ministry of Propaganda is thrown in the ash heap of history where it belongs forever. Please sign your name to the petition below demanding that Joe Biden NEVER attempt to use the government to silence our freedom of speech again. Don't wait. Make your voice heard now. == | | | | | | | | 18,000 | == | == | That's how many illegal immigrants could cross into our country EVERY DAY once Joe Biden rescinds Title 42. And he's planning on doing that ON MONDAY, MAY 23. We are currently experiencing more than 7,000 illegal crossings every day as our border continues to be overrun. Remember, Obama's Homeland Security Secretary said that 1,000 per day was a crisis. And just last month, there were more than 234,000 encounters at our southern border - the highest number of monthly encounters in the last two decades - and a 31% increase from 2021 (178,795) and a 1,286% increase from 2020 (17,106) Joe Biden's border crisis is unlike anything we've seen before. And that's why we need to take action. Critically, ending Title 42 will exacerbate another crisis: fentanyl overdoses. Fentanyl is the leading cause of death for people aged 18-45 in the United States. There were 100,000 in 2021 for this age group, meaning fentanyl killed twice as many people as COVID-19, car accidents, cancer, and suicide. As fentanyl pours across our border and into our communities, we need to extend Title 42 to be used to protect the American people from fentanyl smuggling at our border. I'm supporting legislation to do just that but I need your help to put pressure on Joe Biden. We need to ramp up the pressure to get Joe Biden to extend Title 42, and we have just 3 days to do that. == | | | | | | | | DON'T MISS MY INDEPENDENCE DAY PARTY | == | == | Congressman Dan Crenshaw's EPIC Independence Day party is BACK by popular demand. This year, we're bringing the celebration of our great country to Starshine Texas Ranch - a 25-acre outdoor, recreational venue located in the heart of Humble, Texas. Starshine is home to a hillside concert arena, a lake, picnic areas, a luxurious clubhouse, and a playground for kids. Join us for fireworks, floating on the lake, slip n' slides, beach volleyball, mechanical bull riding, inflatable axe throwing, and a live concert featuring country music star Chris Janson (with hits like "Buy Me a Boat", "Good Vibes", and "Fix a Drink") and rising singer/songwriter Shane Profitt. All ages welcome. There is a large field in front of the stage where you're free to set up lawn chairs, umbrellas, and picnic blankets. You can also bring your own floats and inflatable rafts for the lake. After the concert and fireworks, those who want to keep the party going will move inside for a live DJ show. Email events@crenshawforcongress.com for a full list of permitted items. | | | | | | | | On Social Media | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | Weekend Reads | FOX NEWS: == WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == | | | | | Thank you for reading! name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Subpoenaed: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=E1a7PJ7ZwgWy8ykoJZfIhmngxL%2B1E8vh&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, **House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) has been subpoenaed.**
Even after leaked audio footage of Kevin McCarthy saying Donald Trump should consider resigning in the immediate aftermath of the Jan. 6 attack, McCarthy has refused to cooperate voluntarily with the bipartisan Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol.
So - in an extraordinary move - the Select Committee has issued a subpoena to compel his testimony. The message is clear: **No one is above the law.**
It doesn't matter that Kevin McCarthy is one of the highest-ranking lawmakers in Congress. If he has information that can help uncover the full truth about Trump's and GOP lawmakers' roles in the deadly Capitol attack, then he _must_ testify - even if that testimony would reflect poorly on Trump, McCarthy, or any member of his party.
Sadly, McCarthy has a track record of hypocrisy when it comes to standing up to Donald Trump: In the immediate aftermath of the insurrection, McCarthy condemned Trump's behavior and privately suggested Trump should consider resigning. But then only days later, McCarthy did an aboutface and voted against impeaching the President. Ever since he has refused to provide any information that could help the Jan. 6 committee with its investigation.
**Now there is speculation McCarthy could even try to ignore the Select Committee 's subpoena. We _must_ speak out against McCarthy's political cowardice, and I'm counting on you to take action right away. We simply can't let Republicans like McCarthy get away with obstructing the investigation and sweeping Trump's crimes under the rug. [Will you sign my new petition to condemn GOP hypocrisy and demand that Republicans like Kevin McCarthy be held accountable for enabling Trump's crimes?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-mccarthy-subpoena-petition?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1182-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-mccarthy-subpoena%3Fcode%3Djtk1182-su-nd)**
Thank you for speaking out,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2LiN2kP%2BKux9cM%2FI%2BxY4rmngxL%2B1E8vh&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Hi Friend,
Bill Lee is about two things, big business and big donors. Tennessee deserves a governor who is about us.
My entire life has been about service. I learned about service in the days of my youth from my parents.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]

My father always said service before self. It is with this concept in mind, I set out on a mission to serve people. It's the reason I went to law school and sought to serve the people of my hometown of Memphis as a member of the city council. We need a governor who can speak to people regardless of their backgrounds, have difficult conversations, and move us forward.
That's what I have been able to do on the Memphis City Council and with your help, we will serve the entire state of Tennessee, while remembering the lesson of my youth— service before self.

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Madison Cawthorn lost his seat this week. With your help, Marjorie Taylor Greene is next.
body:
Derek,
This week, radical-right conspiracy theorist and bigot Madison Cawthorn was defeated at the ballot box. With your help, I’ll do the exact same thing to Marjorie Taylor Greene in November.
This result proves that many voters are sick and tired of the antics of ultra-MAGA members like Madison Cawthorn and Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Every day on the campaign trail, I’m even meeting Republicans who are pledging their support to me because they know that Marjorie Taylor Greene hasn’t done a damn thing for the district she represents in Georgia.
But here’s the thing: My primary election is next week, and I need your help to get over the finish line to ensure that we can beat Marjorie Taylor Greene in November.
Will you split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and CommonGood to help me send Marjorie Taylor Greene into political retirement? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220521_CGVA_MF]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220330_CGVA_MF&amount=250]

The message is clear: We have a path to victory right here in Georgia. It’s time for Democrats to go on the offensive and end the radical right’s plan to destroy our democracy.
Talk soon,
Marcus Flowers
(Army veteran. Patriot. Democrat. Marcus Flowers is the Democrat running to defeat Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia's 14th District. This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/02ee4fa533ca15a5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Election Day is Tuesday! Our team — the best grassroots team in this state — is running through tape and sharing our message far and wide. I want to thank each of you for your prayers, support, and hard work throughout this journey. It’s time to dig deep one more time, and there are many ways Team ’22 can continue to play a B.I.G. roll reaching voters between now and 7 pm Tuesday.
---
---
# **_VOTE TUESDAY!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/0b14f2bb21561c61c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
It's time to get out and vote! Election Day is Tuesday, and I'd be honored to have your support for the U.S. Senate. [**If you haven't voted, find your polling location and make a plan for doing so on Tuesday.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/c1491e9f0a149550c3d6b838967d376c/37793) If you have voted, make sure 22 of your friends go to the polls on Election Day to vote Gary Black.
---
---
# **_Jaemor Farms_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/f6e0ea4cac99fe13c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
B.I.G thank you to all who joined us Tuesday night at Jaemor Farms! Special thanks to my friends Doug Collins, Bubba McDonald, and four-time world BBQ Champion Myron Mixon for joining us. Our momentum is building across the state. We’re ready to shock the world on Tuesday, en route to taking back the U.S. Senate in November.
---
---
# _**Show Your Support On Social Media**_
---
---
Be proud of your vote and show your support by saving this photo, sharing it on social media, and even making it your profile picture! The finish line is near, and with your help we will take our message all the way to victory on Tuesday and again in November.
---
---
# **_How You Can Help_**

---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/d67070a1a32b9028c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Help us finish strong! Please show your support by doing these three things: 1.Text 22 people in your community and remind them to vote on Tuesday.

2.If you have signs, put them out as soon as possible so everyone can see our grassroots support in your community!

3.Get involved with our Campaign Team's phone banking program! Please contact Charlie Barrett - 770-533-0431/[Charlie@votegaryblack.com](mailto:Charlie@votegaryblack.com "Charlie@votegaryblack.com") if you want to get involved in spreading the word!

It’s no secret we have the best grassroots team in the state. Let’s finish strong, together.
---
---
# **_Join Us On Election Night_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/3ee150bafad0324bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I’m personally inviting you to join my family and Team ‘22 in celebrating election night on May 24th at 7 pm at our family’s barn. Join us to enjoy cake and fellowship as we watch the results come in! [**RSVP here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/3843dc41c00da9a9c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Thank you again for all that you’ve done to power our campaign — from attending events to investing in our campaign and dedicating countless hours sharing our message. Most importantly, thank you for your continued prayers and words of encouragement. We couldn’t have made it this far without you, and I’m asking each of you to dig deep between now and Tuesday. Together, we’ll keep this campaign moving forward on the way to firing Raphael Warnock in November!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/71c395e597905614c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/bbfa4238c43a1441c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $25.6 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/f59c1a19b776d13b/8898850bb00b7cc0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=f59c1a19b776d13b&d=8523e06050db7b06c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=f59c1a19b776d13b).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---
