name: Yvette
subject: FWD: Bumping this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I’m just making sure you saw Letitia’s last message.
**Our midnight fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, but we’re still $627 short of our goal.** That’s why I’m reaching out now – because I know that this team of fearless fighters has what it takes to close the gap, but we can’t do it without you, Peter.
During a time when so many fundamental rights are under attack, New Yorkers need someone like Letitia James to fight tirelessly for them. But, with her Republican opponent determined to defeat her and turn back the clock on progress, we’re relying on YOUR help.
**Please, will you make a donation of $5 or more to Letitia’s campaign for re-election? Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587803/346603755/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)**
Thanks so much,

Yvette Buckner Campaign Manager Team Tish
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Sun, May 15, 2022
Subject: Falling short is not an option
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587804/346603756/265476937?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)
---
Peter, it’s because of supporters like you that I became the first Black woman EVER to be elected to hold New York statewide office in 2018.
But the moment I was elected I knew that this historic accomplishment would only be meaningful if I used my platform to fight for New York’s voiceless and vulnerable. And so, for the last few years, I’ve put my head down and worked day and night to ensure that families like my own would finally have someone in government fighting for their best interests.
**Peter, I’m running for another term as attorney general of New York because my work is far from over – but I need to raise at least $10,000 before midnight tomorrow to keep my campaign running strong. Winning a race like this depends on hitting every single goal, so please:[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to help me reach my midnight fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587805/346603757/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587806/346603758/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587807/346603759/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)
---
Republicans across the country are attempting to wrestle away all of the hard-fought progress we’ve made in the last few decades – and they’re starting to win. That’s why, with reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun reform under attack, New Yorkers need someone who will NEVER stop fighting for progress.
**But my continued fight relies on your support, Peter.** Because both my GOP opponent and the multimillion-dollar Republican Attorneys General Association are DETERMINED to defeat me in November.
**That’s why falling short of my fundraising goal is not an option, but I can’t hit this goal unless every fearless fighter who is able to give does. [So please, will you chip in $50, $25, or even just $5 to ensure that I have the resources I need to stand tall against GOP attacks and win re-election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45587808/346603760/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWRhZDVlNy0xYWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5K7i0lQ0Kuly8AsTHjj4goiBk28s45ymUNZVvTvuYg=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m just making sure you saw Letitia’s last message. Our midnight fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, but we’re still $627 short of our goal. That’s why I’m reaching out now – because I know that this team of fearless fighters has what it takes to close the gap, but we can’t do it without you, Peter. During a time when so many fundamental rights are under attack, New Yorkers need someone like Letitia James to fight tirelessly for them. But, with her Republican opponent determined to defeat her and turn back the clock on progress, we’re relying on YOUR help. Please, will you make a donation of $5 or more to Letitia’s campaign for re-election? Here’s the best link to give:= Thanks so much, Yvette Buckner Campaign Manager Team Tish \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Sun, May 15, 2022 Subject: Falling short is not an option | | | = Peter, it’s because of supporters like you that I became the first Black woman EVER to be elected to hold New York statewide office in 2018. But the moment I was elected I knew that this historic accomplishment would only be meaningful if I used my platform to fight for New York’s voiceless and vulnerable. And so, for the last few years, I’ve put my head down and worked day and night to ensure that families like my own would finally have someone in government fighting for their best interests. Peter, I’m running for another term as attorney general of New York because my work is far from over – but I need to raise at least $10,000 before midnight tomorrow to keep my campaign running strong. Winning a race like this depends on hitting every single goal, so please:= = | | = Republicans across the country are attempting to wrestle away all of the hard-fought progress we’ve made in the last few decades – and they’re starting to win. That’s why, with reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun reform under attack, New Yorkers need someone who will NEVER stop fighting for progress. But my continued fight relies on your support, Peter. Because both my GOP opponent and the multimillion-dollar Republican Attorneys General Association are DETERMINED to defeat me in November. That’s why falling short of my fundraising goal is not an option, but I can’t hit this goal unless every fearless fighter who is able to give does. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for making history with me. name: Karen Bass
subject: I was only 20 when the Supreme Court made their Roe v. Wade decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I remember a world before Roe v. Wade, and I will not go back.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45588357/346604606/-1030761386?ms=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&source=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Bm8puwmNBEa9UefuMqHYFVwwxy%2BcNnAOqbo51qwXM5e295ZFnLvPswIS0nalXr3d%2FfDZAXNACC4KmTBwsZJ13s7F72qImEL8CKz3hYG%2F4ORmwoO1Idem7REYxKL10SAlWDU443AgQyZvsAdGyUmiFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzJiYjU5NC0xYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSwYR85aAWT3fFusKDkawSudRmWW4aEpSFpL3G5phJM=&emci=8839d30c-bdd6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2bb594-1bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2429742)
---
Team, I want to tell you the context behind this photo. But first, we should start at the beginning.

My story begins and ends in Los Angeles. I was raised with three brothers in the Venice/Fairfax area of L.A. I grew up watching the Civil Rights Movement on television with my father, and I remember a world without _Roe v. Wade_.

I was only 20 years old when the Supreme Court protected a woman's right to choose. Before 1973, women had to travel hundreds and thousands of miles to seek reproductive health care in other countries. Often, women didn't have the time or the financial stability to travel so far for care. Countless women lost their lives. More women experienced the emotional and physical trauma from unregulated abortions or carrying an unwanted pregnancy to term.

I saw Americans risk everything for equality and witnessed true community activism drive change. Activists fought for the end of segregation and won. They fought for safe and legal abortion access and won. These victories sparked my lifelong commitment to fighting for social and economic justice.

When this photo was taken, our city was in the grips of crack cocaine and gang violence. I knew that addressing it would require empowering our community across generations, ethnicities, cultures, and neighborhoods. That vision led me to found the Community Coalition in 1990 to tackle substance use, poverty, and crime in South Los Angeles.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45588358/346604611/-1030761386?ms=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&source=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Bm8puwmNBEa9UefuMqHYFVwwxy%2BcNnAOqbo51qwXM5e295ZFnLvPswIS0nalXr3d%2FfDZAXNACC4KmTBwsZJ13s7F72qImEL8CKz3hYG%2F4ORmwoO1Idem7REYxKL10SAlWDU443AgQyZvsAdGyUmiFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzJiYjU5NC0xYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSwYR85aAWT3fFusKDkawSudRmWW4aEpSFpL3G5phJM=&emci=8839d30c-bdd6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2bb594-1bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2429742)
---
I graduated from Hamilton High School, Cal State Dominguez Hills, and the University of Southern California. I've been a nurse, Physician Assistant, and clinical instructor at USC. My drive to heal our bleeding city never left me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45588359/346604612/-1030761386?ms=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&source=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Bm8puwmNBEa9UefuMqHYFVwwxy%2BcNnAOqbo51qwXM5e295ZFnLvPswIS0nalXr3d%2FfDZAXNACC4KmTBwsZJ13s7F72qImEL8CKz3hYG%2F4ORmwoO1Idem7REYxKL10SAlWDU443AgQyZvsAdGyUmiFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzJiYjU5NC0xYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSwYR85aAWT3fFusKDkawSudRmWW4aEpSFpL3G5phJM=&emci=8839d30c-bdd6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2bb594-1bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2429742)
---
That commitment led me to serve as the first Black woman Speaker in the California State House during California’s greatest economic crisis since the Great Depression. I knew my city — and the state — was home to families who were struggling. It's why I championed legislation to make healthcare more accessible and affordable for Californians, fought to improve California’s child welfare system, and fast-tracked federal economic stimulus.

No matter where I went, I knew I wanted to be a part of the solution. That drive led me to serve as a U.S. Congresswoman, where I helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House. Now, I'm running to be Los Angeles' next mayor.

Today, I look at the city I love as it faces once-in-a-generation crises, and I ask myself: "How can I not do everything I can to help?" Los Angeles has called me home, and I am ready to serve.

Team, it doesn't matter where you live, you deserve a mayor who will show up and work for you every single day. **Someone who will advocate for working people, address structural inequality, and tackle systemic racism. Someone who will use every single lever of power to ensure that Los Angeles is a safe haven for reproductive freedom.**

There are no simple answers, but together, we can get the job done.

**[Please join EMILY's List, Dolores Huerta, Rep. Katie Porter, and grassroots supporters across the city to show your support for our campaign as we work to create a pathway to progress for every single Angeleno.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45588360/346604613/-1030761386?ms=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&source=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220521_chce_fndd_gq_act_bio_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Bm8puwmNBEa9UefuMqHYFVwwxy%2BcNnAOqbo51qwXM5e295ZFnLvPswIS0nalXr3d%2FfDZAXNACC4KmTBwsZJ13s7F72qImEL8CKz3hYG%2F4ORmwoO1Idem7REYxKL10SAlWDU443AgQyZvsAdGyUmiFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzJiYjU5NC0xYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSwYR85aAWT3fFusKDkawSudRmWW4aEpSFpL3G5phJM=&emci=8839d30c-bdd6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2bb594-1bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2429742)**

Thanks for reading, and thanks for all you do,

Karen
With the primary only weeks away, our voter outreach efforts are in full swing to reach Angelenos with Karen's vision for Los Angeles. Rush a donation today to support Karen's voter engagement efforts:

clean_body: I remember a world before Roe v. Wade, and I will not go back. Team, I want to tell you the context behind this photo. But first, we should start at the beginning. My story begins and ends in Los Angeles. I was raised with three brothers in the Venice/Fairfax area of L.A. I grew up watching the Civil Rights Movement on television with my father, and I remember a world without Roe v. Wade. I was only 20 years old when the Supreme Court protected a woman's right to choose. Before 1973, women had to travel hundreds and thousands of miles to seek reproductive health care in other countries. Often, women didn't have the time or the financial stability to travel so far for care. Countless women lost their lives. More women experienced the emotional and physical trauma from unregulated abortions or carrying an unwanted pregnancy to term. I saw Americans risk everything for equality and witnessed true community activism drive change. Activists fought for the end of segregation and won. They fought for safe and legal abortion access and won. These victories sparked my lifelong commitment to fighting for social and economic justice. When this photo was taken, our city was in the grips of crack cocaine and gang violence. I knew that addressing it would require empowering our community across generations, ethnicities, cultures, and neighborhoods. That vision led me to found the Community Coalition in 1990 to tackle substance use, poverty, and crime in South Los Angeles. I graduated from Hamilton High School, Cal State Dominguez Hills, and the University of Southern California. I've been a nurse, Physician Assistant, and clinical instructor at USC. My drive to heal our bleeding city never left me. That commitment led me to serve as the first Black woman Speaker in the California State House during California’s greatest economic crisis since the Great Depression. I knew my city — and the state — was home to families who were struggling. It's why I championed legislation to make healthcare more accessible and affordable for Californians, fought to improve California’s child welfare system, and fast-tracked federal economic stimulus. No matter where I went, I knew I wanted to be a part of the solution. That drive led me to serve as a U.S. Congresswoman, where I helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House. Now, I'm running to be Los Angeles' next mayor. Today, I look at the city I love as it faces once-in-a-generation crises, and I ask myself: "How can I not do everything I can to help?" Los Angeles has called me home, and I am ready to serve. Team, it doesn't matter where you live, you deserve a mayor who will show up and work for you every single day. Someone who will advocate for working people, address structural inequality, and tackle systemic racism. Someone who will use every single lever of power to ensure that Los Angeles is a safe haven for reproductive freedom. There are no simple answers, but together, we can get the job done. Thanks for reading, and thanks for all you do, Karen With the primary only weeks away, our voter outreach efforts are in full swing to reach Angelenos with Karen's vision for Los Angeles. Rush a donation today to support Karen's voter engagement efforts: All solicitations are by Karen Bass and Karen Bass for Mayor 2022, and not by any other federal officeholder referenced in this e-mail. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWuNJWQhNI

Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration
took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just
like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my
mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But
instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production.
And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves
behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWuNJWQhNI

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

Gas
prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration
took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just
like the rest of your fellow Americans.

There's
no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of
relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy
production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy
reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I'd like
to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have
affected you and your family.

Would you
be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question
survey?

By doing
so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people
like you think-and use your answers to fight back against the
Biden administration's radical anti-energy agenda.

The
survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your
opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now
using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/

Thank you
so much for your time. I am truly grateful.

Best,

Andrew P.
McIndoe
VP,
Development

The

D.C. 20002

name: Shane Cory
subject: For Laura’s birthday . . .
body:
We cannot afford to have a Do-Nothing Congressman sitting back and ignoring the violent, Communist hordes who will never stop attacking our values and our rights.
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/afqgFRN88921xGVkzt2Wfl892Q/BKQZc3p7vFDPfKwRFMW9tw)**
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/afqgFRN88921xGVkzt2Wfl892Q/BKQZc3p7vFDPfKwRFMW9tw)Today, Laura Loomer turns 29.

I know, right?

She's been fighting as a public figure for years, and has done more for our nation than most politicians do in a lifetime . . . **yet she has a literal lifetime in front of her.**

As her friend, [I ask that you donate $29 today, in Laura's honor, to support her campaign.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/afqgFRN88921xGVkzt2Wfl892Q/BKQZc3p7vFDPfKwRFMW9tw)

Seven years ago, I met Laura when we were working with Project Veritas, when she was 22.

I've been in the political arena for over 20 years now, and can say with experience that the passion you see in youth frequently fades. Life catches up. Priorities change, and the youthful fight fades.

That's not the case with Laura. The fire in her eyes burns as bright as the day I met her. If anything, her passion has turned into a wildfire.

When we meet people like this, we know they're special. And we have an obligation to make sure that they keep going.

So please, [join me in supporting Laura's run for Congress with a gift of $29 or more today](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/afqgFRN88921xGVkzt2Wfl892Q/BKQZc3p7vFDPfKwRFMW9tw).

If for no other reason, it's a sound, long-term investment in our own future.

Laura will NEVER change for the worse. She will NEVER put us last to the Establishment or any other political or financial interest.

And once we get her to Washington, **she will be there for a very long time fighting on behalf of all of us.**

Send Laura your birthday wishes today by backing her campaign.

Thanks so much, Shane Cory ** ** ** ** **** ** ** **** **Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc** **** **Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. But that’s not what this campaign stands for, Peter. **We’re sick of the establishment telling us to sit down and keep quiet.** John King has an ambitious vision of the role that state government can play in our lives, including lifting all of us up regardless of race or zip code, providing opportunities in education and the economy, and staying true to our progressive values. However, we’re up against well-connected and well-funded opponents who are using their establishment connections to spread their “more of the same” message. clean_body: We’re sick of the establishment telling us to sit down and keep quiet. | = | Peter, institutional powers love the status quo. That’s why our opponents and their establishment connections don’t have any real, progressive ideas or revolutionary policies to speak of — they want to keep everything exactly how it is. But that’s not what this campaign stands for, Peter. We’re sick of the establishment telling us to sit down and keep quiet. John King has an ambitious vision of the role that state government can play in our lives, including lifting all of us up regardless of race or zip code, providing opportunities in education and the economy, and staying true to our progressive values. However, we’re up against well-connected and well-funded opponents who are using their establishment connections to spread their “more of the same” message. We can’t let them waste another administration, or worse, hand the election to Republicans. = We’re counting on you, Peter, to help power our progressive movement and take us across the finish line in June. = | | = We have the power to flip Maryland back to BLUE and bring real change to Annapolis, but we can’t do that without the resources to spread our message far and wide. Please, don’t let candidates preaching more of the same distract voters from our campaign’s real solutions to the issues we face every day — like abortion access, access to education, and good clean jobs. = | = Thank you, Team King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. name: Tucker Cavanagh
subject: The Washington Post Endorses Tom Perez for Governor!
body:
WaPo says "the choice for us in the July 19 primary is clear: Tom Perez would make an outstanding governor."

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591217/346607563/-530921513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) Hi team, We wanted you to be among the first to hear the incredibly exciting news:[ Tom Perez was just endorsed by the Washington Post!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591219/346607564/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) Some highlights from the glowing endorsement:
* “Even in that distinguished field, the choice for us in the July 19 primary is clear: Tom Perez would make an outstanding governor”
* “When he says he belongs to the “GSD” — Get Stuff Done — wing of his party, none of his Democratic rivals bother to argue. Even conservatives concede he is highly effective.”
* “...none of the candidates can match Mr. Perez’s track record or command of governing. Few candidates in Maryland’s history, or the country’s, would enter a governor’s office so well prepared.”

**This is a MAJOR momentum shift in this campaign!** Recent polling has shown a wide-open race and a clear path to victory for Tom. Massive endorsements like this matter — especially in Tom’s home county of Montgomery County and the entire D.C. region. Here’s the key point: When voters have opportunities to learn more about Tom we win. And this endorsement will go a long way to helping Marylanders learn more about Tom’s unparalleled record getting stuff done as a civil rights prosecutor, Maryland’s Secretary of Labor, Licensing and Regulation, President Obama’s Labor Secretary, and beyond. This announcement adds to rapidly growing support for Tom and Shannon, [including this week’s endorsement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591220/346607565/-1581777112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) from the AFL-CIO, with unions representing over 150,000 households across Maryland now backing our campaign. We need your help to get the word out! The Washington Post agrees![ https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/05/21/tom-perez-maryland-governor-democratic-primary-endorsement-2022/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591224/346607569/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) Tom has dedicated his life to helping people across the country, and that is exactly what he’ll do as Maryland’s next governor. #TeamPerezSneed [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/05/21/tom-perez-maryland-governor-democratic-primary-endorsement-2022/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591225/346607570/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) “Few candidates in Maryland’s history, or the country’s, would enter a governor’s office so well prepared.” I’m proud to be voting for @TomPerez and @ ShannonSneed4MD [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/05/21/tom-perez-maryland-governor-democratic-primary-endorsement-2022/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591226/346607571/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNkZTZmMi0xZWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1UDF87Dto5korfFPQjQIk0KyaohlDN_5ASMu-aY9BA=&emci=85b178a4-14d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4c3de6f2-1ed9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) name: Josh Weil for US Senate
subject: It's Time to Get on the Ballot
body:
Saturday, May 21, 2022 | To all of our supporters, This campaign was founded on the understanding that the only way we were going to get a D
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.joshweil.org/so/4fO3aKucN/c?w=bfxHoPfa96EsjEy8jXmz6No_efF-8kLYq407SWrh5IM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuam9zaHdlaWwub3JnL3NvLzRmTzNhS3VjTj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL)
---
| |
---
| | Saturday, May 21, 2022
---
| | |
---
| | To all of our supporters,
This campaign was founded on the understanding that the only way we were going to get a Democrat across the finish in line in Florida is to run a true grassroots campaign, built on the support of people from across the entire state, with a platform of strong progressive policies designed to actually meet the needs of Floridians who have been neglected by Republican leadership in Tallahassee and an inert federal legislature paralyzed by its dependence on corporate donors. Now, 18 months later, we are nearing the big deadline. On June 13th we have to deliver a check for $10,440 to the Division of Elections, and I'm counting on you to help us get it done. We can't win if we don't run, the most important goal for this campaign right now is getting on the ballot.
If you've already donated, truly I want to say thank you, but I have to ask you to dig deep and support again. If you haven't donated, yet, please, this is the time. The moment is now.
The people of Florida deserve a Progressive choice on the ballot. The qualifying deadline in Florida is almost here. We've got more than half of the $10,440 pledged or collected, but we're not there yet. name: Team Seth
subject: The fight for voting rights continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
103 years ago today, the House passed the 19th amendment that granted women the right to vote. This was a huge step forward for equality in our country – but not for every person.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591423/346609112/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmViOGMxNy0xZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBEamQwK8ihJb52JFxxgB5jCYKyzQF5QmEHaNkEDpLs=&emci=4cf25070-a9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=96eb8c17-1fd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

103 years ago today, the House passed the 19th amendment that granted women the right to vote. This was a huge step forward for equality in our country – but not for every person.

It wasn't until the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that the right to vote was secured for Black, brown, and Indigenous Americans. And to this day, the fight for access to the ballot box for all continues.

Over the last few years, we've seen an uptick in attacks on the right to vote as Republicans in state legislatures across the country have introduced a record-breaking number of voter suppression bills. Republicans are trying to make it harder to vote in order to win elections. This is undemocratic and unfair.

Here in Rhode Island, we're taking action to protect the right to vote for every Rhode Islander. The state House recently passed the Let RI Vote Act which would expand voter access while ensuring election integrity.

Seth knows that our democracy only works when people can make their voices heard and elect leaders who will fight for them. That's why he's ready to stand up for voting rights in Congress and support legislation that will protect access to the ballot box for every American.

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45591460/346609209/-42398318?refcode=em20220521mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWViOGMxNy0xZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UM6BZS_qxmvpId_r08bNzT3UDLNXsIpTVt0FznAhklo=)

Dear Peter,
If our state wants to attract the best technology companies, businesses, and entrepreneurs that America has to offer, then we must be able to provide world-class technology infrastructure. This is a zero-sum competition with other states happening right now – and we need to do everything we can to ensure Maryland’s leadership in the high skill industries of the future like biotechnology, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/PPUMMUweXEapxAchFCS2NQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PPUMMUweXEapxAchFCS2NQ2]
That’s why if I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll make sure Maryland achieves statewide 5G and high-speed broadband access by the end of my first term. For some of us, living in or visiting areas of the state with inadequate access to internet connectivity is simply frustrating. But for others, universal internet access is a matter of economic justice. Many of our working families have been frozen out of remote-work and remote-learning opportunities due to substandard internet connectivity. As Governor, this is an issue that I will rectify.
Under my administration, access to the internet will be considered a right for each citizen just like access to clean water and clean electricity. By the end of my first term, we’ll make sure every Marylander has access to high-speed broadband and 5G wireless connectivity.
If you agree that we need to shore up our economy for the 21st century by investing in the next generation of internet connectivity, will you add your name to support my plan to achieve statewide 5G and high-speed broadband access? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PPUMMUweXEapxAchFCS2NQ2]
Thank you,

The first openly LGBTQ congressperson from New York, Sean has spent a lifetime fighting -- and winning -- tough battles. Now, Sean is leading the fight in Congress to fight Republican extremism, protect our health care, and save our social safety net. But Republicans and their special-interest friends are funneling cash every day to defeat Sean and take back our House Majority. He’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep this campaign running strong. body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45592559/346611520/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk994-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE0MDdjOC0xZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJoAWwO5g1E5ZnU0goch4GKxG-IoVOdbAyME_9eiC4c=)
Peter, it's Abby. It's a busy time over here at our campaign HQ, but I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
Plain and simple, this campaign would not exist without people like you, Peter. When members of our grassroots team like you step up and donate, it ensures that we're able to reach the voters who will decide this election and who will respond to and fight back against Republican attacks – and everything else in between. Thank you.
So from the bottom of my heart, thank you for supporting this campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley. Thank you for standing with me through every GOP attack against us. Thank you for believing in our campaign. Thank you for believing in Iowa. **When we win this, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to hold Senate control because of you.**
Winning, however, hinges on keeping up our momentum and never losing sight of the fact that _this_ – our campaign – is our greatest shot at flipping this seat blue. [**So please, Peter, can you make your first grassroots donation to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority? GOP attacks against candidates like me are intensifying, so I'm really counting on supporters like you to invest in our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45592560/346611522/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk994-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE0MDdjOC0xZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJoAWwO5g1E5ZnU0goch4GKxG-IoVOdbAyME_9eiC4c=)

name: Katie Hill
subject: It's time for blue states to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a-mlkdhWKCS_hT0UDgJmJAAfCjUgqIyBSLNh6WnFDg=/reLIkcEv-24E7MT8dTvKboT8b8HENfX9I5bxBe_sjhY=)
---
Republicans have made it clear that they will try to pass laws banning women from the right to choose _whenever_ they can.
**We 'll fight back against their attacks with everything we can. But in the meantime, we need blue states to start taking substantial action to protect women's reproductive freedom.**
We've created a petition calling on blue states to protect the right to choose. [Will you join our calls by signing on here?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a-mlkdhWKCS_hT0UDgJmJAAfCjUgqIyBSLNh6WnFDg=/JuWB6DOJqlC8Yo3cpdtsaBBcJUoHnHT_fk-sKoL99T0=?source=2022bluestatesrepro_HT&referrer=group-her-time&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhtfrontline%3Frefcode%3DX_BlueStatesAbortion)

-- _Katie_

---

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time**[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a-mlkdhWKCS_hT0UDgJmJAAfCjUgqIyBSLNh6WnFDg=/E7RqjhoVEm3KSMiW7iiiGRQnp_ntHlF8xN95U49y09E=?refcode=footer)**, and**[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a-mlkdhWKCS_hT0UDgJmJAAfCjUgqIyBSLNh6WnFDg=/reLIkcEv-24E7MT8dTvKboT8b8HENfX9I5bxBe_sjhY=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBRA Monthly Meeting
body:
South Bay Republican Assembly News South Bay CRA News Monday May 23rd SBRA Meeting Don't forget our monthly meeting this coming Monday Night! We ha
| |
---
|
---
## South Bay Republican Assembly News
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
**Monday May 23rd SBRA Meeting**
Don't forget our monthly meeting this coming Monday Night! We have Several exciting people speaking
A big thank you to all who came out to our CRA Candidate Forum, it was a blast!
**Remember our club meets the 4th Monday of every month.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## May 23rd SBRA Meeting
---
|
---
# Actress & Stunt women Cha Cha Sandoval-McMahon
Cha Cha Sandoval-McMahon is known for Jerry Maguire, The Blues Brothers and The Golden Child. Cha Cha has been leading a fight against the Screen Actors Guild to prevent them from enforcing mandates.
|
---
# Derrick Gates for US Congress CA-36
Derrick has 15 years of experience in corporate mediation, revitalizing churches, starting ministries, equipping leaders, and helping the less fortunate around the United States.
Derrick has conservative values and an ability to see them reestablished in our communities.
Derrick Mentors multicultural leaders from around the United States.
Derrick desires to raise Bold, Moral, Men, and Women of Integrity to lead our country. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=33797.87.1.ba661429b09f3e6c49b3486f5717db62)
|
---
# **Lauren Cotner For Torrance City Council**
Lauren’s affiliation with politics and government all started when she joined the Redondo Beach Jaycee's, the Junior Chamber, in 1985. She became very active with raising funds for organizations throughout the South Bay and was elected District Governor of District 12. During her tenure in the organization she increased the district size by 4 Chapters, which got more young people involved in the community. The following year she became State Director which helped support the South Bay Jaycee’s reach higher levels. Lauren now has a goal to get the Jaycee’s restarted with the younger generation and continue to collect food and funds for food banks and those in need in our Torrance community and beyond.
|
---
# Y. Marie Manvel for State Board of Equalization
The State Board of Equalization presides over property taxes, gasoline taxes, business taxes, and sales taxes to name a few.
I am an experienced business owner. I understand the struggle. Do you know what the biggest business expense is? It’s taxes! Business taxes are a small business owner’s largest expense!
For years, politicians have been taking advantage of small businesses and individuals with multiple taxation.
Your salary is taxed, and then you pay with your AFTER tax dollars, another tax for your purchases. Is that fair?
Then the businesses who take your after tax money are also taxed.
Almost every exchange of money is taxed.
Older Americans are first taxed on their SSI and then pay taxes again on their property taxes, ect.
I am committed to decreasing the tax burden for all of my constituents, especially in these uncertain economic times.
I will be your INDEPENDENT voice.
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
**On the 23rd** we have our Monthly South Bay Republican Assembly Meeting. We have some exciting speakers lined up That will be announced next week. We meet currently at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pm
**Correction from our last Newsletter:**
**I mistakenly said that we meet on the last Monday of every month and it is the 4th Monday of every month. And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pmI apologize for the confusion**
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=33797.88.1.ab1443ef497d7a5472df38af6837ab3a)
---
©2022 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA
---

Friend,
As you may know, the U.S. Supreme Court plans to overturn the 50-year precedent established in _Roe v. Wade_ this summer, ending access to safe abortion care across the country.
Nebraskans don’t support this extreme agenda. A new study found that most Nebraskans support _Roe v. Wade_ and the majority of our state opposes banning abortion.
**We deserve a Representative who reflects _our_ values and stands up for _our_ rights – no matter what the D.C. party elite say.** But Patty’s opponent is determined to repeat anti-choice talking points and strip Nebraskans of our healthcare and bodily autonomy.
**That’s why we’re circulating a petition: Patty Pansing Brooks and thousands of Nebraskans oppose anti-choice legislators who want to send us back to the Dark Ages.**
**[If you’re with the majority of Nebraskans who know it’s time to codify _Roe_ and strengthen access to reproductive health care, join Patty and sign on to her petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594048/346614429/-363486735?contactdata=dr27bk4yPpfM%2FYAp%2B%2BgZJaKFZ70yBHG%2BKSXTWr4AEI%2BzBau7usNm%2B0PKnA8wChmA8WOq6aHtMIR8FbWuiOhSqptGBTLE5dHlpmA0FNE5EY4DKVHO1F3p7h10g64OTz%2BJ0sbcUG%2BAk21xHVTWC9jZrw%3D%3D&refcode=em_220521_saveroe_rsns&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=d4cbe32d-21d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=em_220521_saveroe_rsns&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNiZTMyZC0yMWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oPvH4HM3Zc7c0L_h50QEzvNt2N1syWHh7q2t6-FQrA=&emci=91d68f27-73d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=d4cbe32d-21d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=17998091)**

---
Patty’s opponent co-sponsored an extreme bill that would force survivors of rape and incest to carry their abuser’s child to term.
His extreme plan would prevent people with ectopic pregnancies and other medical emergencies from accessing _life-saving_ care.
**To him, this agenda is more important than the health – and the beliefs – of our _own neighbors._**
We need to make sure _all_ Americans have the right to make their own health care decisions. **[Patty Pansing Brooks knows that the only way to guarantee this right is to demand Congress codify _Roe v. Wade_ before it’s too late.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594051/346614432/-363486735?contactdata=dr27bk4yPpfM%2FYAp%2B%2BgZJaKFZ70yBHG%2BKSXTWr4AEI%2BzBau7usNm%2B0PKnA8wChmA8WOq6aHtMIR8FbWuiOhSqptGBTLE5dHlpmA0FNE5EY4DKVHO1F3p7h10g64OTz%2BJ0sbcUG%2BAk21xHVTWC9jZrw%3D%3D&refcode=em_220521_saveroe_rsns&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=d4cbe32d-21d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=em_220521_saveroe_rsns&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNiZTMyZC0yMWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oPvH4HM3Zc7c0L_h50QEzvNt2N1syWHh7q2t6-FQrA=&emci=91d68f27-73d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=d4cbe32d-21d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=17998091)**

subject: Today is the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Make sure you come out and VOTE today for Jeanine Lawson to be our next representative in Congress! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/01e441edbf7c/make-a-plan-to-vote-this-saturday-5395495?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b52bf16e1a&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

The Republican Primary Election is TODAY, May 21st from 9am-4pm.

Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE.

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=831333aa10&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=32ded86b85&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

[Please also consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4f5277e107&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4b76d578f3&e=fc83fb200d)[to support our campaign in the final days and get us across the finish line!.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=112bb18657&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=73285210ef&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=312cf639b9&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=caaffe274f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b7c4fb79da&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=bee440a9af&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I appreciate your support, and I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

clean_body: This opportunity is just for you: 300% | Friend, Vernon just mentioned you as someone who should see this: Vernon Jones is running in a crowded race for GA-10’s Congressional seat, which means every single fundraising goal is more important than the last. We just ran all the numbers from the last few days, and we have a big opportunity to blow away our goal before the Primary Election on May 24th. In order to send this message, we’ve decided to TRIPLE all donations FROM NOW UNTIL MIDNIGHT!We are going to WIN GA-10 and we need to get everybody on board! | We need to elect Vernon Jones if we have any chance of flipping the House to Republican control! Do you know what’s at stake? Our economic and personal freedoms make our country the greatest nation in the history of the world. This is the moment we will reflect on in the months to come. Will you step up and know you made the right choice by doing everything you can to keep the Radical Left from keeping control? And now, your donation will mean more than ever before. Anything you donate from now until midnight will continue to be 300% MATCHED! 3X THE IMPACT UNTIL MIDNIGHT...take advantage of this opportunity before time runs out! Sincerely, Jack Livingston Campaign Manager Team Jones Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump. Vernon Jones is the only Trump-endorsed candidate in his race. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vernon for Congress Copyright © 2022 Vernon Jones for Congress, All rights reserved.

The biggest thing about running in a battleground district like Brad’s is that you have to talk to the voters. You need your boots on the ground, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and looking people in the eye, telling them why Brad has their back with reproductive rights, democracy, healthcare, broadband, and support for small businesses.

Your support means the world to us. Despite everything we’ve been through since January 6, and frankly, long before that, **there is nothing we cannot overcome together**.

But that requires building out a boots-on-the-ground team to knock doors to talk about why Brad is the best candidate to protect our great American democracy. **[Can you chip in $10 to help us raise another $675 for this final 24-hour deadline? Anything helps. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594665/346616749/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.21_b1_faf2-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.21_b1_faf2-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzI1YjM0OC0yM2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRuPvJFaoj2A26IadrMbVPwWEGCuHuj4U8-D8zxBwUs=)**

clean_body: And that costs money. | = Hi there, It’s Day Two of our Field Action Fund – we’ve still got to raise $675 by midnight tomorrow. We can DO this, but we need you to be a part of our grassroots army to help us get there! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = The biggest thing about running in a battleground district like Brad’s is that you have to talk to the voters. You need your boots on the ground, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and looking people in the eye, telling them why Brad has their back with reproductive rights, democracy, healthcare, broadband, and support for small businesses. Your support means the world to us. Despite everything we’ve been through since January 6, and frankly, long before that, there is nothing we cannot overcome together. But that requires building out a boots-on-the-ground team to knock doors to talk about why Brad is the best candidate to protect our great American democracy. = Thank you so much, Field Action Fund via Team Pfaff | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Jon Kaiman
subject: Let's Keep NY-03 Blue This November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSCgP4a6AOTtzyoGE_ztqa-Sltk-9LH5O-YyOltjyX4=/9rOrHgsrgZ0V_sHT37ikdwmfrbUiQgR8JUyesSLuTvc=)
Peter,
Yesterday, the New York State Supreme Court approved the final proposed congressional lines. I am encouraged by these new maps. Our campaign to represent New York's 3rd Congressional District continues to move full speed ahead and there are many ways to get involved.
[Click here to make a contribution to my campaign and help keep NY-03 blue](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSCgP4a6AOTtzyoGE_ztqa-Sltk-9LH5O-YyOltjyX4=/6tPDbIzoGZuP72Gsv7vfcVd9-6nomV0ewVH4VwMg5V4=?refcode=website-).
[Click here to volunteer or apply for our intern mentorship program](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSCgP4a6AOTtzyoGE_ztqa-Sltk-9LH5O-YyOltjyX4=/IzyqcSDSphZiVPf6wT-F4EZcWLa6DQplT5UYjy_gres=).
During my term as North Hempstead Town Supervisor I implemented Project Independence and the 311 Call Center. I have spearheaded Superstorm Sandy recovery on Long Island, and I fought to ensure services were delivered directly to those effected. As your representative in Congress, I will continue to prioritize government reform and deliver resources directly to the people of Long Island and Queens. I will fight for you.
With so much at stake, our region needs a fighter who will never stop working on behalf of our communities. I alone have the record of delivering results for the residents of this district.
I am asking for your support. Together, we will keep NY-03 blue this November.
Best,
Jon Kaiman

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
---
Jon Kaiman for Congress
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States

body:

body:
It’s important now more than ever to elect individuals who will champion voting rights for all — especially when major election decisions are made at the state level.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594851/346618058/1793776944?refcode=em_20220520_f_f_endorse_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNhNThkMS0yNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovdl_CBBIU72wtLfLllnFtSOn-bLYqMVPUcyp0qGvlc=&emci=a6951fcb-26d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=1d3a58d1-26d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1037277)

| | The Fair Fight Team strongly believes in making elections free and fair for all eligible voters — and so much of that work comes from those we choose to serve our states and our communities. That’s why today we wanted to share the incredible candidates we have endorsed ahead of the Georgia primary next week: **Stacey Abrams for Governor, Bee Nguyen for Secretary of State,** and**Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate.** [_**Can you split a $20 donation right now between Stacey Abrams, Bee Nguyen, Reverend Raphael Warnock, and Fair Fight ahead of the May 24th primary? Your contribution powers our work to ensure free and fair elections and supports pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594852/346618059/-1099988845?refcode=em_20220520_f_f_endorse_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNhNThkMS0yNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovdl_CBBIU72wtLfLllnFtSOn-bLYqMVPUcyp0qGvlc=) **Stacey Abrams** is the founder of Fair Fight and a fearless leader in the mission to combat voter suppression. As governor, she will bring issues of election access and integrity to the forefront. We cannot wait to celebrate her victory and send her to the Governor’s Mansion this November. **Bee Nguyen** , founder of a non-profit organization to support and educate girls in underserved communities, is committed to solving economic disparities. She will be a fierce champion for free and secure elections as Secretary of State. During the 2021 election runoff, voters showed up to the polls in record numbers to support **Reverend Raphael Warnock** and elect him to the Senate — a testament to the power voters hold when they are empowered and enfranchised. We need Senator Warnock to stay in Washington to continue serving Georgia and working towards an equitable future for all Americans. It’s important now more than ever to elect individuals who will champion voting rights for all — especially because election decisions are made at the state level. We deserve elected officials who honor election integrity, security, and accessibility — and we have the power to vote the adversaries out. There’s a lot on the line ahead of this year’s election cycle — and our team, along with our endorsed candidates, would greatly appreciate your support. [_**If you are able to, please split a $20 contribution between Fair Fight and these three endorsed candidates today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594853/346618060/-1099988845?refcode=em_20220520_f_f_endorse_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNhNThkMS0yNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovdl_CBBIU72wtLfLllnFtSOn-bLYqMVPUcyp0qGvlc=) Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594854/346618061/-1099988845?refcode=em_20220520_f_f_endorse_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNhNThkMS0yNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ovdl_CBBIU72wtLfLllnFtSOn-bLYqMVPUcyp0qGvlc=)

name: Tom Perez HQ
subject: BREAKING: Washington Post endorses Tom Perez!
body:
This is a big, big deal, Peter.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45594858/346618175/-530921513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjY3ZDEyNy0yN2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmV-zHTybVaNK20N8-rH1fUKzd1eW25-16CoEZxZbsM=&emci=7de757d0-13d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=4667d127-27d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) This morning, the Washington Post endorsed Tom Perez in the Governor’s race. This is a big, big deal, Peter. And the Post’s endorsement persuasively makes the case for why Tom is the best choice to be the next Democratic Governor of Maryland: _“The point is not that Mr. Perez, 60, the son of Dominican immigrants, has held a long list of big jobs; it’s that in all of them he can point to tangible, important achievements. When he says he belongs to the 'GSD'— Get Stuff Done — wing of his party, none of his Democratic rivals bother to argue. [] He thinks taxpayers should pay for abortions. He doesn’t defend the Supreme Court. He isn’t for life, he isn’t for women, he isn’t for New Jersey. Tom Kean is only in this for himself and can’t be trusted to do what’s right in Washington. IF YOU THINK TOM KEAN = A BIG MISTAKE FOR NEW JERSEY, CHIP IN! A4604 [] When Kean had the chance to support conservative Supreme Court justices, he REFUSED TO VOTE. I opposed President Bush's veto of the federal stem cell legislation.” When Kean could have stood up in opposition to Roe v. Wade, he kept his mouth shut and REFUSED TO VOTE. name: Team Benson
subject: Violent threats against election workers must stop!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

We know there's no low Donald Trump and his Big Lie allies won't stoop to. On Thursday, in an interview with NBC Nightly News, Jocelyn revealed she’d been told that President Trump personally called for her arrest and execution because she wouldn’t overturn Michigan’s 2020 election results.

Watch the full interview below. [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2022-election/michigan-election-chief-trump-suggested-arrested-treason-executed-rcna29406]

From Jocelyn to local election volunteers, anyone who is a part of election administration is at risk of horrific threats and harassment just for doing their job with integrity. The threats and harassment of election officials is part of the national coordinated attack on our democracy that seeks to install election deniers into positions where they can make it harder to vote and easier to overturn the results of a future election if their preferred candidate doesn’t win. And the threats come all the way from the top, starting with the authoritarian attempts of the former president.
We all need to work together, across party lines, to ensure election officials are protected. Election officials must be allowed to do their jobs, free of threats from everyone - including the former president of the United States. That’s why Jocelyn has made $8 million available in grants to local clerks in Michigan to ensure the security of our elections. And it’s why she has asked state lawmakers to approve increased penalties for any individual who threatens, doxes, or harasses election workers.

If we let Trump and his network of conspiracy theorists threaten election officials without consequence, our entire democracy could fall.
Add your name below if you agree that the Michigan legislature must act now and protect Michigan election workers.

Donate>> https://secure.ngpvan.com/SRGuutFMr02S-yyXLs_GPA2

-Team Benson

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: Traitors Support Russia
body:
My father is rolling in his grave. Let's turn this story around.
| | Dear Peter,

My father worked in Army Intelligence during the Cuban Missile Crisis and Cold War. He told me Russia will consistently undermine our nation; that Russia will foment distrust within our government and initiate misinformation to divide our nation.
My father taught me the importance of our constitution and our democracy and how hard we must work to protect it. That is exactly what I am prepared to do. I do not want to lose my country to these extremists who want an authoritarian regime. I will fight to protect our democracy. My father pledged his life for our country, and I am doing the same. Please help my campaign today and help me in this fight to defeat David Schweikert and fight to protect our country from Russia's assault. Traitors like General Flynn, Tucker Carlson, Newt Gingrinch, Rand Paul, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and many other far-rightwing GOP showing support for Putin is a disgrace. And David Schweikert hasn't said one word condemning their dangerous comments. He is so weak and falls right in line with the GOP extremists.
I refuse to let him continue representing us. Say you're with me in this fight.

clean_body: My father is rolling in his grave. Let's turn this story around. | | Dear Peter, My father worked in Army Intelligence during the Cuban Missile Crisis and Cold War. He told me Russia will consistently undermine our nation; that Russia will foment distrust within our government and initiate misinformation to divide our nation. My father taught me the importance of our constitution and our democracy and how hard we must work to protect it. That is exactly what I am prepared to do. I do not want to lose my country to these extremists who want an authoritarian regime. I will fight to protect our democracy. My father pledged his life for our country, and I am doing the same. Please help my campaign today and help me in this fight to defeat David Schweikert and fight to protect our country from Russia's assault. Traitors like General Flynn, Tucker Carlson, Newt Gingrinch, Rand Paul, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and many other far-rightwing GOP showing support for Putin is a disgrace. And David Schweikert hasn't said one word condemning their dangerous comments. He is so weak and falls right in line with the GOP extremists. I refuse to let him continue representing us. Say you're with me in this fight. | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | | | | | | | | | | == | == | == | | PO BOX 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327, United States of America | | or | |

name: Fairness Project
subject: the baby formula shortage is no accident.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Too often, caretakers in America are an afterthought in our policy. Our ballot measures put them front and center. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45595592/346621622/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzQ4NzgyOS0yOGQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y4sWJB4N0ieJIo8ge09KwjE5Z7Hq8gyNZQrOBWFQ7n8=&emci=4d53142d-80d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=c3487829-28d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=561582) | **Team, the baby formula shortage is not an accident.** _**This is what happens**_ when an economy is built around lining the pockets of the wealthy elite instead of supporting workers and their families.**_This is what happens_** when extremist legislators prioritize partisan agendas over common sense policy, like bringing higher wages and paid leave to Americans. **_This is what happens_ when our economy is designed to work _against_ mothers and caretakers, and not for them.** **With direct democracy and the power of ballot measures, we’re building an economy that works _for_ mothers**. And that means supporting every aspect of their lives, from their reproductive autonomy, to their job security, to their ability to access and afford child care. name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Make Your Voice Heard - Join the Discussion
body:
NJ SPECIAL EDUCATION ROUNDTABLE - ONLINE
| | | |
---
Make Your Voice Heard!

Join the Discussion ONLINE with NJ Special Education Policy Leaders... we need REPUBLICAN VOICES HEARD!

The START Engaging Parents of Students with Disabilities project at SPAN Parent Advocacy Network is pleased to invite you to join us as we welcome NJ State Senator Vin Gopal, chairperson of the Senate Education Committee and SPAN Policy Director Peg Kinsell to our upcoming State-wide Roundtable. Senator Gopal will share his experience as a policymaker and what guides him in making them. Ms. Kinsell will speak about how parents can influence the legislation that affects children with disabilities and their families.

Understanding policy advocacy will not only make you a better advocate for your own child but can lead to changes in systems for the greater good. You do not want to miss this event!

When?

Monday, May 23, 2022
7:00 - 8:30 p.m.
AND/OR
Wednesday, May 25, 2022
10:00 - 11:30 a.m.

REGISTER HERE:

https://roundtable-spring2022.eventbrite.com

Zoom link will be provided after registration

If you have a question for the Senator, please submit it here:

https://forms.gle/hrhSk1o61nbREH7C8
---
---
| | | | | | | Gloucester County GOP | PO Box 503, Woodbury, NJ 08096

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Patriot, I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My primary election is in 2 days, early votes have already been cast, and time is running out.

We're close to pulling off something great here in Georgia, but we're being significantly outspent by our Democrat opponent who has been advertising heavily for months.

_**[If you have anything to spare- anything at all - I'm asking that you step up today to help us close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60433329:J41pyfoNE:m:1:3299561967:1F19678A60468D2C7594291E853CFB35:r "If you have anything to spare –
anything at all – I’m asking that you step up today to help us close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [Contribute Now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60433329:J41pyfoNE:m:1:3299561967:1F19678A60468D2C7594291E853CFB35:r "Contribute
Now")
---

Republicans only need to pick up one seat to take back the Senate, and our race in Georgia is that seat.

Our primary on Tuesday will set the tone and momentum for the rest of 2022, but the clock is ticking. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just three dollars - every penny counts.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60433329:J41pyfoNE:m:1:3299561967:1F19678A60468D2C7594291E853CFB35:r "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s
just three dollars – every penny counts.")**_

_**[Winning the primary election is the first step to defeating Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and flipping the Senate in November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60433329:J41pyfoNE:m:1:3299561967:1F19678A60468D2C7594291E853CFB35:r "Winning the primary election is
the first step to defeating Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and flipping the Senate in November. ")**_

Patriot, I know we can win. We just need your help.

_**[Can we count on you to pitch in right away to help us win in just 2 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60433329:J41pyfoNE:m:1:3299561967:1F19678A60468D2C7594291E853CFB35:r "Can we
count on you to pitch in right away to help us win in just 2 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Here’s what we can do to cut crime
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/jxncrime-8132420?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

JXN Fest just got cancelled. The three day event would have seen some top international artists perform in our state capital.

It is not 100 percent clear why the event got pulled, but ‘security’ has been cited as a factor.

Maybe you weren’t planning on attending the event? You should still be concerned. To me this shows how uncontrolled crime impacts everyone, even those not directly involved.

**When the criminal justice system is dysfunctional, civic society frays.** When there are shoot-outs at Mudbug Festivals, other events get cancelled. The bad drives out the good.

**As Mississippi’s conservative think tank, we published an action plan to combat crime this week.** You can download your copy here:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=dfd86a77a0&e=5703353baa)
---
| The good news is that the Governor, Lieutenant Governor and Speaker are taking action. I have also been very encouraged to hear about the new Hinds County DA.

**To me the single most important action taken so far is to have the Supreme Court appoint judges to clear the court backlog in Jackson. **

The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is located in downtown Jackson. This city is our home.

Since we started to push for these five key reforms, I have been overwhelmed by the response and encouragement. Over 85,000 folks now get our weekly newsletter, and many of you feel passionately about this issue. We do, too.

I will continue to keep you updated as we push for change. There is nothing inevitable about higher crime!

---
| |
---
Have a great weekend!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e9e2460381) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e9e2460381).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Lombardo for Governor
subject: Early voting starts next week!
body:
After months of hard work from staff and volunteers, a strong showing of support from THOUSANDS of patriots like you, and even a personal endorsement from President Trump, we finally get our first chance to cast a ballot for Sheriff Joe...

| Peter,
After months of hard work from staff and volunteers, a strong showing of support from THOUSANDS of patriots like you, and even a personal endorsement from President Trump, we finally get our first chance to cast a ballot for Sheriff Joe...
Early voting for the Primary Elections in Nevada starts NEXT WEEK on Saturday May 28th!
Start making your plan right now to vote for a proven, trusted leader who has been keeping our state safe for decades.
