name: Heidi Johnson-Young, Team Mia
subject: How are we talking to voters?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
We’re building momentum. As we’ve traveled across the state over the past few weeks, we’ve witnessed the support for this campaign surging from Georgetown to Aiken, Greenville to Bluffton, and Darlington to Orangeburg. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWatNHOClVFtVp9bRTFiE7Vw6Ve1L8mQ09HpsfYA7LnEhmSEOg2IecNhBQccZZCPFR1pYO9T9F2q62LvbZHEhhxPrJIY4M5D3-pq4T4hxLf3y7FGIbiADKJ9N7_umvb61pp-d4I7ZmHGyaqMJWbW5Kk3BDo3H46Y3cNz4tTIPjUhDNw48Wb3TcZM2bYShPuZbtIcFlYhSyY5bqBtUYFG8ttaJoDFXUzCszT8w_joM_7iEdjRpCOCyJP2Fhh3Bv32NDlH5Bq25-zCylfDH1i4aS79Am80CcuYpd_Y5EJb3rGcqgyekSg7EgT3HlKb_ZB20/3m8/5RIFQo5PSL6vDavk2WEPdw/h0/eyEjcUr6iDLTCLhSpfP5VDgDDOhDlZYNTYboOVNlQqU)
---
, With our June 14th primary less than a month away, we're in the final stretch here. Now more than ever, it's crucial that we spend this month reaching as many voters as possible and connecting with people where they are. We've seen first hand that when we share our message with the people of South Carolina, they are supportive. That's why our digital campaign has been so effective. We're able to communicate with voters who we otherwise would not be able to reach and spread the word about Mia's campaign.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWatNHOClVFtVp9bRTFiE7Vw6Ve1L8mQ09HpsfYA7LnEhmSEOg2IecNhBQccZZCPH-Dy10JMHo8firrIH6RAN1gEyid-Sy4XOLhf7aEdhlPDpwddizSo3c9h7Jj-0CiqnfHMZufM-Q0HzaIwEfg0l17h6uIwExqlAWiSaScVU7DTrCgye-MR_WOWCS_5ct77yvHAvWoL4N64AtGpBXgY3G1MlPkrkQp6VLGxAJDXkloQU0egcoDybW5MRJ2EM-V6yIvwyB7Bud-wJeErbzE9IEK28wQXbv0_3URrBi9SzbduwcuOtYqFrsBl1Lk-Q-LVY/3m8/5RIFQo5PSL6vDavk2WEPdw/h1/7jk6NMe4p0MNbBUIw2uPrQnh7P5sCecbJS-PvF1Ug5M)
---
We're building momentum. As we've traveled across the state over the past few weeks, we've witnessed the support for this campaign surging from Georgetown to Aiken, Greenville to Bluffton, and Darlington to Orangeburg. So we've set an ambitious goal for the last leg of this race. We need your help to close the gap on our paid communications plan before we place our buy. With less than a month left to reach voters, we can't go silent now. At this point, we need to raise $15,000 before Sunday at midnight or cut some of our critical digital communications campaigns. [Can I count on you to help us reach our goal?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWatNHOClVFtVp9bRTFiE7Vw6Ve1L8mQ09HpsfYA7LnEhmSEOg2IecNhBQccZZCPG60dHIXntNMdAxGcGai5QWUhBjtw_W7R8hi3s0OUSvv4A00PJZMwM0t842ihY0sseDbYSsJlmt_iNfEs836255A1-GmC3lGm7wSsJeqvvazZZbp7yGfY93872UkY4kptsbJt_iInmIu2C29wIWSc9gTA1VHXQ4Ip_U8LarA7n-Twxth_5LS-JXcoa45FML5WHxOqqd6b_03CIj2z2zxRRb5VNgarAhk7d9lR1j2Pe24QT9DUmzCOh8_CHSRM2or9Y/3m8/5RIFQo5PSL6vDavk2WEPdw/h2/DN0a-d0O5Ij2joWqQJQ4ppfycqMKeRVp55gAw7hRZdk) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: We’re building momentum. As we’ve traveled across the state over the past few weeks, we’ve witnessed the support for this campaign surging from Georgetown to Aiken, Greenville to Bluffton, and Darlington to Orangeburg. | | , With our June 14th primary less than a month away, we're in the final stretch here. Now more than ever, it's crucial that we spend this month reaching as many voters as possible and connecting with people where they are. We've seen first hand that when we share our message with the people of South Carolina, they are supportive. That's why our digital campaign has been so effective. We're able to communicate with voters who we otherwise would not be able to reach and spread the word about Mia's campaign. | We're building momentum. As we've traveled across the state over the past few weeks, we've witnessed the support for this campaign surging from Georgetown to Aiken, Greenville to Bluffton, and Darlington to Orangeburg. So we've set an ambitious goal for the last leg of this race. We need your help to close the gap on our paid communications plan before we place our buy. With less than a month left to reach voters, we can't go silent now. At this point, we need to raise $15,000 before Sunday at midnight or cut some of our critical digital communications campaigns. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: You know we wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important. Grassroots contributions from folks like you are what make our voter outreach possible. With gratitude, Heidi Mia for SC About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We have tough news. We fell $3,525 short of our goal to cover the cost of our campaign's yard signs. SIX Republicans are targeting our Democrat Dr. Raul Ruiz House seat and are already spreading the word about their campaigns. So we can’t fall short. We must make sure every voter in Coachella valley knows Dr. Ruiz’s good name to keep our House majority blue! [If just [50] Democrats reading this email chip in $5...we’ll have the funds we need to pay for our yard signs in no time! But we only have until MIDNIGHT.]() | | | | | | | Dr. Ruiz is standing up to Trump and his cronies every single day in Congress by fighting for what really matters: • Access to health care – including the right to safe abortions • Immigration rights • Social Security and Medicare But in such a consequential election year, Dr. Ruiz can’t win without you. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to make sure Democrats like Dr. Ruiz lose in November so they can take the House Majority. Dr. Ruiz doesn’t have a bank filled with millions...he depends on Democrats like you in Cresco. | | | | | | Thanks so much! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. subject: See what our campaign has been up to [photos]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45596394/346625232/1493062117?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjlkZjc2MS0yY2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0WNBY7kGI-XsR05o-Z4uSOlpHaE-Z9grTcp0CYkzVc=)
Friend,

**We’re officially less than 3 weeks until the June 7th primary** , and it has been a jammed packed month so far out here on the campaign trail.

Our team has been hard at work growing our grassroots support with voters and local organizations from across the district. Thanks to you, we’ve kicked off numerous speaking events, knocked on doors and have been able to share our vision for a CA-40 that works for all of us.

From the beginning, this campaign has been about cutting through the political noise and partisan fighting to work across the aisle and pass legislation that benefits all our families. I’ve spent my entire career helping patients overcome their health challenges and go on to lead richer lives. And now I’m ready to:
* Tackle inflation and the cost of living
* Grow the economy and create good jobs
* Improve roads and infrastructure
* Stand up to extreme politics

Below are some photos from the trail. I hope you enjoy them, and if you have any questions or concerns, feel free to respond to this email directly.

Thanks,

Asif

clean_body: | = Friend, We’re officially less than 3 weeks until the June 7th primary , and it has been a jammed packed month so far out here on the campaign trail. Our team has been hard at work growing our grassroots support with voters and local organizations from across the district. Thanks to you, we’ve kicked off numerous speaking events, knocked on doors and have been able to share our vision for a CA-40 that works for all of us. From the beginning, this campaign has been about cutting through the political noise and partisan fighting to work across the aisle and pass legislation that benefits all our families. I’ve spent my entire career helping patients overcome their health challenges and go on to lead richer lives. And now I’m ready to: Tackle inflation and the cost of living Grow the economy and create good jobs Improve roads and infrastructure Stand up to extreme politics Below are some photos from the trail. I hope you enjoy them, and if you have any questions or concerns, feel free to respond to this email directly. Thanks, Asif | **= = Connecting with neighbors and voters in Tustin, CA = Speaking to Canyon Democrats in Mission Viejo, CA = Joined the OC Fire Authority and environmental activists in Orange to learn more about our community’s preparedness for wildfires and preventative measures we can take to keep families safe. = Kicked off a Saturday of campaigning with the OC Labor Federation. I’m honored to have earned their support. = And of course, made time for my wife and family this past Mother’s Day. Running a grassroots campaign of this size costs a lot of time and money, but is worth it for the families in Orange County. = Thanks for your support! Asif =** | Dr. Asif Mahmood is the Democratic candidate for Congress in California’s 40th District. A Pakistani-American immigrant, Asif moved to America to practice medicine. name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: reflecting on this historic campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm running for U.S. Senate to expand opportunities for working families like mine
| | |
---
I have a rare 15-minute gap in my schedule today, friend. I know it doesn't sound like a lot, but free moments have been few and far between recently.
As I sit here drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I decided I need to tell you a story about why I'm running for U.S. Senate.
When I was a little girl, my family didn't have much. I grew up as one of seven siblings, living in a two-room house in Jacksonville, Florida. I went to segregated schools and worked wherever I could – washing dishes or flipping burgers at McDonald's – to help my family get by.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45596374/346625100/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3249-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM1NzJhYi0yYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvpzpBcGbEyOF0OqibnyhP2suQRkh66DIrmUhn1I0jc=)
My grandma lived just down the street from my family. She grew up in the Jim Crow South, and she couldn't read or write, so she made an "X" for all her signatures. As a kid, I remember sitting at my grandma's kitchen table writing letters to her sister as she told me what to say.
I can't help but think about what my grandma would say if she could see the life I lead now. She never could have imagined that I would grow up to become Orlando's Chief of Police, a congressional representative for my home district and a candidate for the U.S. Senate.
Now, I have a chance to deliver better leadership to the people of Florida – and I promise to fight every day to expand opportunities for families like mine. If you believe in my campaign, will you contribute today?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45596375/346625101/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3249-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM1NzJhYi0yYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvpzpBcGbEyOF0OqibnyhP2suQRkh66DIrmUhn1I0jc=)**
I truly believe that only in America can a little Black girl – the granddaughter of a woman robbed of the chance to learn to read – have such an amazing story of opportunity like mine.
But for too many Americans, my story of opportunity is simply out of reach. I'm running for U.S. Senate to expand opportunities for working families like mine – so that everyone can have a fair chance to reach their own American dream.
My 15 minutes are almost up, so I'll wrap this up with one final thought: This is a historic campaign – and the GOP is trying to stack the cards against me because Marco Rubio and I are neck and neck in the polls. If you believe in this movement to expand opportunities for all Americans, I need you on my side right now.
My finance team told me we need more grassroots donations to win, so I have to ask this: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority?

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45596376/346625102/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3249-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM1NzJhYi0yYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvpzpBcGbEyOF0OqibnyhP2suQRkh66DIrmUhn1I0jc=)**

Thank you for reading my story,

Congresswoman Val Demings
| |

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Thank you for being such an important part of our campaign for U.S. Senate. We’ve already received endorsements from a number of elected officials, community leaders, grassroots activists, and EMILY’s List. I’m grateful to have every single one of them.

**Today, I’m asking for our most important endorsement yet — yours.**

**[Will you add your name and personally endorse my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people just like you to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat, so your endorsement right now would mean a lot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45578702/346566592/-589298804?ms=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=61BL4KGS6tmVPHDuJFxd4slv+JsbjsQz0mKKY+5xvqMX7TAaCnTzG0rRcK+7t79GDwY4KaWYJF9u1wiTF+YMG3tgVpnBtBnbCoOq7Gn0O/og9USmF6GgzOHwNdIjFyHx7W3zf3VFUtqpKr02LI7X8gz6NILShxl7h/1SaYxPKCY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjM3ZTZlZi0wYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT0Aze6cwKs4jj4lIFcVuzzKU79RxRJMEcTfBQ27PH4=&emci=841febe0-f5d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=db37e6ef-0bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659593)**
| [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45578705/346566593/-589298804?ms=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=61BL4KGS6tmVPHDuJFxd4slv+JsbjsQz0mKKY+5xvqMX7TAaCnTzG0rRcK+7t79GDwY4KaWYJF9u1wiTF+YMG3tgVpnBtBnbCoOq7Gn0O/og9USmF6GgzOHwNdIjFyHx7W3zf3VFUtqpKr02LI7X8gz6NILShxl7h/1SaYxPKCY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjM3ZTZlZi0wYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT0Aze6cwKs4jj4lIFcVuzzKU79RxRJMEcTfBQ27PH4=&emci=841febe0-f5d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=db37e6ef-0bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659593)
---

Let me tell you a little bit about why I'm running for U.S. Senate.

I'm a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, and the product of a proud union home. Quite frankly, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson.

Before I first ran for public office, I led a bipartisan grassroots campaign to prevent former Governor Scott Walker from eliminating the State Treasurer’s office — a critical check and balance on our government. We stopped his power grab with 62% of the statewide vote, which is a landslide victory in Wisconsin.

**Then, I ran for the office I worked so hard to save and won my second statewide election by a larger margin than the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — flipping nine Trump counties, including Ron Johnson’s own county.**

As Treasurer, I've focused on finding commonsense solutions for working families. I lifted a GOP gag order on climate change, provided millions of dollars in relief to public schools during the pandemic, and partnered with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million from the American Rescue Plan for people at risk of losing their homes. Most recently, I’ve been working on a bipartisan bill that would create retirement-like savings accounts for every child in Wisconsin.

Look, I didn’t get into public service for fame, money, or power. I got in the fight because too many politicians weren’t lifting a finger to help struggling families and small businesses. Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, so I stepped up.

Now I'm stepping up again to run for U.S. Senate and work to lower everyday costs for families, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, expand affordable childcare — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done.

In the Senate, I’ll continue to be an advocate for working families, but in order to do that, I need to know you’re with me. We are building a campaign strong enough to take on Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat, and it’s only going to be possible with you on our team. So, I'm sincerely asking:

**[Would you consider personally endorsing my campaign for U.S. Senate today? I’m proud of what we're building and you should be, too. That’s why I’m hoping you will add your name and join our broad coalition of grassroots supporters who have already signed up to say they’re with us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45578707/346566596/-589298804?ms=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220520_endors_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=61BL4KGS6tmVPHDuJFxd4slv+JsbjsQz0mKKY+5xvqMX7TAaCnTzG0rRcK+7t79GDwY4KaWYJF9u1wiTF+YMG3tgVpnBtBnbCoOq7Gn0O/og9USmF6GgzOHwNdIjFyHx7W3zf3VFUtqpKr02LI7X8gz6NILShxl7h/1SaYxPKCY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjM3ZTZlZi0wYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT0Aze6cwKs4jj4lIFcVuzzKU79RxRJMEcTfBQ27PH4=&emci=841febe0-f5d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=db37e6ef-0bd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659593)**

---

It may seem small, but please know that simply adding your name to say you support our campaign for the U.S. Senate can make a big difference in this race. Taking on Ron Johnson won’t be easy — we'll need a LOT of people coming together to win.

Thank you in advance for adding your name to our growing list of personal endorsers. It really makes a difference for our campaign.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

clean_body: Thank you for being such an important part of our campaign for U.S. Senate. We’ve already received endorsements from a number of elected officials, community leaders, grassroots activists, and EMILY’s List. I’m grateful to have every single one of them. Today, I’m asking for our most important endorsement yet — yours. | Let me tell you a little bit about why I'm running for U.S. Senate. I'm a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, and the product of a proud union home. Quite frankly, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson. Before I first ran for public office, I led a bipartisan grassroots campaign to prevent former Governor Scott Walker from eliminating the State Treasurer’s office — a critical check and balance on our government. We stopped his power grab with 62% of the statewide vote, which is a landslide victory in Wisconsin. Then, I ran for the office I worked so hard to save and won my second statewide election by a larger margin than the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — flipping nine Trump counties, including Ron Johnson’s own county. As Treasurer, I've focused on finding commonsense solutions for working families. I lifted a GOP gag order on climate change, provided millions of dollars in relief to public schools during the pandemic, and partnered with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million from the American Rescue Plan for people at risk of losing their homes. Most recently, I’ve been working on a bipartisan bill that would create retirement-like savings accounts for every child in Wisconsin. Look, I didn’t get into public service for fame, money, or power. I got in the fight because too many politicians weren’t lifting a finger to help struggling families and small businesses. Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, so I stepped up. Now I'm stepping up again to run for U.S. Senate and work to lower everyday costs for families, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, expand affordable childcare — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done. In the Senate, I’ll continue to be an advocate for working families, but in order to do that, I need to know you’re with me. We are building a campaign strong enough to take on Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat, and it’s only going to be possible with you on our team. So, I'm sincerely asking: It may seem small, but please know that simply adding your name to say you support our campaign for the U.S. Senate can make a big difference in this race. Taking on Ron Johnson won’t be easy — we'll need a LOT of people coming together to win. Thank you in advance for adding your name to our growing list of personal endorsers. It really makes a difference for our campaign. Forward! — Sarah Godlewski Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

Fine. Whatever.

JD, on the other hand? Well, we know who he’s looking out for—his
billionaire buddies, shady campaign donors, and right-wing special
interests.

deal, but I need your help getting there. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13099?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3817%2E3611125%2EJGdPLB ]Can you chip in

subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=166420486f83420a95ee41bedd9af92b&_e=jzMXBO82EgkZU5XGa51497wKSHMfOQ9Py0fL2abh48hg_61gojlblp1BLMMI9y1QTs1XGXbacUIxqjpcg5JtOQ_tps9IjilXx3_i0sID985bBCOoJ8wUtPDrEJz7G_-KmzFGr6EAyRRY51Ony-3rgztEuQQMR-aOWchNYW6bQdLfAa3wtCeM3qUfFemws-bt0C6XssG5g-zSAxYyEGIP2ZhC2oI6QbLMw8yqh8dfuLBwQIu-ZmYgD11-XkCR-YZqwkof_ByInsKeLaVMSG4ketdVjMlwk4F_l7yybh4ehvHPAe8_ed7qijfjqQWLqjpl1M8i9pycwPsw3N_TkrFV1wA7cORIYkJeGoE_niWLTck_Z6viYp73eYJAUvapPWcTAXab1CMo_VLZv5WSbxSZe-hql4vKgteYNxDA6eItK30UzZk_hVMFFDRiTMLmkw-2Yfm7jMgcUxCoHFHuPTqIlA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=166420486f83420a95ee41bedd9af92b&_e=jzMXBO82EgkZU5XGa51497wKSHMfOQ9Py0fL2abh48hg_61gojlblp1BLMMI9y1QTs1XGXbacUIxqjpcg5JtOQ_tps9IjilXx3_i0sID985bBCOoJ8wUtPDrEJz7G_-KmzFGr6EAyRRY51Ony-3rgztEuQQMR-aOWchNYW6bQdLfAa3wtCeM3qUfFemws-bt0C6XssG5g-zSAxYyEGIP2ZhC2oI6QbLMw8yqh8dfuLBwQIu-ZmYgD11-XkCR-YZqkpP7mukaA-wzRrGzHFGKZYs0Y63WijIaruJhs33mn5N1FkMw5AA16Bak7GYTTQcGJ1sbKm-9Lv6TpxGi1LWH2d_SytT-nI2l1X0Gv3h2nZ8lchJttl7S1QKOg-HQsIVp0ob9hJ-hDFtavaRaVL5QgjIT-WDTKBdsrJSuIHp0wl5PgAYRRk8rh-_b6RI5-9VT8sM1zrkNvFWAU4btdN79iQ%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=166420486f83420a95ee41bedd9af92b&_e=jzMXBO82EgkZU5XGa51497wKSHMfOQ9Py0fL2abh48hg_61gojlblp1BLMMI9y1QTs1XGXbacUIxqjpcg5JtOQ_tps9IjilXx3_i0sID985bBCOoJ8wUtPDrEJz7G_-KmzFGr6EAyRRY51Ony-3rgztEuQQMR-aOWchNYW6bQdLfAa3wtCeM3qUfFemws-bt0C6XssG5g-zSAxYyEGIP2ZhC2oI6QbLMw8yqh8dfuLBwQIu-ZmYgD11-XkCR-YZqFfUG5cQUlx3AyMIKsFgXZY48N3syzfBV5OghzFhTpZjI6ajxpVbCTtnmT-QsAJnwCanGBHubB3581YS0tkTdz9Se-UwmrR03LvLAuwkDbvjuJkeWCzILpmvltOGv_SaCJiJhgLpmCGGGdsXCO6KEy7URGZrYDLHxExWO7tlL2YYnDQjPn2wWJoR7HgGAFWG7L-iYB9aXb3uOGtXRSx4KrA%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Why this private equity loophole still exists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Kyrsten Sinema would rather block bipartisan popular legislation than piss off her millionaire donors. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_21pt5JBxBwJDLCTD0x0PQxndyYN-5Y41_JvTHF2EsgE7KRm32hHg_uiQLACA-urDdsxqNBPcLGyk9nHBNIKEXFJ-svi-hb0PphzM6aaE7ds5LBRWO2k72IuGQirkoYLysztwx8hh_9D0tbUPsXGfMu_xcc3EGkN1AnmeBIQikE4upYLNxJegCSGUF4RctW80_2k1eeG4g0jvkHp0gswnX/3m8/2XFKUkJsRFSPoqKQUKL7uw/h0/twRmwd-1KQnR9k8hO_WHc34s7ApMaP15Jxu9PkNWqEE)
Peter, The carried interest loophole cuts billionaires’ tax rate almost _in half_ — and only serves to make the rich even richer. That’s why President Biden, many Democrats, and even a handful of Republicans have proposed eliminating it. In fact, it’s hard to find a policy more popular with voters across the political spectrum than closing tax loopholes for billionaires. So why does the carried interest loophole still exist? **One reason: Kyrsten Sinema.** **_[We’ll explain more, but first, can you rush a donation of $5 to help us build a strong movement that can take on Sinema’s obstructionism and oust her from Congress?](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7iwjJdZUvTx6joSZcAYUUULrohUSpe_8yR3CAc2H8atAT1HziJYYzgXjRUnkm4NRISFOcOnC23Z8Wdbc6FP9wVTjjjFEY2iqllJlBTcaWjBYJm2t-Ga9K950WV8JsarF05XpnJ2DdEQcwm4kEMExXxwatgv-nsgu-RCC5s134010x8H8E7Uak63NwvLmwd3xpVphfBSXBmorZF2t9udc0DCASG3B5W5QMyK18-D61NbB9AfdmkKvvWBzMtd_bm9ZrWtoIBm3oLBkcCWJud3TiRl_ygSHqymhKfFktAIHYBd_VqK_t3eoSdpxor5DkrC_cBPUzIIR9Hv5HiFo-2cXsw/3m8/2XFKUkJsRFSPoqKQUKL7uw/h1/e4tiZnP8CEu1JT0yt1dsto5ahF1lK6R0APG2ojCylx8)_****__** **__** **[Contribute $5](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7iwjJdZUvTx6joSZcAYUUdgJPi6dYHLPPN-6TDqxo8_11HiqkN6hOw1701kvbuiHn6Xo4vTOpByx8-JjnuRHZH2rc1RJSgz7LA4xXr4SifjlxTs3FwdJZ7BdkWC84BbCpqjOsFKz8pyuLJ2e-PRg6ClwTyCwN_zIEQK8xrTXto1xGX5E4JXGqr2DAmAijoWbJwtBt4Ev4E8aTeTJ2nnPdE23-f6cccpquQYZ9qTuqDRe1Ay63zgmnX-eTSJnoi9ptw6sT0gMwBEuylbW-bLO5fm1OL4STic6Mgh-9AnRLT7FPGRsTSbiRDnwuIhAq-z78zRkYOalMmuCJRRoOqBxXg/3m8/2XFKUkJsRFSPoqKQUKL7uw/h2/0NsOQDOoiUV8xckmX6tKHy23d-KgBySTlQRT6X4eLlU)** Just look at this quote from _Mother Jones_ , Peter:
> “ _Kyrsten Sinema said she would do nothing at all on carried interest, so we’re just stuck on that,” one Democratic staffer told me._
> _The Arizona senator,_**_who took a paid internship during the pandemic at a winery owned by a private equity mogul_** _and Democratic donor, drew a hard line on ending the tax break in negotiations with the White House and Senate colleagues. In the face of Sinema’s opposition, language that would close the loophole was quietly removed.”_
It’s clear where Sinema’s true interests lie — and it’s not with passing popular policy or with the constituents who trusted her and elected her. She only cares about her ultra-wealthy donors who line her pockets. **_[Please donate $5 to help us send Kyrsten Sinema a message: We see right through you. We know you’re not a real Democrat and we’re going to fire you.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7iwjJdZUvTx6joSZcAYUUULrohUSpe_8yR3CAc2H8au5ephYC9XbReYjikH0o5i19M5aF6mUrlGBy2X8A9348Kk6KAFVzVSkjVRkSUU28n8CmgQEY3efMXpmDxE2j5XZSkVw-cKgfwFwBLhVVS27H-gJJ7MuCRfykkoKTqne3qjA3QimgqOqqlkts4iZHqim1yhYGqkVlOnrAzWt0vD_kQGLVBauE0UPVP1Dd8kaDc7sngt_m2kOn5nefFsgP9jRgM3B2c5RH4wK_Vz9QSSKr1GdZc_7wNcyM527dlxZGVbDSFNOpK8PsiEweJyu94a687bP4qIJAIg2Ow5x12WYFg/3m8/2XFKUkJsRFSPoqKQUKL7uw/h3/epEqwWJHXReO4SMJ6eq1RhNRnc7nPogLdog0HUP8L28)_** Thank you for your support, Primary Sinema Project

sorry to email on a saturday (yes, i’m working!) – i’m looking ahead to the end of may and we’re not where i’d like to be with respect to the ndrc’s end-of-month goal. we have _way_ too much to do to fall short this month. so i thought i’d reach out to my favorite grassroots team!

image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93512/images/Blue%20and%20Red%20Campaign%20Yard%20Signs.jpg]
Hi Friend,
I hope you are having a great weekend, I just wanted to reach out to say thank you for helping my campaign, we have come so far since October! Because of you, we have built a winning coalition to deliver a better future for all of us.
We have a long road ahead of us, but I’m confident that as we continue to grow our grassroots team, we will have what it takes to defeat James Lankford in November. It’s up to us to hold our representatives accountable in this historic moment and must believe that change is possible in Oklahoma!
Thank you again for your support. Together, we can uphold our shared values for all Oklahomans and our country.
I hope you stay in touch with our campaign on social media and follow me along the trail, if you haven’t already.
https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/ [https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/] https://twitter.com/madisonhornok [https://twitter.com/madisonhornok] https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok [https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok] https://www.linkedin.com/madison-horn-a16a9567/ [https://www.linkedin.com/madison-horn-a16a9567/]

Madison Horn

name: Katie Arrington
subject: Only a few weeks to go Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)
---
| | |

Peter,
My name is Katie Arrington, and I'm a Trump-endorsed, America First warrior who's fighting to Drain the Swamp by:
**FIRING "The Liz Cheney of the South" - "Nasty" Nancy Mace!** | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)
---
But with only a few weeks to go in this neck-and-neck race, my RINO opponent has a major fundraising advantage.

That's why I'm reaching out to you, as a fellow, freedom-loving patriot, to urge you to [generously support my campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r).

My June 14th primary election is also the birthday of Donald J. Trump.

**[So, will you join me in giving President Trump the perfect present by helping me FIRE Swamp Creature Nancy Mace?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)**

_[Your donation will be used to help pay for my major advertising campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r) that's crucial to spreading my conservative message to the voters._
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)
---
I know you agree that the American people deserve a true conservative fighter in Congress, **NOT a Trump-bashing "turncoat" like Nancy Mace.**

That's why, as an America First warrior, I promise you that I'll fight to clean house in the DC Swamp, starting with:
* **Firing Fauci** ,

* **Abolishing the CRT-infested Department of Education** , AND

* **Opening Hunter Biden 's laptop!**

But thanks to her wealthy DC Establishment pals, "Nasty" Nancy holds a three-to-one fundraising advantage over me.

The bad news for her is that I punch well above my weight.

So, I don't need to match "Nasty" Nancy dollar-for-dollar, but [I do need your help to close the gap](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r).

**[That's why I'm counting on you to join President Trump in supporting my campaign to FIRE Nancy Mace by making your best gift right away!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)**

_[Remember, your gift will be help cover the cost of my ad campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r) that's crucial to reaching voters with my conservative message before June 14th._
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432579:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)
---
Thank you in advance for your generous support!

May God bless you, and God bless the United States of America,

Katie Arrington
Candidate for Congress

| | | [Help Me Fire Establishment
RINO "Nasty" Nancy Mace!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432580:Jw8jCfokN:m:1:3317145305:3DC4E1FABC4957D9922E1BB1915F5732:r)
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3o55etditlm5f49hbo1l2d124oesak6uf0fao98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo7athnc5oj6ohjekp68s3jc5qn7d356orj0plgs6r76p30m6qb9cr1c3gn9p776v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj31d5lmdjrcoj66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj68pb3c1h61oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdkuimv5m6u2k5aq6vqi3dl4bqt02akmip03vemg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim6o32c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrss54e030hvueufkh1gi93e7bmm1rj353p1oh6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim6o32c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj0htu7ano21lla5ou5n7nlpfbpvqjcsrarnsk0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim6o32c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

* * *
**_September 18, 2016 -- 7:24 PM_**
**Clinton Lawyer:** _Jim \- It’s Michael Sussmann. I have something time-sensitive (and sensitive) I need to discuss. Do you have availability for a short meeting tomorrow? I’m coming on my own - not on behalf of a client or company - want to help the Bureau. Thanks._
**FBI Agent:** _Ok. I will find a time. What might work for you?_
**Clinton Lawyer:** _Anytime but lunchtime - you name it._
**FBI Agent:** _200pm at my office? Do you have a badge or do you need help getting into the building?_
**Clinton Lawyer:** _I have a badge. Please remind me of your room #?_
**FBI Agent:**_7427_
* * *
According to John Durham, that's the meeting when:
\-- He lied to the FBI
\-- He failed to mention he worked for the Clintons
\-- He smeared President Trump's good name
\-- He helped set in motion the Russia Hoax
We need every last detail about that meeting AND the fraudulent Russia Hoax. It’s time to double down and demand that the American People can see John Durham’s FULL and UNREDACTED report.

subject: Are you going to let the RINOs win?
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011-BN2wRORWNo7wRWHzbqzvJIAcNtkOIvxNmLfU1mizTqUWlXegdwSDxkx7X7AZvQ3DtXVbcHIb854GN6SN0uzurQNagIEdmmQej_AWz3aTDbsxW9TKjD5tqMEbfHpZhK_PA-RjoZrnSZ1Jzc_S5CsL3pa6I-rk5uQrFUptfKAndNeq6cbekq2HQTa14C5sw2WrC5k7lZzHARCrhmx9SGCi-vXUV8K1Q6jYUpphmk6JLj4ZoRzS3ZQg==&c=GmKFNHSVKaDxikI94xV5WVs_OsjGQMQNLyZDq5yZn-Rb3iJuWxQxnw==&ch=7r5mjX7PGu8keBsorGRh4crOYctERGQ8X3CYPa13KXhC-UFCfyoj4g==)

| Right now, Fake Republicans in the Swamp are chomping at the bit to make this the time when we go back to sleepwalking our way into Forever Wars, consultants and lobbyists running the show, and ceding every inch of ground to the Woketopians...
Are you going to let them?
[If not, let me know right now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011-BN2wRORWNo7wRWHzbqzvJIAcNtkOIvxNmLfU1mizTqUWlXegdwSDxkx7X7AZvQD0x7ITm3_rjCIKcQQiud35M0Vpiv68hhPSF5egjdEWkfR8n1JmF8VlNQmqbHNUgHbBchACKyq4m41N9Y0S_W1D4PUAXfKL2DUpLydSvvbY9cEQGqkVz26IkJgUZ_vBhv98QpAVPjrQQ2TQagvjIamraHoNZMQZhsuhmtnEbslZtzpAki40VBxpk0PXQCTQvdwa73u9opBd75KaN7iknAVw==&c=GmKFNHSVKaDxikI94xV5WVs_OsjGQMQNLyZDq5yZn-Rb3iJuWxQxnw==&ch=7r5mjX7PGu8keBsorGRh4crOYctERGQ8X3CYPa13KXhC-UFCfyoj4g==) \- because they're going to END the days of this being Donald Trump's America First party unless our movement has something to say about it ASAP!

Anyone who hasn't been brainwashed by CNN propaganda can see that!
But that isn't stopping these RINOs from raising millions from their Super PACs, calling for World War 3, and desperately trying to make this the party of Liz Cheney instead of Donald Trump...
Are you going to let THEIR vision prevail in the midterms?

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hey Derek, it’s John.

We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my
tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ][IMG]

Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself.

On my left arm I have the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania,
my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years.
Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the
street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ][IMG]

On my right arm I have nine different dates. These are the dates when
people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as Mayor,
starting in 2006. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to
get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic
loss of life. My heart breaks every time I’m reminded of that.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ][IMG]

My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the
job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call
and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had
been robbed and killed by gun violence.

Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world,
Derek.

In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know
the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal
experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to
go through.

In my 13 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun
violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I
helped initiate youth + art programs for the students of our community and
we worked together to create a community center.

We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off,
kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment
as mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss
of life due to gun violence.

Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because
I believe *every* community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock.

It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it
were my very own.

That promise is written on my arms. Literally. ❤️

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ][IMG]

In order to build the kind of Democratic U.S. Senate campaign that can
flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, however, the honest
truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now. A big part of
that is online activists like you chipping in when you can.

And now that I am *officially* the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate, the
team and I could *really* use everyone’s help right now.

So, I gotta ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]Will you please chip in $10 or more to our campaign and Adam Schiff’s
right now, Derek? Every dollar helps Adam defend our House
Majority and send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for
your community just like I fight for mine.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to John Fetterman and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1009&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1010&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1011&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1012&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1013&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220521_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&refcode2=265_5257348__QpCHc&akid=265%2E5257348%2E_QpCHc ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for all you do. Together, I *know* we can win this.

Let’s gooooo. 🔥

John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Mayor Aftab Pureval (via NanWhaley.com)
subject: Ohio deserves better than Mike DeWine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
For too long now, Mike DeWine and his friends have run the show in Columbus, and over the decades they’ve made one thing very clear: they’re more focused on profit than on the people of Ohio.

Team,
**Ohio deserves better than Mike DeWine – which is just part of why I want to tell you about my friend and fellow mayor Nan Whaley.**
As mayor of Cincinnati – and before that, the first Democrat elected to the Hamilton County Clerk of Courts in over a century – I know a little bit about winning tough fights in Ohio. It takes strength, resilience, and the willingness to never back down.
**Nan has that in spades.** It’s why she was able to face some of the toughest challenges as mayor of Dayton, from the opioid epidemic to a broken education system. I know she’ll bring that same drive to the governorship and create a better future for our state – for all, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
**[I’m backing Nan Whaley for governor of Ohio – and I hope you’ll join me. Pitch in to her campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597526/346630919/-683968302?refcode=nw_em_220521_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTg4Y2ZmMy0zMWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJAaFKgZhRPOCKsa2GDh-wXdJD02n6nMwCfKumWa1yQ=)**
For too long now, Mike DeWine and his friends have run the show in Columbus, and over the decades they’ve made one thing very clear: they’re more focused on profit than on the people of Ohio.
That’s not what our state needs – we deserve better. We deserve a governor who is going to put the people first, and the politics last. That governor is Nan Whaley.
**[We have the opportunity to make history this year in electing Nan Whaley and Cheryl Stephens – and to ensure that Ohio has champions for reproductive freedom, workers’ rights, and a better future in our capital. Will you join me in supporting Nan and Cheryl by pitching in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597527/346630920/-683968302?refcode=nw_em_220521_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTg4Y2ZmMy0zMWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJAaFKgZhRPOCKsa2GDh-wXdJD02n6nMwCfKumWa1yQ=)**
Thank you,
Aftab Pureval
Mayor of Cincinnati

** **
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597528/346630921/-683968302?refcode=nw_em_220521_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTg4Y2ZmMy0zMWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJAaFKgZhRPOCKsa2GDh-wXdJD02n6nMwCfKumWa1yQ=)****

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Greg Abbott’s loss is New Mexico’s gain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597579/346631312/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220521abbott_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc4ODE1OS0zM2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_CSZAdqtlzKIPw0G_kprgyWnrTDblqbDEmYJoaMgzU=)
---
Team, Next door in Texas, we’re witnessing what happens when a far-right extremist is in power. **This month, Texas Governor Greg Abbott cost his state a major commercial railway expansion with Mexico, a loss that will cost billions of dollars in trade and hurt the relationship between Texas and their top trading partner. Thanks to his incompetence, New Mexico and our district stand to benefit.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597580/346631313/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220521abbott_gv_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc4ODE1OS0zM2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_CSZAdqtlzKIPw0G_kprgyWnrTDblqbDEmYJoaMgzU=)
---
Abbott tried using trade as a political tool by calling for more extreme anti-immigrant policies, so Mexico changed their plans. Now, Texas’ loss is New Mexico’s gain, with Mexico planning to route this trade railway through Santa Teresa, NM.
Extremists like Gov. Abbott and NM-02’s Rep. Yvette Herrell have put their far-right partisan politics ahead of the people they were elected to serve. When I’m in Congress, I’ll always make decisions with the best interests of the people in mind.
**I have direct experience with international trade and business development.** As a field representative for U.S. Senator Martin Heinrich, I worked with private industry, the state of New Mexico, and the federal government to support a pilot program that would allow for the private reimbursement of extended hours at the Santa Teresa Port of Entry to increase economic opportunities and competitiveness for southern Doña Ana County.
[**NM-02 needs a leader committed to doing right by them and creating more good-paying jobs and economic opportunity in our communities. Help me replace Herrell this November and be that leader for New Mexico in Congress: chip in $10 or more to fuel our grassroots campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597581/346631314/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220521abbott_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc4ODE1OS0zM2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_CSZAdqtlzKIPw0G_kprgyWnrTDblqbDEmYJoaMgzU=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Next door in Texas, we’re witnessing what happens when a far-right extremist is in power. This month, Texas Governor Greg Abbott cost his state a major commercial railway expansion with Mexico, a loss that will cost billions of dollars in trade and hurt the relationship between Texas and their top trading partner. Thanks to his incompetence, New Mexico and our district stand to benefit. | = Abbott tried using trade as a political tool by calling for more extreme anti-immigrant policies, so Mexico changed their plans. Now, Texas’ loss is New Mexico’s gain, with Mexico planning to route this trade railway through Santa Teresa, NM. Extremists like Gov. Abbott and NM-02’s Rep. Yvette Herrell have put their far-right partisan politics ahead of the people they were elected to serve. When I’m in Congress, I’ll always make decisions with the best interests of the people in mind. I have direct experience with international trade and business development. As a field representative for U.S. Senator Martin Heinrich, I worked with private industry, the state of New Mexico, and the federal government to support a pilot program that would allow for the private reimbursement of extended hours at the Santa Teresa Port of Entry to increase economic opportunities and competitiveness for southern Doña Ana County. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. | | | Hey there, It's been a challenging few weeks. I wanted to reach out to you directly with a quick note. The extremist Supreme Court majority has shown they're willing to discard a half-century of precedent to impose their conservative priorities on the country. GOP state legislatures are barrelling ahead with far-right legislation to roll back civil and reproductive rights. **Here is the truth: the fight will only get tougher from here. But we cannot give up, because our democracy, our planet, and our lives hang in the balance.** We must win big in November. Our field team is working to turn out the vote, not just for me, but for all of our vulnerable Democratic incumbents here in New Jersey. It would mean the world to have your support. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Why I’m running in NY-10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597756/346632175/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGQwN2QyNS0zNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ezpM4nkxd8Jac_Q398ip8k0SwUI1W1QLZYKEqQQHfQ=)

Hey, thanks for opening this email. I want to give you an important update on the redistricting process here in New York. You may have heard some news about our re-election campaign, and I want you to hear directly from me about my decision.
The final congressional map released last night is the result of partisan politics – drawn by an out-of-state, Republican court appointee who has shown utter disregard for cultural, social, and economic communities of interest. Ultimately, it was designed to reduce the number of New York Democrats in Congress.
To help secure our Democratic House majority, I have decided to avoid a brutal primary with another sitting member of Congress and run for another term in Congress in NY-10, an open seat in a newly created district.
NY-10 is the birthplace of the LGBTQ+ rights movement. Since long before the Stonewall Uprising, queer people of color have sought refuge within its borders.
I’m excited to make my case for why I’m the right person to lead this district forward and to continue my work in Congress to save our democracy from the threats of the far right.
In my first term, I have worked hard to deliver real results for New York State. I helped pass the American Rescue Plan and critical investments in infrastructure for New Yorkers. I have also worked to increase affordable housing and have led the fight to protect the rights of women and LGBTQ+ individuals. With our democracy under threat from the far right, I co-authored and helped the House pass the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ and introduced the _Judiciary Act_ to expand the Supreme Court.
I look forward to being a champion for NY-10 in Congress.
I’ll be honest — this new path is going to be difficult, but not impossible. A new congressional map means new challenges that are going to require us to fight harder to reach voters and overcome negative attacks from opponents.
But it also means a new opportunity to continue leading as a progressive champion in Congress. And now that it’s official, we can finally start the process of planning our organizing efforts in NY-10 and start engaging new supporters and volunteers.
**[The work ahead is going to be tough — but we know it will be rewarding. And we’ll need your help to get it done: can you pitch in today to support our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45597757/346632176/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGQwN2QyNS0zNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ezpM4nkxd8Jac_Q398ip8k0SwUI1W1QLZYKEqQQHfQ=)**

clean_body: = Hey, thanks for opening this email. I want to give you an important update on the redistricting process here in New York. You may have heard some news about our re-election campaign, and I want you to hear directly from me about my decision. The final congressional map released last night is the result of partisan politics – drawn by an out-of-state, Republican court appointee who has shown utter disregard for cultural, social, and economic communities of interest. Ultimately, it was designed to reduce the number of New York Democrats in Congress. To help secure our Democratic House majority, I have decided to avoid a brutal primary with another sitting member of Congress and run for another term in Congress in NY-10, an open seat in a newly created district. NY-10 is the birthplace of the LGBTQ+ rights movement. Since long before the Stonewall Uprising, queer people of color have sought refuge within its borders. I’m excited to make my case for why I’m the right person to lead this district forward and to continue my work in Congress to save our democracy from the threats of the far right. In my first term, I have worked hard to deliver real results for New York State. I helped pass the American Rescue Plan and critical investments in infrastructure for New Yorkers. I have also worked to increase affordable housing and have led the fight to protect the rights of women and LGBTQ+ individuals. With our democracy under threat from the far right, I co-authored and helped the House pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act and introduced the Judiciary Act to expand the Supreme Court. I look forward to being a champion for NY-10 in Congress. I’ll be honest — this new path is going to be difficult, but not impossible. A new congressional map means new challenges that are going to require us to fight harder to reach voters and overcome negative attacks from opponents. But it also means a new opportunity to continue leading as a progressive champion in Congress. And now that it’s official, we can finally start the process of planning our organizing efforts in NY-10 and start engaging new supporters and volunteers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thank you again for hearing me out today. I couldn’t be more grateful for your support, which has helped us build a strong grassroots campaign dedicated to delivering big, progressive, and transformational change to our communities — together. This may be a new district for us, but I will always fight for what matters: a living wage, Medicare for All, a livable planet, racial and LGBTQ+ justice, and so much more. And with your help, I’ll continue to do just that. Onward, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 122 C Street NW Suite 360 Washington, DC 20001 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Omg. THANK YOU!!!!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I am the *official* Democratic candidate for the most flippable U.S. Senate seat in the country.
#
**PENNSYLVANIA — THANK YOU FOR MAKING ME YOUR DEMOCRATIC NOMINEE FOR U.S. SENATE!!!!!!!! 😭😭 **
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)
I am so deeply honored, Derek.
And trust me, I do NOT take being the *official* Democratic candidate for the most flippable U.S. Senate seat in the country for granted. 😁
Nor do I take going up against the Republicans in November lightly.
**Because if you’ll allow me to be brutally honest for a second, 2022 is going to be a hard year for Democrats.**
A typical Democrat, running a typical campaign, is going to struggle. To win PA in 2022, we’re gonna have to do things differently. Dems cannot run the same playbook that has failed in years past. 💯
So this is my promise to you. My campaign is going to turn the map on its head + compete for votes in all 67 counties. We can *not* cede county after county to the Republicans.
**Every County, Every Vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.**
Look, I can win in places other Democrats can't because I’m a different kind of Democrat.
**I’ve already run + won statewide, not only in the primary, but in a general election, too. And I can do it again in November, Derek.**
I just need your support, which is why I have to ask:
[**Will you donate any amount right now and become a Fetterman for PA Founding Donor? We need to raise a *lot* of money right now in order to beat the Republicans + flip PA blue to save our Democratic majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)**
Quite frankly, we wouldn’t be where we are today without the grassroots support of folks like you, Derek. Every email you opened, post you shared, or voter you talked to helped us get to this point.
Over the past year, this campaign has built a true grassroots movement across PA, powered by over 500,000 individual donations + an average donation of just $27.
No dirty money. No corporate PACs. Everything we do is fueled by the donations of people who believe in me + our campaign. **That’s the kind of grassroots enthusiasm we need over the next few months to flip this seat blue.**
[**Will you make a donation today and become a Founding Donor for our campaign to send me to the U.S. Senate? Our campaign is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you + we need all hands on deck if we’re going to flip this seat in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)**
One last time from me, Gisele, Karl, Gracie, August, Levi + Artie: Thank you, thank you, thank you. I hope this campaign makes you as proud as it makes us. 🎉❤️
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. One of the best ways to show your support for our campaign is by establishing yourself as a Founding Donor. **[Please make any donation you can today to join this historic campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-1?refcode=em20220521-5916&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220521-5916-footer&t=1&refcode2=5916_434096_4-kbDr&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5916%2E434096%2E4-kbDr)

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: Rick Scott will stop at nothing to win NC and push through Senate Republicans’ extreme agenda.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Rick Scott is taking the stage at the North Carolina Republican convention.
#

Later today, Rick Scott is taking the stage at the North Carolina Republican convention.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220521-1-ma&refcode2=926.357359.PVha5z&t=1&akid=926%2E357359%2EPVha5z)
He’s head of the NRSC, the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm — the same people who are currently on the air attacking Cheri with misleading smears.
He’s coming not only to prop up Ted Budd’s campaign but to push the extreme right-wing agenda he released as a preview of what Senate Republicans would do if they take back the majority.
He’s made clear that under Senate Republicans, half of Americans would see a tax increase. His plan puts Social Security and Medicare at risk — potentially ending them entirely. It also threatens to roll back rights — including abortion rights, LGBTQ+ rights and voting rights.
These ideas are wildly unpopular and dangerous, but Ted Budd has said he agrees with Rick Scott’s plan.
So before Rick Scott takes the stage, we want to send a message loud and clear that Democrats will fight tooth and nail to stop their agenda and expand our majority.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to help us flip North Carolina and send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? Every donation says we will not allow Republicans to take back the Senate and push through such a dangerous and backward agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220521-1-ma&refcode2=926.357359.PVha5z&t=2&akid=926%2E357359%2EPVha5z)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: JOIN US: Pramila’s officially launching her re-election campaign today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Join us virtually on Zoom at 3 p.m. PDT/6 p.m. EDT for our launch.
#
Peter, we wanted to drop you a short note to remind you that Pramila’s official re-election campaign launch event is TODAY.
We went virtual for this campaign launch after Pramila tested positive for Covid last weekend. We’re sorry we won’t be able to join our community in-person in Seattle for this event, but we’re so glad we can bring in our top supporters from across the country to hear from Pramila on Zoom.
[**Can you make it to our virtual campaign launch at 3 p.m. PDT/6 p.m. EDT TODAY to hear Pramila’s plans for re-election, holding the Democratic majority, and electing more people-first progressives to the House?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12837?utm_source=em20220521-1277&t=1&akid=1277%2E420207%2EexZalu)
**Pramila's 2022 VIRTUAL Campaign Launch Party!**
**TODAY, May 21, from 3-4 pm PDT**
Zoom link provided with RSVP
**[RSVP »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12837?utm_source=em20220521-1277&t=2&akid=1277%2E420207%2EexZalu)**
Hope to see you there, Peter!
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220521-1277-footer&t=3&refcode2=1277_420207_exZalu&akid=1277%2E420207%2EexZalu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Only a few hours left to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Don't forget to cast your vote in the Republican canvass today! I'm counting on your support and looking forward to taking on Jennifer Wexton this Nov | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8e3499f6a194/make-a-plan-to-vote-this-saturday-5395499?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=257b3cb3ef&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

There are just a few hours left to vote TODAY, for our Republican nominee for Congress. I'm counting on your support to get us across the finish line - polls are open today until 4pm.

Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE.

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d3d2db823c&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=20bb03353c&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

[Please also consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=fdbe1aaaa8&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=69c20c4dc4&e=fc83fb200d)[to support our campaign in the final days and get us across the finish line!.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9e36241f24&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f55318ddd1&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4cbfaa4697&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a2afcceec6&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=08aa92856f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=169d715817&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I appreciate your support, and I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
