clean_body: Don't forget to cast your vote in the Republican canvass today! I'm counting on your support and looking forward to taking on Jennifer Wexton this Nov | | | | | | | "Donate" | , There are just a few hours left to vote TODAY, for our Republican nominee for Congress. I'm counting on your support to get us across the finish line - polls are open today until 4pm. Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE. If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com Thank you, Jeanine FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote. Prince William County: your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district. If you live in Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville. If you live in Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville. If you live in Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas. Loudoun County: Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington. If you live in Blue Ridge district , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the . Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School. Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School. If you live in Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville. If you live in Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn. If you live in Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie. Fauquier County: Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton. Rappahannock County : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington. Fairfax County : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton. Manassas City : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas. Manassas Park City : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park. If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.comand we can help you determine where to vote. | | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | I appreciate your support, and I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November! Peter, THANK YOU!

All of us at Team Tina are ecstatic about the work we've done together. The strength of our grassroots movement in the primary means we CAN win in November.

Over the course of the past few months, we've built a diverse coalition of thousands of Oregonians across the state – hard-working Oregonians just like yourself who want a better future for our state. More than 230 volunteers powered our campaign, and we knocked on 15,000 doors and made 45,000 phone calls.

We got here because **we came together** to support the best candidate for the next Governor of Oregon. And that's how we're going to win in November.

We all know how much is at stake in this election: **a person's right to make reproductive health care decisions, protecting Oregon's air and water, the dignity of work for Oregonians, and so much more.**

body:
The 5 pillars that will restore educational excellence in our schools, and educational accountability to our parents. >>>| | | **We JUST launched our education plan,****Power to the Parents**** >>> **_[**READ NOW**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b4813ad791a743a39b0c19757d2363f8&_e=QYwY_u_nmvCjoAvBsU_fNhciqPcoWr6IkIcO-Bn3kYF5ipT-crPRkjaGpAmsrhiZ2YS79JTkpBvLOdX2pxGYi4Q4Pf71RQ_lG_xEc8P__S7QXtne8nh3X87NTVK1NIqoQPSopndo1BkqxbU4j0XnFuQ7b0FZJGUT6KdTM9YOR2CfGN4-mm_nQopHaaIrL5zGBVSs9qJmw17iGeod0g3pyps9ny6MLH8NvvvKVmjKUz_KIKv99PbHK6-0IacxcgMYLJsmowLBHkrTf3j0VvKMCQOB1a-k3tXqwuasmX-uhIwiG0ja6Lf7hv39PmfyvpNg0E1e9oZsJYZZcJU3vP0SqHbpoTGVi3LaXAnGC2OHHo083hu_qRr5kt6-pTfNpN49uin9M-j3QQXJmn1McRQWXQ%3D%3D)_

---
Friend, For decades, politicians in charge of Illinois’ education system have put teachers’ union bosses ahead of the interests of our students. And the results are clear:
* **Two-thirds of Illinois third graders** do not meet grade-level standards for reading and math.
* **Three-fourths of 11th graders in Chicago Public Schools** do not meet grade-level standards for reading and math.

_Friend, the system is failing parents and endangering schoolchildren._ We have to change that. **That’s what we’re tackling in our brand-new education plan:**_[**Power to the Parents.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b4813ad791a743a39b0c19757d2363f8&_e=QYwY_u_nmvCjoAvBsU_fNhciqPcoWr6IkIcO-Bn3kYF5ipT-crPRkjaGpAmsrhiZ2YS79JTkpBvLOdX2pxGYi4Q4Pf71RQ_lG_xEc8P__S7QXtne8nh3X87NTVK1NIqoQPSopndo1BkqxbU4j0XnFuQ7b0FZJGUT6KdTM9YOR2CfGN4-mm_nQopHaaIrL5zGajWqSgLV7wk2d4IYOaBFI8SIlWZJ3iPirp3nLJLXytp0fsYSPCr1cDtxo-RwIdD16oOlwQK52SRJBKnX4NsKx9qp2cbW9dE0SkO-es3Snx6HWe0iRvb1oV2o6zk3gPCaWfpobnJ-_XzRVd7zqi1YLluVbkluzkHZYtwvzxnFPmlUbvzUba_jDRQMlOWkX-43RtP4m0Ob4FRNJIkR-QsCTQ%3D%3D)_ Together, our administration will implement the most sweeping educational reform in a generation, putting parents back in the driver’s seat to get every child on the path to college or career-readiness, no matter their background. We’re not shying away from this fight – because some fights are worth having. This 5-point plan will restore educational excellence in our schools, and educational accountability to our parents. _[**READ THE PLAN NOW**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b4813ad791a743a39b0c19757d2363f8&_e=QYwY_u_nmvCjoAvBsU_fNhciqPcoWr6IkIcO-Bn3kYF5ipT-crPRkjaGpAmsrhiZ2YS79JTkpBvLOdX2pxGYi4Q4Pf71RQ_lG_xEc8P__S7QXtne8nh3X87NTVK1NIqoQPSopndo1BkqxbU4j0XnFuQ7b0FZJGUT6KdTM9YOR2CfGN4-mm_nQopHaaIrL5zGlRFVTykGACyW-FXb0yo_mD6_JCPJNYl7ksB4QxxMx3eBGmBnKK9yrKoXAXvCOmq9AbfrLikZrkY8RHfKPrvL_wldZWf4jvLMirrIVMpKcRZ-OH4zjDBlM5irvm7HFCP2tl6OqQnWNMERk9UaQ3wAV0hnrFLA0X7Zw6UDiELQH_XgijBOuw1ZlRtOMXuBCZtvJU3qDX32KLgObDuH1fn3Ug%3D%3D)_ Thank you,Jesse Sullivan****

body:
Our primary is just a few days away. Will you please watch this message? |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b00d614f2df94bc495dee1530c251763&_e=0XKCu62KUhVzFKqgwxwDAceNs0mWs4kc7PEIDfwwrDB_ZgIweO241dr9LwhCz8OdLPUimDjWg3Ei7edID_tJlaJcwcX1keSWeODaPAqWAr6auGq4CBKTFFv7FGW0Vy0QgCBSy-mu3nqdNYbl6tQ0O3ndoonpRCex0VagvcQKgfR5t5vAysdK_lLKF80D63zv3zUGAqirkB9MdsqOuHnTt3jdURFGWWPj6NiOjXjKAHyoOQh7ljGvGFWVmJIrem0n07GUOW7BzUjrFJUCtrrvnRk1eF2UyKrI4XIpaaIg5YYHqpkoJZ2I5ToCEWaHfNW0tSI6kOw4J27q0B75Z3Lis980m6QBYpdod8bbMhriYpvEwgM9fv2XY6qtmvG-_cQiQcknF5Go19j1yFpEjfC93bjW3_x-SNa5oEZEMiDyZY-melfqKVJQnp-RlKmFV5H7S8omB0wOO4x0WdijK_uuq2a1MnNJ_XKBHn6L2ZDyVCE5E9S0Jomq6NY7F4XZkost)

Dozens of serious offenders are back on our streets due to this Democrat law passed last year.| | | Friend, Last year, Virginia Democrats passed a criminal justice “reform” law which has let dozens of serious offenders back on our streets without posting bail. It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

---

**BREAKING: Jim Jordan subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee**

The Trump-Hating Democrats witch hunt against me is getting out of hand. I, along with four other GOP lawmakers were subpoenaed by the partisan House Committee - created by Nancy Pelosi in an effort to use the events of January 6 as a political hit-job against me.

I need my top supporters, Peter. This is going to be a tough fight and I need your urgent help to fight the latest political attack against me and conservatives across this country.

**[Will you contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to help give me the resources I need to shield these baseless attacks?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)**

**DEFEND JIM JORDAN**

**SUPPORTER** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
**RESPONSE** :Pending
**SUPPORT REQUESTED BY** : BEFORE 11:59 PM

[**CHIP IN $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)
[**CHIP IN $250 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)
[**CHIP IN $5 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)
[**CHIP IN $15 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)

Make no mistake, they're only coming after me because **I'M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won't back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! I'm going to need your help. **[Can you chip in $10, $20, $30 or more today to help me defend myself from this vicious attack so that I can get back to doing the job I was elected to do?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)**

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)
There's no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . **Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE**.

Well, I've got news for them: I won't back down without a fight. But **[I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they're not just coming after me, they're coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)**.

All they're trying to do is distract from the real issues at hand. Whether it be inflation, record high gas prices, or mom's who can't get baby formula, they want to make sure I don't have time to do the job the American people trusted me to perform.

Let's show the Left that an attempt to slander my name will be in vain. **[Send in $5, $10, $20, $30](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)** , or whatever you can spare today to help me get past this and back to my job serving the American people.

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60432611:63l3YfoWN:m:1:3317145305:3F719481E09D71412F711B030B4B3608:r)

With you in the fight
Jim Jordan

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roe v. Wade
body:
| | |

Friends —
If this draft Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe is true, it’s an enormous step backwards for our country.
Arizonans have the right to make their own choices about abortion and when to start a family.
Today, _Roe v. Wade_ is the law of the land and I’ll do everything I can to protect that right. But I cannot continue that fight if we lose this November.
So, I need to ask for your help:
**Please split a contribution of $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s to help me defend this seat. name: Lawrence Reed
subject: I was a smuggler—and make no apologies for it
body:
I was in Poland in the 1980s. The Soviets ruled their communist bloc with an iron fist. Freedom of thought was expressly forbidd
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9t116akd036upd3mava6lb37inlfrs0541p9ruo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfepbmmspr6o73mdob6o5mcaq72tbieop31dhkm9gn6d32esrj8tlke1pj9c5lmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmcc5kmmqefcjicoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rq73arf5ik4hb7dvsvelot6473l05jvhnp4u68_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)

Friend,

I was in Poland in the 1980s. The Soviets ruled their communist bloc with an iron fist. Freedom of thought was expressly forbidden. It could get you thrown into a gulag.

But I had one mission in mind. I needed to do everything in my power to bring the ideas of free markets and liberty to people in the communist bloc.

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books (and raised money to support book smuggling) into Eastern European countries such as Poland and into the Soviet Union itself.

**One of my most treasured possessions is a copy of Milton Friedman 's Free to Choose that I arranged to be translated, published, and distributed in Polish in defiance of the communist regime in Warsaw. I make no apologies for that, so don't ask me for one.**

I organized translations of and publications in Polish of works by Ludwig von Mises, F. A. Hayek, and others.

Before my return trip to the United States, I was detained by the Security Service at the Okęcie airport. They interrogated me for hours and confiscated the materials and publications relating to the underground activity I was involved in.

But it was too late for the Soviets and their thugs. A network had been established, and getting free-market literature into Poland had begun. The downfall of the Soviet Union was near.

I had already been speaking and writing for the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) for a decade, often sharing with FEE audiences what I learned behind the Iron Curtain.

_**Now FEE is fighting against classroom indoctrination in the United States -indoctrination in the same bad policies and ideas I was trying my best to undermine in communist countries. **_

I am personally asking you to support our work to get free market and pro-liberty education into classrooms here in the United States.

[_**Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can generously spare towards this goal? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrrhvb5mvpeg82gf8160lj0o1um1o4oj56k7eh5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)

While we aren't smuggling books as I did in the 1980s, FEE is creating a new educational system for kids called FEE in the Classroom.

**FEE in the Classroom**

FEE in the Classroom's one-of-a-kind educational workshops uniquely engage, inspire, and equip high school and college students with a deeper understanding of the principles of free enterprise, limited government, and entrepreneurship directly in their brick-and-mortar schools and through their virtual classes.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zduioirbfeclk8p4tuefqol8n0eaulan2ciks0pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)

Over 87% of these seminars are held in high schools, 65%+ of which are public schools.

In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As on how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and state of the nation.

_**Our goal is to reach 23,000 students by the end of this year**_**. **

Friend , help FEE "smuggle" the ideas of liberty into high schools across the country. **I am looking to raise $50,000 online to fund our next several FEE in the Classroom workshops.**

Please select an amount below to donate today.

[_**Donate $1000**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1htsog85cam8pk73h2j92kd8jph2v8m79irijf0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0t5g4pt75mlsn8pnt65tlnb5fbecdusc4jqslo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rlqnqklpdsnem2nuua4rugskm52t9mrgc5jv10_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2i4qucpjoqasjnta466h4j3e5e63tm23lh3ed08_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7u6ul3ti96cinis62l3u9of8csoue07q8o8hrt8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za71oldljoc3ck5qv0s846eif8a2tsggbkcfu900_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9uf01hog5er1hv3a83ukkjsnqao6ap4duu5mrvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

P.S. I thought you would enjoy this bit of history as well.

Ronald Reagan, who helped destroy the Soviet Union, was a big fan of FEE's magazine, The Freeman. Here he is with Nancy Reagan enjoying a copy of it.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z540tdnal2u1elvr3o4pvijg7uqp7u482tuvskdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
Please help us today fight back against a rise in socialism. FEE is leading the charge once again with FEE in the Classroom.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv6ctqduduh0303lc04vhufs4h26g7c0icef988_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chim9or2c5h2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zs9svjnfgkarnhve0s8sv74akt51bhllekojb4o8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36b4fcg1reao81a3aig7d3ogo5ngs9jhfdek30g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cpi6ap73c9gm49fg)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I'm furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45598505/346635880/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220521_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGYxY2FhMi0zOWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEthVFWr5AlGLQoIbYUtrcAn0eoKpMlSxcJraqdufy8=)
---
Friend,

I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and her people during his time as governor, my blood pressure rises. It seems there’s _no end_ to what he’ll do to advance his political career.

He signed the **most restrictive anti-choice legislation** in Florida’s history since _Roe v. Wade_ , with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it.

DeSantis signed legislation **targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom** , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing _all_ of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting them for political gain.

He’s determined to silence _anyone_ who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in _Politico_ that **DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy.”** He’s even created an “elections police” unit that people fear will be more about voter intimidation than voter protection.

And now he’s **banning math textbooks!** Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up.

Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House.

**The good news: a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But I’ll need your help to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum?**

clean_body: There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. | | | | = Friend, I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and her people during his time as governor, my blood pressure rises. It seems there’s no end to what he’ll do to advance his political career. He signed the most restrictive anti-choice legislation in Florida’s history since Roe v. Wade , with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it. DeSantis signed legislation targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing all of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting them for political gain. He’s determined to silence anyone who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in Politico that DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy.” He’s even created an “elections police” unit that people fear will be more about voter intimidation than voter protection. And now he’s banning math textbooks! Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up. Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House. The good news: a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But I’ll need your help to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, friend. Together I know we can end DeSantis’ cruelty and make Florida a place that works for ALL Floridians. Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

Peter, My Democrat opponent is probably taking a nap while you read this email. **Sanford Bishop has been in Congress for nearly 30 years** \- **that’s longer than I’ve even been alive.** And when you’ve enjoyed Washington’s spoils for that long, you get sucked out of your district and into the glamor of the capitol. _By now, he doesn’t think he needs to earn your vote._ Sanford Bishop thinks he can go on with do-nothing Democrat business as usual and ride the Left’s politics into another term. **But he hasn’t seen what we can do yet.** **I’m Jeremy Hunt. I’m a black, Christian, conservative veteran. And I’m ready to take on Sanford Bishop.** [**If you’re ready to take back this district and flip the House, join me today.**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=65e943a5b3b647ff87423c5260e5a970&_e=i44KWV8e_A87QqYuWhPqA5O9WF942te5xhjGGa-eUzmFg5WBizOH6kSmJd8zrSsA6F6z0FdLlu85mumvgcynWdcb89KePEWsg-d7t99sYKNVBkUPCQ-ZtdVczWgAOmvH2avj11MZwGBAyZPB18dpvca4xXEfb4o-j4_QE37bFlBFEc4h9zZZbcgN6_C5Zj_CSwr9GeaK6D_aqibi0B2WrXVrZT3wi9o9aXYu10GcMoh81AvwfbpFs5J5KeEixI1Dw8gmAbDSF8PqMoDYDBJd8xipUcze8AUrIz1IEJO_At_NoyoDK-1OvjyySuRZH8ZYCOluhqDKMmqYTSLOwkXmhpyk1TcLBSL0MwDBIQSS0k1nYr_Byq0DhE8cs453aBwTSwsvPPlnoYku6OEqik8LGA%3D%3D)

Peter, in almost 30 years, Sanford Bishop has barely lifted a finger for Georgia. But while he’s been sitting idly in office, I’ve graduated from West Point and served as U.S. Army Captain in Ukraine. I will NEVER give up on America, and I promise you that I’ll bring the same passion I’m bringing to this campaign into the Capitol EVERY DAY to fight for you. With you on my team, I KNOW we can pull this off. A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Statement from Delegate Dave LaRock
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
"Jeanine has ALWAYS backed law enforcement and she has ALWAYS opposed the left's woke agenda. Jeanine is a principled conservative who can be trusted" | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bef9ef3b3fd3/8mkvdko90b?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=466b5ca735&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

I wanted to reach out and share this statement from Delegate Dave LaRock this morning.

With a slough of 11th hour, anonymous attacks launched against us, Delegate LaRock wants to make sure you know the truth about my record.

---
|
---
|

The Republican Primary Election is TODAY, May 21st from 9am-4pm. We need you help to be the strong conservative, Republican nominee.

Make sure you have a plan to vote, know where you're going, and bring your photo ID!

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f17be3382e&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0b98e49bef&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

[Please also consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2783d30669&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ffded319eb&e=fc83fb200d)[to support our campaign in the final days and get us across the finish line!.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=e7691f92be&e=fc83fb200d)

clean_body: "Jeanine has ALWAYS backed law enforcement and she has ALWAYS opposed the left's woke agenda. Jeanine is a principled conservative who can be trusted" | | | | | | | "Donate" | , I wanted to reach out and share this statement from Delegate Dave LaRock this morning. With a slough of 11th hour, anonymous attacks launched against us, Delegate LaRock wants to make sure you know the truth about my record. | | The Republican Primary Election is TODAY, May 21st from 9am-4pm. We need you help to be the strong conservative, Republican nominee. Make sure you have a plan to vote, know where you're going, and bring your photo ID! If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com Thank you, Jeanine FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote. Prince William County: your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district. If you live in Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville. If you live in Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville. If you live in Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas. Loudoun County: Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington. If you live in Blue Ridge district , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the . Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School. Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School. If you live in Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville. If you live in Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn. If you live in Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie. Fauquier County: Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton. Rappahannock County : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington. Fairfax County : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton. Manassas City : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas. Manassas Park City : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park. clean_body: The Georgia Senate Race “remains a toss-up.” The Senate will be won or lost in Georgia. | Fellow American - We've got some news to share with you. The political news organization Politico has released an updated forecast of the top Senate races. See for yourself: This is GREAT NEWS! Despite Democrats committing to spend more than $60 million on ads to defeat me,the needle hasn't moved yet. Our Senate race is a toss-up now, but without the support of folks like you, the Democrats clearly hope to buy this race with out-of-state money. The Democrats are sending emails with statements like, "The stakes of Georgia's must-win Senate race have never been higher," and "at this critical moment, experts at CNN are calling Rev. Warnock the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection." The other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. They continue to shower Senator Warnock with millions every month, meaning it's likely our campaign will be outspent throughout the summer. Let me be clear: we must have your help to be successful. We need your buy-in TODAY - not tomorrow. After all, the Senate will be won or lost in Georgia. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | Georgia may be in the toss-up category today, but this race is far from over. We cannot take anything for granted, so please stand with us today. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Republicans are gearing up to launch a MASSIVE attack

**The Republican Governors Association – led by failed Gov. Doug Ducey – is spending more than $10 MILLION to flood the airwaves with TV ads.** They'll spend ANY amount to keep Arizona red, and we know exactly why:

subject: Special Interests Want to Silence Me – Donate Today
body:
I will never change who I am for an elected position. I will always fight for what I believe in and what is right. For years I have taken on the special interests – and those special interests hate me
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eQ9cMQf7vXYjCFQIlnBXPOQ2NVgwgrzbu1AydR3odladHKg-OBAGmXgYLUARAU8MMVJiXbdsbKFpsndQT1xCO1-PUfQHbi0dHjWUnQB2ZchIVePq2lWEkHEOJjU5DYIJ6s8bZpN81wS4PXFF2tDG8waK6McoeU_UKlwdReQt8nOvAUcENtq-NylD-VUDGTc0zHWDgb5oCOt3hCpDaEyFOw==&c=ZDfV5RCJo7Hty0N08UV5m52JI3ZKMGKcgAmBLomHWKFxfpDUo-qYnA==&ch=s4X7Js9na3NViqR2tV7xp5_P7-C4O3Yokpmjil46zgNaenx0-ZuEcg==)

| People are struggling. Self-serving career politicians and special interests have turned a blind eye to the struggles of everyday people.
I am running to be our Youngest Republican Congressman in the country. But do not mistaken my youth for weakness. When I first ran for elected office, the biggest donor in Orange County stated "Brian I cannot have you saying these things if I am going to donate to you". I responded bluntly, "Keep your money - I don't do favors for money".
---
| | [SUPPORT REPUBLICAN BRIAN BURLEY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eQ9cMQf7vXYjCFQIlnBXPOQ2NVgwgrzbu1AydR3odladHKg-OBAGmcyLBYEgktF4tEnIvtwSq9bkBoQfqkGH913H6h3TG_NIrM5AWDGBvevOAM-fWLWds35DIUNnm5q2sRpG2DcCPRGKAXml8wzwCg==&c=ZDfV5RCJo7Hty0N08UV5m52JI3ZKMGKcgAmBLomHWKFxfpDUo-qYnA==&ch=s4X7Js9na3NViqR2tV7xp5_P7-C4O3Yokpmjil46zgNaenx0-ZuEcg==)
---
| I will never change who I am for an elected position. I will always fight for what I believe in and what is right. For years I have taken on the special interests - and those special interests hate me. Those corrupt power brokers have been trying to silence me and intimidate me behind the scenes. It won't work.
I am no stranger to tough fights. My mother was diagnosed and eventually passed from a rare form of cancer. So rare that there were less than 25 cases worldwide. I saw her struggle and fight for every second that she had with our family.
I learned the importance of fighting and never giving up from my mother. I will not allow running for office to change me. I have sat across the table from all these corrupt politicians - I will never turn into them. They disgust me and they should disgust all of us.
I have my mother and God looking down on me - I will do everything in my power to make those who support me proud.
I will not back down. This election is too important.
The future of our children is at stake. Mothers and fathers deserve better for their children. We have to fix our schools.
The future of our country is at stake. Rising debt, inflation, instability abroad and lack of leadership from DC all threaten our freedom and livelihoods.
What we stand for is at stake. Our values are under attack by the media, career politicians and special interests. We cannot sit on the sidelines and let them take our freedoms!
I am reaching out to ask for your help and support in this upcoming election. Help me take on the special interests!
[Chip in your best gift of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $1000 or even the federal maximum $8,600 per individual/$17,200 per couple that my campaign can receive!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eQ9cMQf7vXYjCFQIlnBXPOQ2NVgwgrzbu1AydR3odladHKg-OBAGmXgYLUARAU8MMVJiXbdsbKFpsndQT1xCO1-PUfQHbi0dHjWUnQB2ZchIVePq2lWEkHEOJjU5DYIJ6s8bZpN81wS4PXFF2tDG8waK6McoeU_UKlwdReQt8nOvAUcENtq-NylD-VUDGTc0zHWDgb5oCOt3hCpDaEyFOw==&c=ZDfV5RCJo7Hty0N08UV5m52JI3ZKMGKcgAmBLomHWKFxfpDUo-qYnA==&ch=s4X7Js9na3NViqR2tV7xp5_P7-C4O3Yokpmjil46zgNaenx0-ZuEcg==)
Thank you and God bless, Brian Burley

clean_body: I will never change who I am for an elected position. I will always fight for what I believe in and what is right. For years I have taken on the special interests – and those special interests hate me | | | | == | People are struggling. Self-serving career politicians and special interests have turned a blind eye to the struggles of everyday people. I am running to be our Youngest Republican Congressman in the country. But do not mistaken my youth for weakness. When I first ran for elected office, the biggest donor in Orange County stated "Brian I cannot have you saying these things if I am going to donate to you". I responded bluntly, "Keep your money - I don't do favors for money". | | == | I will never change who I am for an elected position. I will always fight for what I believe in and what is right. For years I have taken on the special interests - and those special interests hate me. Those corrupt power brokers have been trying to silence me and intimidate me behind the scenes. It won't work. I am no stranger to tough fights. My mother was diagnosed and eventually passed from a rare form of cancer. So rare that there were less than 25 cases worldwide. I saw her struggle and fight for every second that she had with our family. I learned the importance of fighting and never giving up from my mother. I will not allow running for office to change me. I have sat across the table from all these corrupt politicians - I will never turn into them. They disgust me and they should disgust all of us. I have my mother and God looking down on me - I will do everything in my power to make those who support me proud. I will not back down. This election is too important. The future of our children is at stake. Mothers and fathers deserve better for their children. We have to fix our schools. The future of our country is at stake. Rising debt, inflation, instability abroad and lack of leadership from DC all threaten our freedom and livelihoods. What we stand for is at stake. Our values are under attack by the media, career politicians and special interests. We cannot sit on the sidelines and let them take our freedoms! I am reaching out to ask for your help and support in this upcoming election. name: American Defense News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ntiqeo3ltv3g1qj1lru3oo6le76jh9cf0fp3c0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe2sllc9p3cdj1mhj3aotkm4pbecdhmiorcojks2pb8cbncgqe4d3lmpgn0sbn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj31c5lm3jr4cb664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj68or4c5i66oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zprce5opj9ndf6on5i3b5bjn9ur5u1dvebd5ei88_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhm8ob4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuc230adrinvbn9rsu0c92ugn62kkousnf0hjboo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhm8ob4cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zokl61buis88sgvhq76un05tf669b8k6m9qfn4gg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhm8ob4cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Peter Willis,
Millions of families across the United States have been struggling to obtain baby formula in order to feed their infants. This shortage has been hitting families of all means, but is particularly hard on low-income, working families who do not have the time or resources to find and purchase formula.
**This is a crisis of Capitalism** — the result of diminished competition between a few manufacturers who have monopolized the market, deregulation (which resulted in the Abbott formula recall), and trade policies that have decreased our ability to import formula from neighbors such as Canada.
It’s also one of the many ways that our country is failing children and families, along with Congress’ failure to pass paid family leave, universal childcare, or an extension of the child tax credit that cut the child poverty rate by 30 percent. **Under the status quo, families in the United States are neglected, and it’s time for us to change that.**
**[I’d like to hear from you now: How are you being impacted by the baby formula shortage?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnY1NI2EXhHmzWLPzn5_xZCBAQ3tjmwQMeQ5g2AlWyF1WnIATTehH_jY9RpkUTdivXIIftjp5yMh6k6qmvVnr9kzXRfNd535xifpTiAK5u3u0t_ZrJfI5NyrPRV72QYY3BEvt4Vqv92sDa-wAkib1xYBaRiUO0Vdk4cYq2HsyMrllkQVRlGfDyKgTsF9qhU_i7uL-_dzGfhV5wh0Shh_VdEP6ZIz4-h_JQwpHYmNbpG-Su_OpMo3eij4m3V4ATYs21_RTLEfQChTh8HNuKBpgTrrtzgTnfgFPqbrgXu68nRC0S3slMEtI4H8A07FAuH6MOo-01gGU3IVEYmLMDQJDnpP-5I2l8bIGwkBUKHg7bldg/3m8/Dcse5uEpRkOO-URkokdzKg/h1/W1kl67hqdEUT6TFsDK5ydakzAY8Ow0O9HDB3aUuDaYk)**

In Congress, I will fight hard for NY-03’s families and work to pass laws that give our children, parents, and caregivers the resources they need to not only get by, but thrive.
Hoping for relief for all of us, soon.
— Melanie D’Arrigo

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. clean_body: | | | | Peter Willis, Millions of families across the United States have been struggling to obtain baby formula in order to feed their infants. This shortage has been hitting families of all means, but is particularly hard on low-income, working families who do not have the time or resources to find and purchase formula. This is a crisis of Capitalism — the result of diminished competition between a few manufacturers who have monopolized the market, deregulation (which resulted in the Abbott formula recall), and trade policies that have decreased our ability to import formula from neighbors such as Canada. It’s also one of the many ways that our country is failing children and families, along with Congress’ failure to pass paid family leave, universal childcare, or an extension of the child tax credit that cut the child poverty rate by 30 percent. Under the status quo, families in the United States are neglected, and it’s time for us to change that. In Congress, I will fight hard for NY-03’s families and work to pass laws that give our children, parents, and caregivers the resources they need to not only get by, but thrive. Hoping for relief for all of us, soon. — Melanie D’Arrigo Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

Hello,
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
Lebanon, Iowa, had eight houses, a church, and a small feed store. My life centered on helping my dad, school, and exploring Dry Creek, a wonderland of aquatic life down the hill. The nearest town was Hudson, SD, nine miles west down a gravel road.
We were the prototypical rural Iowa family. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, lunch, then supper kept the house full of aromas. “Read a book,” would be mom’s terse direction if you showed any idleness. It is from this humble beginning, work as a welder, farmhand, then in a slaughterhouse, that brought me into the U.S. Navy.
America must present an opportunity for its citizens to achieve great things. From homemade clothes (I’m the littlest one) to a three-star Admiral is just one such journey. The next step is to use life’s experiences to continue a lifetime of service to this nation and my state of Iowa.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa because I can represent people from all walks of life. My life’s experiences provided an innate understanding for what it means to be a Democrat:_to care as much for those I’ve never met as I do for those I know_. Obviously, Chuck Grassley is not a Democrat; he seems to only care about what Trump and his corporate PAC donors want.**
People like me aren’t supposed to be able to run and win. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions from corporate special interests to try to make sure I don’t.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in life, though, it’s that anything is possible when a group of people work together to make it happen. I’m not taking one dime from corporate PACs; instead, I’m running my campaign entirely with support from over 57,000 grassroots donors like you.
[**So please, if you’re able to, will you consider making a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Senate control is on the line in my race, and whatever amount you can spare today would go a long way in protecting our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45598933/346639721/-42398318?refcode=em20220521pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjRlOTI5ZC00MGQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yxCgJyM9thgjgsiBZ9y_Na_ZaKPqKWrJAU33dDRfN0I=)

clean_body: ALEX, The court has spoken and now we know what our district will be. | | | | | | Friend- The court has spoken and now we know what our district will be. While I’m going to miss the Brooklyn neighborhoods I will no longer represent, I applaud the judge’s decision to reverse the Democrats’ unconstitutional gerrymander and give New York fair districts. | | | | | | | | | | Now that redistricting is finally done, it’s time to focus on the election in November. Max Rose is a favorite of Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden because he supports their radical agenda. From taxpayer-funded campaigns to government run health care and Biden’s inflation-fueling $3.5 trillion Build Back Better plan, Max Rose supports it all. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306

body:
He’s been saving for a rainy day, and that day is here. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6xW7pKTQQMw0klJre3ckHXOQM4l_yVo4iztQQngMbi8zUwBdryZEqJPez7C0sxByxcrcv03todnWIN5IOFy6ou5120ZG0D9KdKPFKhwQzajw8asXltnxPJ1TVB2TNM93rSv5VYKxXL3Cax0KIcthGPAGcAlHCRw0LIsrpkLUWNP0oRJEcCkpY-Kzws3hMgppqCocgVJ5949z4kPlGR2E6hXJ9IBLfKc-8_dCRc35vzcPiRP6kTEYpRFkdvR3yd9Qa3hEQXQeIjFY2mI--UTSIC7tUO5-VrSIFaukVGmHM9ew/3m8/-wmVMniNQvilt9jb0dkwzQ/h0/U1geTG1kh8t3XrWnNZDHX2TGeeHg46uKvAWjzdvn09k) Dear Team, $1,000 from Walmart, $2,000 from AT&T;, $2,500 from Boeing, $1,000 from Amazon. Over the last 20 years, Danny Davis has built up a savings account of over half a million dollars through corporate PAC payouts. Now, in 2022, he is facing the most serious primary challenge of his career and he is spending. So far we’ve seen thousands of brochures hit voters, mailers trickling into the district, and events with party leadership at downtown hotels. This is just the beginning. **We have to be ready, and that means matching corporate power with people power.** [**Every volunteer can persuade 3-5 voters per hour, and we have the volunteers to do it, but that hour of volunteer time costs the campaign $8.25 on phones or $8.10 on doors. Can you chip in $8 to help us stand up to corporate money and bring a new vision to IL-7?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESoTjUL1Al5lQlFSHPsQejfTR_-co2QVZCMxZu22pr4bSQA6oUm_4N_PikGtWO3K8DhV60drET2wbPu6IIJbIixeEQf1RmEvjLLYnZytFMX11q2_0MRxBKEomd35kCsuzlldgakx-X4EgxvARGWoCYIJCNA57bufxlV9EU2mlGj2c2MlMcX3Gx3LqLIDMpWA_hlGafmZ9irNMmmByM6U8Otw6oSRY6CaXHR5QvoNVCBgtdE8UQjVWrOq4M2xBMtGOL4ddkK3jwC6aH3LHonKabUxnlMaePpPlrMRKWzEjVgnF6-Yzd1A61zFgFknmhBYZhnWAeN6df6ix15HmKhB3njSGhkdWnJAG0gCv8QzDIIM0/3m8/-wmVMniNQvilt9jb0dkwzQ/h1/-U20ukqvYCI2uw_lp_cCKYhNQBqYu6-LE7jxjPtKugw) [Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESX2m3dpqSlXrPKVKLVgAa6Qo7-q6pOk6PoNSHbwJxZhc5mulkIYA0Tr8kvASo-5egm4cFAjWjNelBY_HQnGVTE2Ud7CaexzRQOFO7EWC5e9qbBxMKdcfoxVLgwc_mu58dl4lEfCxCjxu6bGFK5c9yrXrQmM2DD3CSSndWqomJE4XHqIOtuzKCpeBQHyKLKjaPnC9q8NNBw1i84SxtP0J5xsoD9vQuJzL9tnQ3aP68_jb-HiU1fX8f4XeO4bXzPrzLysyj0BRx1DkkzsQNj-xAMaBHibcII01mMljhkdnBfvRCiezNHUpQK7vUYbgRlFsQpPXVnK_l6PZG_8-nv3zm5JO-00lQ3mo8IzTk-wMmYtM/3m8/-wmVMniNQvilt9jb0dkwzQ/h2/MW6eRlQmpfdOLL692_hG3420IXOuyBeUwhNfyf0FEOk) We know that no matter how much corporate money Rep Davis spends, it will never be a substitute for a passionate volunteer army on the ground. That’s why, this weekend we will knock on our 15,000th door, and make our 130,000th phone call. clean_body: He’s been saving for a rainy day, and that day is here. | | | Dear Team, $1,000 from Walmart, $2,000 from AT&T;, $2,500 from Boeing, $1,000 from Amazon. Over the last 20 years, Danny Davis has built up a savings account of over half a million dollars through corporate PAC payouts. Now, in 2022, he is facing the most serious primary challenge of his career and he is spending. So far we’ve seen thousands of brochures hit voters, mailers trickling into the district, and events with party leadership at downtown hotels. This is just the beginning. We have to be ready, and that means matching corporate power with people power. We know that no matter how much corporate money Rep Davis spends, it will never be a substitute for a passionate volunteer army on the ground. That’s why, this weekend we will knock on our 15,000th door, and make our 130,000th phone call. We’ve had enough of the same empty corporate fueled promises. On June 28th we can send a clear message to the Chicago Machine, and change our district forever. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

There’s no sugarcoating it, Friend. The Montana GOP’s unconstitutional attacks on voting rights — particularly college students and our native communities — are having a major impact on this primary election.

**But now that the Montana Supreme Court has temporarily blocked some of the GOP’s worst voter suppression attempts, folks are going to be even more confused as they fill out their ballots and go to the polls this spring.**

Not to mention, according to the Secretary of State, 10,852 voters have _already_ returned their ballots in this primary election. _That’s roughly 17% of the total amount of votes we’re expecting!!_

This is a critical moment — not just for our campaign, but for the future of voting rights in Montana. We’re mobilizing our grassroots team all across this district to make sure voters know about these changes and have what they need to return their ballots for Tom, but this Supreme Court ruling creates a dangerous cloud of confusion.

_**[That’s why we’re humbly asking you to rush a donation to our GOTV Fund right away so we have the resources to communicate with key voters impacted by this decision. clean_body: The Montana GOP’s unconstitutional attacks on voting rights are having a major impact on this primary election. | | | | BREAKING: "Montana Supreme Court temporarily restores challenged election laws ahead of the primary" — NBC Montana There’s no sugarcoating it, Friend. The Montana GOP’s unconstitutional attacks on voting rights — particularly college students and our native communities — are having a major impact on this primary election. But now that the Montana Supreme Court has temporarily blocked some of the GOP’s worst voter suppression attempts, folks are going to be even more confused as they fill out their ballots and go to the polls this spring. Not to mention, according to the Secretary of State, 10,852 voters have already returned their ballots in this primary election. That’s roughly 17% of the total amount of votes we’re expecting!! This is a critical moment — not just for our campaign, but for the future of voting rights in Montana. We’re mobilizing our grassroots team all across this district to make sure voters know about these changes and have what they need to return their ballots for Tom, but this Supreme Court ruling creates a dangerous cloud of confusion. | | | | | Voters are losing trust in their vote and in our elections thanks to the Montana GOP’s voter suppression tactics. And at a time when life is already so uncertain for Montanans, making our democracy more precarious is the last thing we need. Tom Winter will stand up to these voter suppression attempts and fight for everyone’s right to vote — but first we need to win this primary. Your support means so much right now: Thank you, Team Winter PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 1592 Polson, MT 59860 | | Sent via . name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: How we’ll fight for reproductive freedom in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599170/346642237/409076140?refcode=20220521_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwYzBiYS00MWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS7I7Qq2tSj87aww_FWAxaTgbmA2jr0uQkrtePXEKRg=)
Friends, We got some tough news when we learned that the Supreme Court is readying to overturn Roe v. Wade. Since Texas has a “trigger ban” in place, this decision will completely ban abortion in our state, without exception for rape or incest. But we have an opportunity to channel our frustration and anger into action, and ultimately into victory. We must do so because winning political power is the only way to meet this challenge — the only way to overcome this crisis. As governor, I will do everything in my power to guarantee that women have control over their own bodies, their own health care, their own futures. But, in order to win, I need your support to defeat Greg Abbott in November. [**Will you split a contribution between Seth Moulton and this campaign to help me defeat Greg Abbott in November so I can fight to protect the right to abortion care in Texas?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599171/346642254/409076140?refcode=20220521_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwYzBiYS00MWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS7I7Qq2tSj87aww_FWAxaTgbmA2jr0uQkrtePXEKRg=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599172/346642255/-1424250066?refcode=20220521_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwYzBiYS00MWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS7I7Qq2tSj87aww_FWAxaTgbmA2jr0uQkrtePXEKRg=)
These extreme attacks on abortion have never been about life. If it were about life, then the current Texas governor wouldn’t allow so many kids to die in the foster care system in Texas — the worst run foster care program in the United States. This is about control. And this is about power. Our side — the side of the people who believe in democracy, the constitution, and the rights of our fellow Americans — has to get serious about political power. It’s on us, the people of Texas. We must do everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health care. I will fight for every person’s freedom to control their own health care, their own body, their own future. Friend, I need you in this fight with me to protect reproductive rights in Texas. [**Please, split a $25 contribution between our campaign and Seth Moulton and help me defeat an extremist governor who is actively tearing away people’s reproductive freedom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599173/346642256/409076140?refcode=20220521_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwYzBiYS00MWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS7I7Qq2tSj87aww_FWAxaTgbmA2jr0uQkrtePXEKRg=) With your support, I know that we can win this race. Thank you,
Beto
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599174/346642257/-1424250066?refcode=20220521_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwYzBiYS00MWQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS7I7Qq2tSj87aww_FWAxaTgbmA2jr0uQkrtePXEKRg=)

body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lp1fft7mqo4ur2pegbnpouo19gc37255i4c6t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8cr6cpi7as5m69hb8sdlmlj68ophc6q70ohjegpr4tjnc1on0obks8ojec33c1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5cr0sup76phksipm8dtgmlin49fg)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20taka1a58ssk7mdl5lvnddb77vrr1v4vgno9m0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh2bs "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh85501v6uq2kds13nhc9lqgqer5jbparf8vv78_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh2bs)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmljqro5pflf5e0rp6tv8h7r635r2uugph2qje6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh2bs "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbb17np3chpg9405kh6c3song0r8rahctq8ta0hg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh2bs "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z09b81ngg7ugrf7npkjk4564tgej59696kjkg550_rp22sh2s8i66pb6chhmcoj4clh2bs)
---

clean_body: Kamala has turned the 50-50 Senate into her own political weapon. | Peter, You don’t have to dig very deep to realize just how much of a threat Kamala poses as the president of the 50-50 Senate... [Source: Bloomberg] Over the last year and a half, her tie-breaking vote has been at the center of every one of the radical Left’s extremist policies that are destroying our country. In fact, it’s been nearly 200 YEARS since a vice president has cast this many decisive votes in a 50-50 Senate. But we only need 1 SEAT to flip the balance of power and take back the majority. That’s why I’ve thrown all my support behind pro-Trump Navy SEAL Eric Greitens’ U.S. Senate campaign as his National Chair. We MUST stop Kamala, here and now. After George Soros bought the 50-50 Senate for Kamala in 2020, we all knew they weren’t going to give it up at the midterms without a fight. But despite the backing of a shady liberal billionaire like Soros, Kamala is still in serious jeopardy of losing her majority – and her ONLY source of power. She was caught ADMITTING to her donors that if the Democrats lose just 1 seat, she will be rendered useless. I don’t know about you, but Kamala rendered useless with no real power sounds pretty good to me. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

#
It’s official: As Texans continue to endure Greg Abbott’s extreme policies — including his abortion ban, his blatantly corrupt handling of our failed power grid, and his political stunt at the border that cost Texans more than $4.2 billion— **his disapproval rating just shot up to****50%****.**

subject: I’m honored by your support. 🙏

body:
| | | I am so deeply honored. ❤️

**Last Tuesday, I *officially* became the Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania’s must-win Senate seat.**

This fight is personal to me, so now I'm asking for your help to bring this race home. 🙏 [**Will you please split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC, so we can flip Pennsylvania blue + expand our already _razor-thin_ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)

We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe it’s because of my height (6’9”) or my tattoos (I have a bunch). But that’s why voters are taking a chance on me.

**The tattoo on my left arm is the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania -- my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years. My wife Gisele + I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.

**The whole reason I’m running for Senate is because I believe *every* community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock.**

This election is about making sure no person, no town, + no community are left behind.

CNN ranks our race as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022. But in order to build the kind of campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now to go up against the other side's big-money donors.

**[So I’m asking you personally: Please, split $5 now between my campaign and the DSCC so we can expand our Senate majority + continue the fight for our families:](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between John Fetterman and the DSCC.
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)

---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=8&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)

It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own.

Thank you for honoring me with your support. 🙏

John

John Fetterman
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Pennsylvania
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)

John Fetterman served as Mayor of Braddock for 13 years before running statewide for Lt. Governor -- and flipping 6 counties that Donald Trump won. Now, he’s running for Senate in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Seat, so he can fight for every community like it were his very own. But he needs grassroots supporters like you to join this movement.

**[Chip in now to help John Fetterman flip Pennsylvania blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220521-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4403%2E9716520%2EjcXTc2)**

We have been working nonstop on the campaign trail for nearly 12 months now, traveling to all 67 counties to visit with hardworking Alabamians and learn more about how their next U.S. Senator can help them thrive. The momentum we are feeling on the ground every day is incredible – it is clear that the people of Alabama want fresh blood to usher in the next generation of conservative leadership and shake things up in Washington. I would be honored to earn your vote this coming Tuesday, May 24!

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Defending Kansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Support for Derek’s campaign for Governor continues to grow, but if we are going to finally defeat Laura Kelly & KEEP KANSAS RED, we need your help.| | |
---
| | Friend, Support for Derek’s campaign for Governor continues to grow, but if we are going to **finally** defeat Laura Kelly & **KEEP KANSAS RED,** we need **your help.**
We know you are a solid member of Team Schmidt. But will you send this message to friends and family who are still undecided and get them to help us defeat Laura Kelly by **adding their name TODAY!**
---
[**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=ccff98308bc0437283c38a35b304b9c3&_e=-_wF-uFDflC3tllyw_SMC3yukdmCf4RcfcSte1SrkvwQrlQaSR4O8i6CbH9SSxUE4VU-PohIzAD76sJ7dXfDXcBUOKu53YTXnASRnjKId__JnuoatOEPvaQhJYj4Bj17oV8RUBKuE62gKNc4_ja2-Bin4D_pPHboKYQshZpLtzHltoVb6MyaPSr5AZMpBFdaLx_r7yPtR0CrVPdxWRPw86x1IS3ksENgeqKldQOIso8BWdXj6D6HJtK-kWJNj2lW-QzsPbQ4Oi1dRtA5E953s-wd08SduWExzoxvlypxohBmlxQZ86LwVe0BWuwFea1zG89e31yQx761XlJQEsi3eu1J-fVOV_qd2Otm_jEJDH7vBzWiT8dmzmZ4HTGhPvnFlIEVdvkPUIIKukRVT6BeoD2hHvGpzeFfStn2txsCBTIyMuTcORTyy7jBgEv14BGzEM8UWAQraMdqwG8D4RVVQ6eKBU2WTK5MmyRpiovCk0M%3D)
---
Check out Team Schmidt’s most recent endorsements, friend, & share with fellow conservatives who are ready for a change and want to join these folks and endorse Derek too: _"I first met Derek while I was serving in the Kansas Legislature during his early years as Attorney General, and his love for Kansas has always been evident. As an educator, I know that Derek is committed to making our state the best place in America to raise a family. Under his leadership, Kansas schools will be second to none. He will serve Kansans as governor with honor, integrity, and humility - just as he has in the attorney general's office. I am proud and excited to support my friend Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas."_ **Former State Representative Sue Boldra** _“Derek Schmidt has the knowledge, values, and experience that have served our state exceptionally well as our attorney general. I know because I’ve seen from firsthand experience that he respects and supports law enforcement and will be a law and order governor at a time when we desperately need one. He will spend his time in office doing everything he can to make sure law enforcement has what we need to keep Kansas families safe. I will be voting for Derek Schmidt in November and I encourage all Kansans to join me.”_ **Harvey County Sheriff Chad Gay** _“Derek Schmidt has dedicated his career to public service and to working with law enforcement to keep Kansas safe. It’s painfully clear we need new leadership in both Washington and Topeka, and it is my hope that come January, Attorney General Schmidt will be sworn in as governor so he can help deal with the mess the Biden administration has caused with its open border policies that have led to increased drug trafficking and violent crime across our country and here in Kansas.” _ **Wabaunsee County Sheriff Robert Hoskins** _“Attorney General Derek Schmidt has my full support in the race for Governor of Kansas. He’s been a great leader as our AG and has worked hard to keep Kansas safe, particularly at a time when leaders in Washington have made that a tougher job than it should be. He’s always backed the blue and he has the right ideas to improve public safety as our governor. I hope everyone in Harper County and around the whole state casts a vote for Derek Schmidt in November.” _ **Harper County Sheriff Tracy Chance** _“Kansans are ready to move on from the failures of Laura Kelly and her administration over the last three and a half years. Kansas families and businesses are struggling under her leadership and we need a fresh new positive vision for Kansas and Derek Schmidt has the values and ideas to move us forward. He will make our state more attractive for small businesses, jobs, and workers. He will make sure our schools are the best in the country and teach our children the truth about America - that we are the greatest nation on earth where everyone has the opportunity to succeed. He has a strong track record of always fighting for individual liberty and freedom, and always has Kansas families at the top of his mind. As a native of Independence, he understands the values and needs of rural communities like ours.”_ **Stevens County Republican Central Committee** _“The National Latino Peace Officers Association - Advocacy supports and endorses your [Derek Schmidt’s] candidacy for Governor of the Great State of Kansas, with the recommendation of the Kansas Advocacy Charter.” _**National Latino Peace Officers Association - Advocacy** We need every last Kansan to **commit to doing everything we can** to defeat Laura Kelly this fall. friend, that starts **here & now with YOU. Join Team Schmidt TODAY!** Thank you,Team Schmidt
---

---
| | |
---
| | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.
---
