Team, since November 2020, Republicans have passed MASSIVE vote by mail restrictions across the country.
They know that when more people vote, it’s harder for them to rig elections. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
So they’re launching the biggest campaign to silence voters in DECADES. We won’t stand for it. Join us and add your name to demand Congress pass legislation enacting nationwide vote by mail right now >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
Motivated by the ‘big lie’ and a host of other conspiracy theories, the GOP is cracking down on a safe, easily accessible way of voting.
Colorado, home of DASS Chair Jena Griswold, has offered vote-by-mail for years – and only seen turnout go up, with 0 cases of fraud! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
This is a political ploy by the GOP to suppress the vote, plain and simple.
We need your help to fight back. Add your name and demand Congress take action to pass nationwide vote by mail right now >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/nationwide-vbm]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

clean_body: [] Team, since November 2020, Republicans have passed MASSIVE vote by mail restrictions across the country. They know that when more people vote, it’s harder for them to rig elections. [] So they’re launching the biggest campaign to silence voters in DECADES. We won’t stand for it. Join us and add your name to demand Congress pass legislation enacting nationwide vote by mail right now >>> [] ADD MY NAME >>> [] Motivated by the ‘big lie’ and a host of other conspiracy theories, the GOP is cracking down on a safe, easily accessible way of voting. Colorado, home of DASS Chair Jena Griswold, has offered vote-by-mail for years – and only seen turnout go up, with 0 cases of fraud! [] This is a political ploy by the GOP to suppress the vote, plain and simple. We need your help to fight back. Add your name and demand Congress take action to pass nationwide vote by mail right now >>> [] ADD MY NAME >>> [] DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today! Donate Now []

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: I am honored to have the support of Jim Hagedorn's family, friends, and loved ones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
I am running for Congress to continue Representative Hagedorn’s fight for election integrity, ending public funding for abortion, and protecting our | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9018821?e=f4c2e54596)
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=9d4332e6ed&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,Which candidate is the best fit to represent the constituents of Minnesota's 1st Congressional District?We have responses from Congressman Hagedorn's former official staff, friends, family, and members of his own campaign team to help do just that. After all these people were side by side with Jim for years and no one knew the 1st District better than Jim Hagedorn.I am honored to receive the support from Jim’s family and loved ones - including several of his best friends - including Al "Travis" Thielfoldt and [**Paul Mugan who have expressed their support**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=8e6aa98906&e=f4c2e54596) for Team Munson!Those who worked closely with Jim have also announced their support for my campaign, because they know that I am the **Proven Conservative Fighter** in this race who has the record and experience to continue Jim’s legacy.
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e3e206f34e&e=f4c2e54596)
Becky Rogness, Jim’s former Press Secretary and daughter of Neal and Juleen Breitbarth, had this to say about my campaign:_“Southern Minnesota friends, Tuesday is primary day in the special election to fill late Rep. Jim Hagedorn’s seat in Congress. I just donated to Jeremy Munson’s campaign and I would be casting my vote for him on Tuesday if I could.__I’ve known Jeremy for years. He was a devoted friend to my dad as they served in political capacities together and he’s worked hard to get many conservatives elected, including Hagedorn. He’s smart and will work hard taking Southern Minnesota’s values to DC.__Having worked for Hagedorn, I know Jeremy is a good fit for the district, and you’ll always know where he stands. I wish him the best on Tuesday and encourage MN-1 voters to Vote Munson.”_ We have also received support from Jim’s former Deputy Chief of Staff Jim Hahn:_"I had the honor of working tirelessly with Jim Hagedorn during his political campaigns and the privilege of serving him as his Communications Director/Deputy Chief of Staff in his Washington office. He was a great patriot and a dear friend. Selecting his replacement isn’t just political for me, it’s personal.__I will be voting for Rep. Jeremy Munson on May 24th. Why? I watched Rep. Jeremy Munson campaign with Congressman Hagedorn, and I listened and interacted with him as he advocated for his constituents when I was in Washington, D.C. What I learned about him through those years is Jeremy doesn’t just claim to be a conservative in the usual avalanche of slick brochures and TV ads, he IS a conservative."_ Many of you will also remember Jim's former Constituent Outreach Coordinator Derek Ringhand, who may have been at every parade in the district more times than you can count, as well as former Legislative Assistant and Senior Campaign Staff Kyle Pirron, who was a constant face in the community. They have both reached out and endorsed me in my race, because they know I am the only one who will actually vote like Jim Hagedorn did.
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=bd28de18b0&e=f4c2e54596)
Jim Hagedorn (Left), Derek Ringhand (Center), Kyle Pirron (Right)
Hagedorn’s closest friends, family, and allies are joining Team Munson. The swamp is full of Republicans trying to paint themselves as conservatives, but I have been in St Paul proving every day I am the Proven Conservative Fighter.I have even met all of Jim's current DC staff! These great people work tirelessly every day for the people of southern Minnesota.
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=bf18a5e559&e=f4c2e54596)
It's a blessing that Jim's sister let me know his whole family is behind me, and I look forward to carrying on my friend's legacy.The people of Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District deserve representation in Congress they can trust, just like we had when my friend Jim Hagedorn was our Congressman.I am running for Congress to continue Jim’s fight for election integrity, protecting life, fiscal conservatism against massive multi-subject omnibus bills, and standing strong for our Second Amendment rights from the radical socialists in Washington seeking to disgrace our Constitution.Jim's former staff, friends, and family who understand southern Minnesota's issues, people, strengths, and its many parades have made the informed decision that I am the best fit for the district. I hope you join them and vote Jeremy Munson.Thank you,
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448P.S. We are holding a screening of _2000 Mules_ tonight, May 21st, at the Jem Movie Theatre in Harmony, MN. Doors open at 6:15 pm and the screening will begin shortly after 7:00 pm. If you are able to attend or have any questions, please contact [**Kyle@JeremyMunson.com**](mailto:Kyle@JeremyMunson.com)**.**
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---
| | | | [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e80d782a4f&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=10501d1578&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=ede32cd593&e=f4c2e54596)
---|---|---

[Add us to your address book](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=58ed15eae9) or [unsubscribe](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=58ed15eae9)

Just a couple of months ago, the GOP filed a bogus lawsuit as part of their desperate attempt to kick me off the ballot and undermine our campaign. We took this fight to the Iowa Supreme Court, and the justices ruled _unanimously_ in our favor against the GOP's partisan lawsuit.
**We only won that fight because people like you believed in our campaign and took action when we needed you –** and that's exactly how we're going to win in November.
**Sen. name: Jake Bequette
subject: ❌ No more career politicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Election Day is almost here. Will you support my America First campaign? Read more >>>
| | | *****VOTE MAY 24!*****
---
Friend, Election Day is on Tuesday, and I’m asking you for your vote. I’m a native Arkansan who grew up in Little Rock. I was an All-SEC Razorbacks football player and won a Super Bowl as a New England Patriot. After leaving the NFL, I served my country in the Army and deployed to Iraq with the 101st Airborne Division. _**Now I’m ready to serve my country in the U.S. Senate and help take back America from the Radical Left.**_ As your U.S. Senator, I will: **Stand for our gun rights.** I’m a staunch defender of our constitutional right to keep and bear arms. As a gun owner myself, I believe all law-abiding Americans are entitled to own firearms for sport and protection. In Congress, I’ll support the Second Amendment 100%. **Fight for term limits.** Washington is full of career politicians who have spent far too many years in the D.C. Swamp advancing their own agendas. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight to enact term limits to ensure that Arkansans are represented by those who serve their constituents, not their careers. That’s why I’ve signed the U.S. Term Limits Pledge to support a constitutional amendment for term limits in the U.S. House and Senate. **Secure our borders.** As the Left pushes for open borders, our national security is threatened every day by drug cartels, human trafficking, and criminals crossing the border illegally. I will stand against illegal entry into our country and fight to make sure anyone who breaks our immigration laws is brought to justice. **Fight for the right to life.** As a man of strong Christian faith, I believe human life begins at conception, and I’ll always stand up for the rights of the unborn. I oppose taxpayer funding of abortion and will fight for tougher policies that protect innocent life. **Reign in Big Government spending.** The liberal spending spree in Washington is out of control. In the last twenty years, career politicians in both parties have added trillions to our national debt. I have a plan to rein in the Left’s big spending and restore our country’s economic reputation. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight for lower taxes, less government spending, and a balanced budget. _Friend, President Biden and liberals in Washington are leading America in the wrong direction. Our country and our freedoms are under attack like never before._ Unlike my opponent John Boozman, I won’t just go along to get along. I’m a conservative warrior who will FIGHT every day for our America First agenda and stand up to the D.C. Establishment. Election Day is just a few days away, and early voting has already begun. I hope you’ll get out and support my campaign to bring REAL CHANGE to Washington, D.C.! Sincerely, Jake Bequette
---

name: Patty Murray
subject: What I’m fighting for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I need your help to continue this critical work
#
Peter,

Each and every day I’m fighting to build a stronger, fairer country for us all – one that puts working families over the profits of giant corporations, protects basic rights like the right to abortion and voting rights, celebrates our differences and diversity, and makes it easier for people to not just survive, but thrive.

**[All of that and more is at stake in November if we don’t keep this seat and the Senate blue. That’s why I’m reaching out one more time to ask you to contribute $5 or whatever you can to become a Filing Founding Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45599878/346646127/1480838885?refcode=pm_em_220521_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDYxZDQ4Ni00Y2Q5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNHkDkpwIznL-Jzv6qIYxhXDqHOPIls66Y3kiegBrlU=)**

body:
Colorado Republican Rumble Starts at 12 PM MT!

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=2f05d9632f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_21_05_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-2f05d9632f-584862049

** The Colorado Republican Rumble
------------------------------------------------------------

** Live Stream Debate
------------------------------------------------------------

Below is a link to the Colorado Republican Rumble Live Stream Debate for those of you who were unable to attend or purchase tickets before they were sold out!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MaMnKndKqwE&utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=2f05d9632f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_21_05_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-2f05d9632f-584862049
Gubernatorial Debate Begins at 2:00 PM MT - Vote Greg Lopez!

** Greg Lopez will Debate Heidi Ganahl at 2:00 PM MT
------------------------------------------------------------

The Gubernatorial Debate Format will be (in no set order within the opening and closing sections):
* 30 Second Introductions
* Back and Forth Questions with Opponent Responses
* Each Candidate Will Ask the Other One Question
* A Lightning Round
* 3 Minutes Closing Statements

Please also consider voting for Greg in the Western Conservative Summit Straw Poll HERE (https://twitter.com/jeffhunt/status/1527777001561530370?t=6VpUK-f4qRyu7I6afiL4rA&s=19&utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=2f05d9632f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_21_05_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-2f05d9632f-584862049) .

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=2f05d9632f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_21_05_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-2f05d9632f-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
** Make A Donation (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=2f05d9632f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_21_05_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-2f05d9632f-584862049)

Friend, as President Biden's press secretary, Jen Psaki has stood firm against Republican attacks on the Biden-Harris agenda, refuted dangerous misinformation from extremists and played a crucial role in communicating the administration's response to COVID-19.
**But today is Psaki's last day as press secretary, and the GOP is ALREADY trying to cement a legacy for her based on lies and record-smearing. We need to show her that dedicated Democrats are on her side and grateful for all she's done. **
**We have to collect all our signatures before Psaki's last day officially ends at 11:59 p.m. tonight, but your response is still missing! We've handpicked you to sign, so please:**

clean_body: Honoring Jen Psaki! Quick check-in, friend: We'd planned on closing submissions for our official thank-you card to President Biden's now-former press secretary, Jen Psaki, first thing tomorrow morning – but there's a problem. We double-checked, and it looks we're still missing 12 signatures from 18326! This is the best way we know how to share our sincere gratitude for everything Jen Psaki did as press secretary: fighting disinformation from Republican extremists, promoting the Biden-Harris agenda and ensuring the American people heard from a trusted voice every day. But we don't want to send our well wishes without including yours! Please, don't miss your chance to sign the official card: Thanks, Team Lopez \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: SIGN THE CARD >> Date: Fri, May 13, 2022 Subject: Add your name before midnight | | | TODAY IS JEN PSAKI'S LAST DAY AS PRESIDENT BIDEN'S PRESS SECRETARY – BUT YOU HAVEN'T SIGNED HER THANK-YOU CARD?! | | Friend, as President Biden's press secretary, Jen Psaki has stood firm against Republican attacks on the Biden-Harris agenda, refuted dangerous misinformation from extremists and played a crucial role in communicating the administration's response to COVID-19. body:
We have put in countless hours sharing why Joe Jaworski is the right candidate to defeat Ken Paxton in November. Now it's time to celebrate! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13656882?e=5d8d80652b)

| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d8fedda80d&e=5d8d80652b)

| | ,

We have put in countless hours of hard work and reached out to Texans all across our great state to tell them why we believe Joe Jaworski is the right candidate to defeat Ken Paxton in November. **Now it's time to celebrate!**

**Join Joe Jaworski and the campaign team at Candente in Houston on Tuesday, May 24 starting at 7 PM to watch the election results come in and celebrate our efforts to elect Joe as our next Texas Attorney General.**

When:**Tuesday, May 24 @ 7pm**
Where: **Candente in Houston (4306 Yoakum Blvd. #120) —**[**RSVP on Mobilize here**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=a0cb7c07ac&e=5d8d80652b)
[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2a04c62599&e=5d8d80652b) _Food and beverages will be provided, and a cash bar will be available._
We appreciate all that you have done - whether it be making a donation, volunteering your time, or simply sharing information about Joe on social media or with your friends and family - and know that we wouldn't be here without every member of the Jaworski Team, including **YOU**! We hope you can join us for this fun election night watch party. [**Please sign up to let us know you will be there.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=b4f31db3ee&e=5d8d80652b)

Thanks again for everything! Now let's go win this election!

Team Jaworski

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: LAST CHANCE: Vote Before 4pm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I'm counting on your support to be our nominee against Wexton this November. Please vote BEFORE 4pm today! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a55594bd0d61/make-a-plan-to-vote-this-saturday-5395503?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=36571bd9fe&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

Polls close at 4pm today. Please come out and make your voice heard in our Republican nomination contest before 4pm!

I'm counting on your support to be our Republican nominee against Jennifer Wexton this November.

Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE.

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=650e8ddea8&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1697ea6234&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

clean_body: I'm counting on your support to be our nominee against Wexton this November. Please vote BEFORE 4pm today! | | | | | | | "Donate" | , Polls close at 4pm today. Please come out and make your voice heard in our Republican nomination contest before 4pm! I'm counting on your support to be our Republican nominee against Jennifer Wexton this November. Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE. If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com Thank you, Jeanine FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote. Prince William County: your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district. If you live in Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville. If you live in Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville. If you live in Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas. Loudoun County: Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington. If you live in Blue Ridge district , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the . Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School. Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School. If you live in Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville. If you live in Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn. If you live in Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie. Fauquier County: Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton. Rappahannock County : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington. Fairfax County : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton. Manassas City : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas. Manassas Park City : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park. If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.comand we can help you determine where to vote. | | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | I appreciate your support, and I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November! clean_body: Showing the entire country just how much of a crook she really is. | Friend, I know you hear a lot from myself and others about how we’re only 5 seats away from flipping the House. But these midterms aren’t just about Republicans taking back the House from Democrats. It’s about giving control of Congress back to YOU, the American people... ...To finally FIRE Nancy Pelosi – the crook who’s amassed a personal fortune of $114 MILLION over 3 decades in Congress off the backs of hardworking Americans. Just look at her, caught red-handed the other day on a shopping spree at Saks Fifth Avenue flashing her Amex card to onlookers, refusing to even hold her own umbrella. Don’t be fooled, Pelosi’s flashy shopping sprees and her $24,000 freezer full of luxury ice creams that she loves to show off are being paid for by YOU. She’s turned her control of Congress into a cash cow that feeds on her entrenched political power. Friend, both elected officials and soldiers alike are tasked with defending our country and our freedoms. I served in the U.S. Army and fought terrorists while flying Apache helicopters over Iraq, so believe me, I have no issue calling out Pelosi for who she truly is... ...A crook who’s disgraced her duty to serve the American people. But only you can stop her by helping ensure we win all 5 of the seats we need to END her majority. And it’s my true honor to be running for the last of those 5 seats – the final nail in the coffin for Pelosi’s majority. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
My calling in life is to serve others. Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans. It’s one of the reasons I joined the Marine Corps – to do something that mattered, beyond myself. Something that would help people. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxGYgR92q7EhZfN-4ir_Ds8vygwBw2AaYVBJLcAFReFsfXcKw1PXq1nmBHl7zBy1h3vDeAlRcgHy2TqQ-i_5yNUzHTm_rF6ffvr35oKruO2ANhUGn7jt98VH8dt7KqI28xvZcHHemEHiRnMgM9QCBU7HnXFs661XUzeQlUgNEONpitTPbaY7Yi_cjG9HTdiLfm53oSrUNqFB6o2l4ZFVXmUE%3D)

Fellow American,

[**My calling in life is to serve others.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxLKv0LATngtTCldJWXX_ijz8Cbxq037K3IEFm4OGlezNR4Fk3Ia-lRY9clyAw0Cc7hxgln-cBf4kz2YhykZ5YUnfJ3u4ORcsMiuI816gGhEurJjo_NSqYJlStORf5SKFrOG0D9wqQDGnp8GBmn51M52lq_iGp9RMD84WdcWZoBYv3hCo-pePa4hvrBIiHi_OnoEfP52_D7oQCXAXZWVIr3Q%3D)

**_Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans._**

It’s one of the reasons I joined the Marine Corps – to do something that mattered, beyond myself. Something that would help people. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed.

When I got home, I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed in and I knew I had to jump in and to help, so I hopped into a congressional race in a swing district with no resources, knowledge, or background in politics. I knew things would be tough, but as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! **My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%.**

[**SEND IN THE MARINE » **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxOJsrKaVfji0ksJMMe5k3FBqz2DXhW06RhMduFs72MYethbsEoWk9ymgCflbeYmv5zINnPUw4mSKSkWosyA6WXuzhEQ52EfifRlKErwRXs-Uuo9mj5yyQCugXtiUzB8Or0VuWAngStxxhq853c7SSxRjWZdYEwa6s7uxufk-TsNM6gBdfTqkX1dR_ObCGaWMfzNV-8KVTrzYSUHyhrwtCI4%3D)
In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s **because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes** in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election.

I’m running to unseat the same Pelosi-approved Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, [**her latest report to the Federal Elections Commission indicated she has more than $3 million to use in attacks against my campaign.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxInVK0E0zXRbLeg9zIlD2HuqRXmkefNcQLIBV4SIEy96GQeK-aX3tze_2xXf7OQCLun2TR-FTrJI_vujZsaxktCFrjD4qNdo5ABkKHAAL1ZxX_nfF13ViqO-JVbnMSZw2BMtOGItUD2xzpril1CDSQtnyZSuvXfHwc10Uc8dO581DhnoZ7969euBxBIYldtXh4pfUqT3M9vo7r-CJhedw1A%3D)

Just like last time, this race will be _very_ close. That’s probably why both Dems and Republicans alike have labeled this as a top-targeted race. [**In a district with as many Republican voters as Democrats, this race could really go either way. That’s why I need you. Will you join my team via contribution of $2, maybe $3 today?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxMyqAJCUeT2JBbC-nJjVZE0EMO4EhzXed8nQl8Ibc1qwsEABn7HKCLY9VvH28cHOMSf-pdg0qUWyp3-QpBI8NnSNjtP2oLdrkWE11LM48FWpAIa2jXiR3uTjBLU5MEGIAO-ACCZRajVRisd_tRlAZT89-7GqiAb_UfXyXQ7sdo8N9d7fBoRTckcH0tKiZ5S9_FCyAi8lOqSUrggXtxXp-Mc%3D)

[**FLIP A TOSSUP HOUSE SEAT » **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxPVkajV1ezY_B1cK7Cm5F8FcCbjAhniXahAV9r40oTas7j3lJdPYxwKayhsos5sTcGrLOJZYK1QhAi_pb9KXqHnb5ahlCmRcJXVdhNSoOMO8BfqhIeipVb46U5OY5OVPW47gcdmlbSYASvPukGulrtmSxOm_m2FYSRek9y4xnZliY8OVyvc8Ot_9iX3aTE4wTjfDkKqVj3sctyiHufuagsg%3D)
[**I’m running for Congress for one reason: to serve the American people.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=89bb650401ce4215901ecee58241de1f&_e=omkL1fFkR5g_HWEd7c8ZZEC0VlFuJulQ7M4-1ZxQBCWX6NQdy78zhqXr69vPnDNv1xKsxccL0ePj_7sJtR75rM0jU64WE827_6gcfrkyQ-uNO0eiBoU8qMM3kw7tEFDCbya26uKnmLei27SZdGVm7YEPKJPzJ2Ni1sRyDBHub9AtRMkeUUFgIT02HA1H-hXPasAagZ_9lRLT2jRd2s7wVB4WceTDuFIndwHTVu-MfxrTEf0FILXYZohvW2X31EpRachP0t0fpI4NbwKxqfUQxGgXNeQs2HiNNgnqfwYsrApHl0a7pYqaqs3f-FtK8SmCIbyC8NITlQ2CIfBFcPDY7scdsXLCWWMnaQlnfVa8iVTjk7ZXvu1aTOMpJhpOqpJap6awdB6myDbaL_dRlL8QOxefR31VlL6VcPixagWi5429N2I6UN0JhHXtMarjhmLAFKsfF92VSn_34hK6-x0yLiPDGcBQWM-a7lO3ckBWlKQ%3D) I’m never going to be the loudest conservative in the House – nor the most colorful – but I’ll put my head down and work diligently to get the work of the people done. _**Isn’t that worth something anymore?**_

The Marines taught me to never give up and that everything is achievable if one works hard enough for it. Over the past two years I’ve laid in bed wondering what might have been if I had an adequately funded campaign. I’ll never know. I do know that I’m running against the same Democrat who beat me in 2020 and this race is likely going to be even closer than the one from two years ago. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: **I’d hate to get so close to victory again and run out of money just before Election Day.**

Today, I’m asking for your help – because I know that this mission will take a strong team, and that no man can win alone. clean_body: My calling in life is to serve others. Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans. It’s one of the reasons I joined the Marine Corps – to do something that mattered, beyond myself. Something that would help people. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed. | Fellow American, Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans. It’s one of the reasons I joined the Marine Corps – to do something that mattered, beyond myself. Something that would help people. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed. When I got home, I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed in and I knew I had to jump in and to help, so I hopped into a congressional race in a swing district with no resources, knowledge, or background in politics. I knew things would be tough, but as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. I’m running to unseat the same Pelosi-approved Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, Just like last time, this race will be very close. That’s probably why both Dems and Republicans alike have labeled this as a top-targeted race. I’m never going to be the loudest conservative in the House – nor the most colorful – but I’ll put my head down and work diligently to get the work of the people done. Isn’t that worth something anymore? The Marines taught me to never give up and that everything is achievable if one works hard enough for it. Over the past two years I’ve laid in bed wondering what might have been if I had an adequately funded campaign. I’ll never know. I do know that I’m running against the same Democrat who beat me in 2020 and this race is likely going to be even closer than the one from two years ago. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: I’d hate to get so close to victory again and run out of money just before Election Day. Today, I’m asking for your help – because I know that this mission will take a strong team, and that no man can win alone. In 2010, I took an oath to defend our nation and serve our country – and that oath will never expire. I’ve approached this campaign the same way I approach everything in life, through servant leadership. But every leader knows it is their team that makes them great, not themselves. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. | | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Drug Overdoses – Whitmer Fails Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Drug overdoses hit a new record high under Whitmer’s watch. 3,040 lives were lost last year and Whitmer owns this. | | | |
---
| | | Peter – there’s a disturbing report in the _Detroit Free Press_ this week – “[Michigan breaks grim record: More drug overdose deaths than ever, again](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f50999405d&e=0636b97700).”

Drug overdoses hit a new record high under Whitmer’s watch. 3,040 lives were lost last year and Whitmer owns this.

I’m not surprised. It’s something I see every day. And it should not be happening, but _because of Gretchen Whitmer’s incompetence and her disdain for law enforcement, things are worse than they should be_.

_**Whitmer has refused to fully fund narcotics enforcement in Michigan.**_ I mentioned this in the first debate with the other candidates for Governor.

She has hamstrung law enforcement during her entire term in office.
---
| [HELP ME DEFEAT GRETCHEN WHITMER](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=c2fe04b343&e=0636b97700 "HELP ME DEFEAT GRETCHEN WHITMER")
---
| As someone who has been in law enforcement my entire career, I have two coexisting priorities: putting drug dealers out of business and helping citizens recover from their addiction.

On the enforcement side of the equation, _we should be going directly after the source, the drug dealers that are bringing fentanyl, methamphetamine, and cocaine into our state_.

This impacts every county in Michigan, from the upper peninsula to Monroe County. **_As Governor, I will ensure that our narcotics enforcement is fully funded_**.
---
| | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=41b00db42e&e=0636b97700)
---
Right now law enforcement agencies must rely on asset forfeiture to piecemeal their budgets in hopes of obtaining enough funding to get the job done.

We have multi-jurisdictional narcotics task forces like UPSET in the upper peninsula that are doing great work, but must spend an enormous amount of time fundraising to keep the lights on.
---
| This is a ridiculous way to approach law enforcement. We must fully fund our anti-drug efforts to give law enforcement the tools they need to get these illegal drugs off our streets and put the drug dealers behind bars.

Last year, _Whitmer was ridiculed for spending tens of thousands of dollars for unnecessary signs for MDOT_ while narcotics teams are basically holding bake sales to pay the bills.
---
| [GRETCHEN WHITMER MUST GO. YOU CAN HELP.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ef72524282&e=0636b97700 "GRETCHEN WHITMER MUST GO. YOU CAN HELP.")
---
| I am the only candidate for Governor to put forward a comprehensive public safety plan. Called “[Safe Communities, Safe Michigan](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=acc3e95b48&e=0636b97700),” the main points of my plan include:
* Continued funding for law enforcement;
* Advocacy and support for crime victims;
* Targeted support for reducing violent crime;
* Fully-funded narcotics enforcement;
* Improved school safety;
* Enhanced police recruitment and training; and
* Better implementation of technology.

Whitmer’s casual indifference to the suffering in our state and to the real struggle our narcotics enforcement officers face every day is just one more example of why voters will reject her this November.

[Will you stand with me so we can defeat Whitmer?](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4f1fce7601&e=0636b97700)** **

I need your financial support now more than ever as we ramp up in the coming weeks.

[Will you donate $25, $50, $100 or more?](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=1bbd110549&e=0636b97700) It would mean a lot.

Together we can win this.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|

Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

I need your financial support now more than ever as we ramp up in the coming weeks. It would mean a lot. Together we can win this. Thank you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: LAST CHANCE: Vote Before 4pm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I'm counting on your support to be our nominee against Wexton this November. Please vote BEFORE 4pm today! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2337d4d6e336/make-a-plan-to-vote-this-saturday-5395507?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=73b84ad4b6&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

Polls close at 4pm today. Please come out and make your voice heard in our Republican nomination contest before 4pm!

I'm counting on your support to be our Republican nominee against Jennifer Wexton this November.

Make sure you come out today bring your photo ID, and VOTE.

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3bf9e519cd&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8c0364f083&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

[Please also consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=29e31cf276&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=36d1150d64&e=fc83fb200d)[to support our campaign in the final days and get us across the finish line!.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=96674d832a&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4778870b41&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=323a0b75f4&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=56f23704c0&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=afaae23631&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f9acba430a&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I appreciate your support, and I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---
|

|

clean_body: That’s how close this is... | Peter, Our race is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. In 2020, our new district would have voted for Joe Biden by just 395 votes. With Biden failing on the border, inflation, and national security, I’m confident we can make up that 395-vote margin and turn this blue seat red. But to beat Nancy Pelosi and the full might of the Democrat establishment, I’m counting on the sustained support of dedicated conservatives like yourself. The survival of the American dream depends on conservatives taking back control of the House in November. We MUST provide a check on Joe Biden’s radical agenda and begin working to get our country back on track. Otherwise, we’ll be in for another two years of socialism, open-borders, censorship, and radical “woke” policies that do nothing to help the American people. My race is one of the best opportunities we have to pick up a seat. I’m ready to fight for YOU in Congress. Together, we can win this thing. Can I count on you to stand with me as I battle to win this all-important race? Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Rachel Maddow said that we have "a difficult reelection fight ahead..."

Senator Chris Murphy said that we can’t keep the Senate majority without New Hampshire. If we lose, we’re “toast.”
Ken Burns said that “with the Senate split 50-50, and with Washington divided, I believe her reelection will be an uphill battle..”

name: John Fetterman
subject: Sheetz > Wawa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m gonna talk about growing up in Pennsylvania.
#
Derek,
I’m gonna talk about growing up in Pennsylvania, but first, I have to ask: [**Can you chip in $5 to become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign? I’m *so* grateful for your support, Derek, (even if you think Wawa > Sheetz).**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-2?refcode=em20220521-5923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5923_434096_3pwHdR&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)
Ok, now onto the good stuff.
I was born in Reading, Pennsylvania when my parents were just two teenagers starting out on their own. I love my parents, even if Gisele is their favorite.
We started out struggling. My dad was a union grocery worker at ShopRite, working night shifts. The union way of life helped keep our family together while he went to college. Dad ended up graduating, and got a good job as an underwriter.
After we moved, I grew up in suburban south central Pennsylvania. I graduated from Central York High School and went to college in Reading, just like my dad did. **When I left Pennsylvania for grad school, I *never* envisioned myself ending up in public service** — not as Mayor of Braddock for 15 years, and certainly not as Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-2?refcode=em20220521-5923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5923_434096_3pwHdR&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)
But I came back to Pennsylvania because that's where my heart is. **And alongside my amazing wife, Gisele, I have dedicated my life to improving our Commonwealth.**
When Pennsylvania lawmakers pushed outdated, discriminatory policies banning marriage equality, I officiated one of the first gay marriages in Pennsylvania. 🌈
When Braddock was overlooked and counted out, we created jobs and got young people engaged. We created a community center, urban gardens, and a free store run by Gisele. ✊
And when the Pennsylvania GOP sent their flag police to take down my weed + pride flags, I put them back up. **I’m just gonna keep doing that.** ✅
[**If that’s the kind of never-give-up attitude you want to see in the U.S. Senate, can you chip in $5 to join Fetterman for PA as a Founding Donor? To be successful, we’re gonna need to build a huge campaign across all 67 counties in Pennsylvania.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-2?refcode=em20220521-5923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5923_434096_3pwHdR&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220521-2?refcode=em20220521-5923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5923_434096_3pwHdR&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)**
You may like Wawa more than Sheetz. You may say #FlyEaglesFly while I say #HereWeGo. **But help send me to the U.S. Senate and I’ll fight for *all* of youse, just like I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvania my whole life.**
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220521-5923-footer&t=2&refcode2=5923_434096_3pwHdR&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5923%2E434096%2E3pwHdR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But help send me to the U.S. Senate and I’ll fight for all of youse, just like I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvania my whole life. Thanks, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
Congressman Timmons Using Transgender Titles | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a0bac2dd1d3c/happy-new-year-6079789?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** BREAKING NEWS - Timmons Goes FULL BLOWN WokeismCongressman William Richardson Timmons IV has crossed over to the dark side. He has disgraced the office of the U.S. House of Representatives.His congressional office is now supporting the TRANSGENDER name title “Mx.” Google explains that it is a gender neutral title. This sickens me to my core. Evidently, William Richardson Timmons IV believes that transgenderism, wokeness, and nonbinary titles are the way to go.What I want to know, WHAT IS NEXT? Timmons has said and done some pretty PROGRESSIVE LEFTIST things of late. This is who he is at his core. He is not a TRUE CONSERVATIVE.-Supports the lefts agenda on name titles – Mx-Says on YouTube that he agrees with A.O.C. 5-10% of the time-Voted to send $13.6 billion in aid to the Ukrainians (Conservatives Jeff Duncan + Ralph Norman voted NO)-Voted to send $40 billion in aid to the Ukrainians along with the SQUAD (Conservatives Jeff Duncan + Ralph Norman voted NO)-Says on YouTube, “I am not for Lindsey Graham” and then supports him financially while aggressively campaigning for him-Says on YouTube that he votes the way a majority of his constituents want him to vote. (Just wondering how that works? Does he perform an informal referendum on each vote? Does he believe in a pure democracy like the progressive left instead of representative government?)Will he attack the Latinos next and force them to use Latinx????Vote Mike LaPierre for CongressSC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg CountiesAn evangelical Christian who can “mark” the secular humanist trees through a God-given forest.
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|

name: John Legend
subject: I am not from Hollywood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]A personal message from John Legend

Friend,

Democrat Tim Ryan is in a dead heat race for Ohio’s open Senate seat and
he needs our help.

You might not know this, but I was born into a blue-collar family in
Springfield, Ohio. My dad was a factory worker. My mom was a tailor. And I
got my start in music singing in the church choir.

I’ve never forgotten where I come from—I know the challenges Ohio families
are facing, because my family faced them too. That’s how I know Ohio needs
Tim Ryan in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Republicans are spending millions and working overtime to defeat Tim.
Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a contribution of
whatever you can to win this crucial race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate

There’s a real struggle happening in our country between love and
fear—between advancing civil rights for everyone or stripping them away,
between treating refugees with compassion or as criminals, between lifting
up working families or continuing to punish poverty.

Republicans are actively working to take us in the wrong direction, down
the path of fear. If they take back the Senate, there’s no telling the
damage they’ll do.

Right now, Tim Ryan is neck-and-neck with his Republican opponent in a
race that will decide control of the Senate, and ultimately, the kind of
country we live in.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Tim needs your help to pull ahead. I’m personally asking you to make a
donation to his campaign to help him win this important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1013&amount=25&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1014&amount=50&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1015&amount=100&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1016&amount=200&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1007&amount=250&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13101?t=1008&amount=30&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Other Amount

Together, we can make sure that love wins in Ohio.

Thanks,

John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=3821%2E3611125%2E8n5NcP ]Donate Monthly

Hi Peter Willis,
Late last night, **our district map was finalized!** This new map fully reflects the community that I grew up in and spent years organizing in before I ever considered a run for Congress. **It also means that I am now the only true progressive candidate fighting for our families in the race for Congress in NY-03.**
We now have the chance to finally bring true change to this district, and fight for our working families. From Medicare For All, to canceling student debt, to unrigging the Supreme Court, to protecting voter rights and reproductive rights. **_Our campaign is from our community, and will fight for our community._**
Keeping this seat blue will require a true grassroots candidate that can excite and rally Democrats to the polls. **I am that candidate, with the most endorsements and most small-dollar grassroots donations.**
**[Will you make a donation today to help us keep fighting through the August primary and the general election?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv2ezW1JGMHTIVIJXTe4hZF3-4_YAuBeWx6MLFwDkUMJxZkY4fAsimBf-7NaRyrE-ybOKEoQa6jL9V8WvV-ePbi4xXJAYNj7pXF6hDzXgqB50yBY4O7l_QQRMpkTsELzRJRxn8fZxE_MX0AodNFThGfz6BvG6-gdvTfWvWND0UbINxLAWzX4vZ4y68C4rJIaKKIWTSw_x9sUXRaPWL-6doWatzKkp757utf8uUyzw4wMrqliqolvbJRcTPx2lvij-7BontgyiPKAx9olO8be7ZDo085MHMMQ0CqibjUYtI5zJZ13CQpj15M3bxpKx_L2JNfSTS9nozYYUtYv-inQQQoEEWzYU4LV-lqzupaxpl4nSMqCWZorRiyuShTC199p6KXLsHe9hJQBo5Dj7CjYxNO_69nQeP6lcDXlWJxFlwA0fg/3m8/rZgplrUUQIKJB56idG1c8Q/h1/4eWqcR_3AKSaWhC7bvF-mKoJWH1ayXfmzmZpFyRl04s)**

clean_body: | | | | Hi Peter Willis, Late last night, our district map was finalized! This new map fully reflects the community that I grew up in and spent years organizing in before I ever considered a run for Congress. It also means that I am now the only true progressive candidate fighting for our families in the race for Congress in NY-03. We now have the chance to finally bring true change to this district, and fight for our working families. From Medicare For All, to canceling student debt, to unrigging the Supreme Court, to protecting voter rights and reproductive rights. Our campaign is from our community, and will fight for our community. Keeping this seat blue will require a true grassroots candidate that can excite and rally Democrats to the polls. I am that candidate, with the most endorsements and most small-dollar grassroots donations. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for your support, Peter Willis. You make our movement for progressive change possible. Onward, Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Weapons, or housing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
As the jungle primary continues through June 7, we’re working to simulate the debate that Pelosi continues to duck. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O2Swc9IeVdSLXR_raLws3Ud9b9oQLALYabvmZ6xCqHP7IhIi5o7l-C3XRJ8YMj3r2pNUYSGp7TWXR7ZiP6H5wKKlgtFk6EqAXZJ_z2Lta2iRQDjs50IJbS37NMYO4HHuhRYC4xxkAr2-U-RJ13vEcKYEf-HkSfZkvjyZc_TULMsJqeB-9-bntCElaWM1zUIaXDaUzSAlLcthc-GU8Eqq2hO_5Zn38UtMIF6_pH9hmcVv/3m8/wBjLwhKWQl2BozMmEcXjXw/h0/vun2rjw0ssQZ-0U2YTDzjdtwzVvLjNTKAeJsxcRNyNE)
| | Dear Peter, This week, Congress approved another $40 billion of weapons purchases. That’s twice the amount it would have taken to end homeless across the United States. Half a million Americans live without housing. Congress made an affirmative choice to abandon their needs, prioritizing the profits of weapons manufacturers first. [**Would you rather see our city’s voice in Washington working to establish a right to housing than selling weapons abroad?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIB8NNMNo6qVy5oE9Mql0C-DPJRRlKbuK4cSOUpzQ9jB3kADu-nSwVIeg7QYNtroqrU60GoJwLJfgLaZjS-nfPF2qdfDBAsezQsQIblRE0I3Fh_twetk8bcbptpBJFxb1FjGSyYHoybwfBrwvSjp5dc0-zCLJJpBtHy1m4qEr-xjGKOCx8zEwQIsy3_8uxVh26o8nwjRhvtZ6PwPlxyj44nJdAmnVczTS4PbX6b47QZrnxYsJmso9ielEmnV1DesSj6y4OGteklYPvYEjd1krfi6ljfvIEZIIHGA6uJRFuzSkihI6sUxMxhl3DXrPLeKjzAxivzLimZ5f98ScDolAJ4/3m8/wBjLwhKWQl2BozMmEcXjXw/h1/VpSyAeT6VMfBeMRj70yZfLfQlMNLKJeyvsRzoewcbck) The human rights crisis in Ukraine is real. The Pentagon—enabled by Congress—also helped instigate it. Meanwhile, at least 20 Members of Congress are personally invested in the publicly traded stocks of weapons manufacturers, positioning them to personally profit from their decisions. This is worse than mere corruption. This is corruption enabling international conflict. [**Would you rather see San Francisco’s voice in Washington advocating for a ban on congressional insider trading to stem this corrupting corporate influence on Congress, or instead embodying that corruption?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIB8NNMNo6qVy5oE9Mql0C-DPJRRlKbuK4cSOUpzQ9jB3kADu-nSwVIeg7QYNtroqrU60GoJwLJfgLaZjS-nfPF2qdfDBAsezQsQIblRE0I3INWVv4qtq3Z5dItGndDg1zHedNWCaWVOeJlxw8VrZL9nVDGM322okqt71r316Cv9Y30fU4GFOvrby-WxxLMAwMEfRwsLvLY6dPpQWt_QB5vbUxvrzVdFBE0h0_xLEDPUAYJMlX9vYrzHs19Dxo97jvCdww6c2E2-qDF-d2I7XvQX5-FJ9e3-Q1TrbggOur5rvYJIfX4ydC-7spGy7ZjSLUYQy5yPC-B85ydAOHtpWii/3m8/wBjLwhKWQl2BozMmEcXjXw/h2/w5Z9yIVIu9OEayK1fzn5KJuSwjpg7ArePSaGmT5SuwA) Since Pelosi is continuing to duck debates—for the 35th year in a row—we’ve been forced to get creative in exposing her record and the alternative that we present. Our latest volunteer-led project is a video comparing our comments and perspectives on insider trading by Members of Congress. clean_body: As the jungle primary continues through June 7, we’re working to simulate the debate that Pelosi continues to duck. | | | | | Dear Peter, This week, Congress approved another $40 billion of weapons purchases. That’s twice the amount it would have taken to end homeless across the United States. Half a million Americans live without housing. Congress made an affirmative choice to abandon their needs, prioritizing the profits of weapons manufacturers first. The human rights crisis in Ukraine is real. The Pentagon—enabled by Congress—also helped instigate it. Meanwhile, at least 20 Members of Congress are personally invested in the publicly traded stocks of weapons manufacturers, positioning them to personally profit from their decisions. This is worse than mere corruption. This is corruption enabling international conflict. Since Pelosi is continuing to duck debates—for the 35th year in a row—we’ve been forced to get creative in exposing her record and the alternative that we present. Our latest volunteer-led project is a video comparing our comments and perspectives on insider trading by Members of Congress. The video is available on , as well as and , and we encourage you to share it on whichever platforms you use. Thanks for standing with us and helping defend the future from the failures of the past! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . name: Our Revolution
subject: REV REPORT: Beating the Manchin Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: BIG Election Wins | Progressives BEAT Manchin Dems | Summer Lee
Victory in PA-12 | Jamie McLeod-Skinner in OR-5 | Bernie vs. Big Tech |
Cawthorn Out of Office | Roe v Wade Actions | SC Labor Forum | M4A Day of
Action | Larry Cohen: On Democracy | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220521_1_1&recurring=true?t=1011&refcode2=2947_5885482_zZRp-T&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]We scored major wins this week with Summer Lee and Jamie McLeod-Skinner
— proving that organizing can outmatch big money. On Tuesday, Jessica
Cisneros takes on anti-choice “Dem” Henry Cuellar, and we need you to
become a RECURRING DONOR to Our Revolution right now to fund our voter
outreach in Texas & beyond!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1012&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

Join us this Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for our National
‘Organize to Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota
Attorney General Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in
2022!

Congressional races are heating up, and we’ll be strategizing directly
with Mike Ortega (CA-46), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), and Litesa Wallace (IL-17)
— tune-in to meet these incredible allies and help get them into office!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1014&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1015&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

ORGANIZING TO OUTMATCH BIG MONEY

Our Revolution candidates pulled off pivotal wins on Tuesday because our
movement out-organized and outworked the monied interests. Our
people-powered operation activated voters to elect progressives and
deliver serious blows against the Manchin wing of the Party.

In Oregon, Jamie McLeod-Skinner took a decisive lead over Blue-Dog Kurt
Shrader — nicknamed “Joe Manchin of the House” for famously undercutting
Biden’s agenda and being a key vote against lowering drug prices.

Biden still came out to endorse Shrader against Jamie and Big Pharma
helped him outspend her 10:1. But her progressive platform triumphed, and
Jamie is set to become the first queer representative in the 5th District
come November!

“Kurt Schrader became the national poster boy for learning the hard way,”
Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5552?t=1016&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]The Hill.
“Progressives won some big races despite millions of dollars from
corporate billionaires pouring into Democratic primaries.”

In PA-12, years of grassroots organizing in Pittsburgh helped Summer Lee
overcome $4.5M in spending against her to defeat a union avoidance lawyer
running as a corporate Dem. Before the money poured in, Summer had a
25-point lead — but our movement still pulled out this historic win!

Also in Pennsylvania, John Fetterman won in a landslide against
Establishment darling Conor Lamb. Despite insurance companies funding
bizarre ads against him - and suffering a stroke days before the election
- he won every county in the state to secure its Democratic US Senate
nomination.

In his race, Fetterman explicitly slammed Joe Manchin, who endorsed his
opponent, and came out on top by a margin of 2:1.

Not coincidentally, a new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5553?t=1017&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]NBC News poll shows the same 2:1 margin among
Democratic voters, who want to vote for a candidate “who proposes
larger-scale policies that cost more and might be harder to pass into law,
but could bring major change” vs. incremental change proposals.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1018&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

All told, in recent elections, AIPAC, crypto, and billionaires teamed up
to spend more than $18M helping corporate-aligned Democrats and hindering
working-class candidates.

A flood of corporate cash blanketed the airwaves attacking progressive
women of color running for Congress — resulting in losses for Nida Allam
in NC-4, Erica Smith in NC-1, and Attica Scott in KY-3.

“The same groups have been spending heavily in primaries across the map
this cycle,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5554?t=1019&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Roll
Call. “It’s insane that a couple of issue groups can spend this much money
and have a real impact on races.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1020&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Our fight is far from finished! The Texas primary is this TUESDAY —
chip in now to help us GROW THE SQUAD by getting more progressives like
Jessica Cisneros over the finish line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1021&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

On Friday, Bernie joined Jessica Cisneros for a rally in San Antonio to
get out the early vote ahead of Tuesday in her runoff against Henry
Cuellar - one of the WORST “Democrats” in Congress.

Cuellar is anti-choice, anti-worker, and brazenly corrupt — a faithful
servant of Big Pharma and Big Oil. While he has the backing of Speaker
Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Jim Clyburn, Jessica has our progressive movement
behind her.

Also this Tuesday, money is pouring in against Jasmine Crockett and
Michele Vallejo who are also running against the establishment in Texas.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1022&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

We can expect to see more of the “Ohio Model for Purging Progressives”
they first honed against Nina Turner in the pivotal races just around the
corner, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5555?t=1023&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]The American Prospect reports.

Bernie is leading the push to bring an end to this warfare - calling on
DNC Chair Jamie Harrison to take action and ban Super PAC money in
Democratic primaries, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5556?t=1024&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Punchbowl reports.

“The goal of this billionaire-funded effort is to crush the candidacies of
a number of progressive women of color who are running for Congress,”
Bernie said.

The corporate establishment sees us growing stronger, and they’re
desperate to stop the ascendance of our multiracial, multigenerational
movement.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1025&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Rush a donation now to help elect powerful progressive candidates and
counter the corrosive effect of big money in politics!

CAWTHORN OUSTED FROM OFFICE

Our Revolution is thrilled to see insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn ousted
from Congress. He conceded his seat in North Carolina’s 11th District on
Tuesday to Republican challenger Chuck Edwards.

Our members and our partners at Free Speech For People are still battling
the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene in the courts, and we need your
support more than ever to uphold the Constitution which prohibits
insurrectionists from re-election.

With AIPAC funding 109 of them in the primaries, we have a lot of
important work in front of us. We’re up against Doug Mastriano and Scott
Perry in Pennsylvania, and in Arizona, we’re taking on US Reps. Paul Gosar
and Andy Biggs — and State Rep. Mark Finchem who joined the mob and
breached the Capitol on January 6th!

TAKE ACTION: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5525?t=1028&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Sign our petition to your state elections official
demanding they uphold the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the
ballot.

REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE ACTIONS

Our Revolution chapters around the country took part in a National Day of
Action - Bans Off Our Bodies - organized with Planned Parenthood.

Thousands came out in Princeton, NJ, Cleveland, Ohio, Columbia, SC, and
other cities to rally for reproductive justice.
Abortion is healthcare and healthcare is a human right. We cannot let the
far-right authoritarians undo decades of work on this critical issue.

Thanks to our organizers Anna-Marta Visky, Diane Morgan, Lucero Mesa,
Andrea Jimenez, Miguel Ribau, and others - and to Rep. Bonnie Watson
Coleman and everyone who joined these mobilizations to make the voice of
the majority heard!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1031&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

Our Revolution continues to ramp up pressure on President Biden to sign
executive actions strengthening workers’ ability to unionize and punish
union-busters.

“It’s incredibly powerful for the president to visibly show solidarity by
inviting low-wage workers to the Roosevelt Room, that’s awesome,” Our
Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5557?t=1032&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]The Hill. “The
pat on the back, the embrace, is not in itself enough. The president has
to use the full power of the United States government to help these
workers organize.”

Our Revolution also stands with Bernie to call on Biden to help low-wage
federal contract workers losing millions to bureaucratic fumbles amounting
to wage theft, as reported by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5558?t=1033&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]The Washington Post this week.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1034&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Support our work to grow worker power and carry forward the momentum
of the resurgence of the labor movement in America.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1035&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

Speaking of worker rights, Our Revolution South Carolina convened a Labor
Forum right before helping lead the Reproductive Rights Rally in downtown
Columbia.

South Carolina AFL-CIO President Charles Brave joined Gubernatorial
candidate Senator Mia McLeod and State House Candidate Keith Grey, Sr.

Brave, a longtime labor leader in both the AFL-CIO and the International
Longshoremen's Association, spoke of the “critical role unions played in
creating a middle-class, and the successes of the civil rights and women’s
rights movements.”

Senator McLeod pointed to low wages as one reason for the exodus of young
people from the state, calling “South Carolina a right to work for slave
wages state.” She pledged to “work to strengthen unions and fight to
repeal right-to-work laws.”

Grey decried increasing corporate reliance on “independent contractors”
and called for “adequate funding to enforce labor protection laws on the
books.”
