Last week, Our Revolution joined National Nurses United for a National Day
of Action, where supporters showed up to canvass customers at CVS stores
around the country.

We called on CVS Health to stop funding anti-Medicare for All efforts and
worked to raise awareness with customers of the company’s nefarious
actions.

CVS is the largest donor to the Partnership for America’s Health Care
Future, donating $5M to the dark money lobbying group fighting tooth and
nail against M4A and any candidates who support it – including Bernie’s
2020 campaign.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1038&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

Capitol Thursday with Bernie, who as Budget Committee Chairman held the
first-ever Senate hearing on Medicare for All and reintroduced the bill!

phase of our fight for Medicare for All. We are moving the ball forward!

FACEBOOK v. BERNIE
TAKING ON BIG TECH FOR DEMOCRACY

Did you see the big story in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5545?t=1041&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]The Daily Beast showing how Facebook
suppressed Bernie during his presidential campaign?

Facebook actually blocked constituents from seeing Bernie’s message and
told him to change his political platform to suit their social media
platform – despicable. A small number of companies have way too much
power, and it’s crippling our Democracy.

That’s why we’re fighting to break up the power of these big tech
monopolies acting as gatekeepers to the public square.

The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act would
enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and app markets. This will
give small businesses a fair shot and empower citizens with more choices
on the platforms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1042&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5546?t=1043&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]But we can’t win without your support. If you live in California or
Washington, click HERE to easily call your Senators and tell them to pass
these two important bills!

Not only are we calling for legislative actions, but we’re also calling on
President Biden to use the power of the Justice Department to crack down
on Big Tech.

While Google is pressuring the Biden administration to force DOJ
trust-buster Jonathan Kanter to recuse himself from investigating the
company, Our Revolution joined dozens of progressive and antitrust
advocacy groups to stand up against the tech giant, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5560?t=1044&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Bloomberg
reported.

If the DOJ doesn’t grant Kanter a waiver to scrutinize the company, “it
will not only be bending to these petulant and dangerous tactics but
giving other powerful corporate actors incentive to engage in similar
behavior,” our letter reads.

NEW DOCUMENTARY:
PROGRESSIVES ON A KNIFE’S EDGE

A new documentary by British outlet openDemocracy asks: Can US
Progressives Defeat Big Money and Trumpism? The film - Progressives on a
Knife’s Edge - features deep discussions with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Ro
Khanna, and Jamie Raskin, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5561?t=1046&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Common Dreams reports.

openDemocracy co-founder Anthony Barnett also spoke with Our Revolution
Chair Larry Cohen on the film about our organizing work, the state of the
Democratic Party, and the fight against fascism.

“Democracy itself is actually the leading issue when we do surveys,” Larry
said. “Without a better democracy, we won't have healthcare. We won’t
solve the climate crisis. We won’t deal with racial justice. We won’t deal
with the inequality of wealth.”

“Democrats are totally addicted to big money,” he told Barnett. “Not only
*can* progressives defeat Big Money and Trumpism, they’re the only
Democrats trying. This primary season, we must nominate candidates who
reject corporate money and the rightwing economic policies that go with
it.”

BATTLING THE PARTY FOR DEMOCRACY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5563?t=1052&akid=2947%2E5885482%2EzZRp-T ]Politico reported this week on our fight to make the Massachusetts
Democratic Party more democratic.

“A group of Democratic delegates that includes members of Our Revolution
Massachusetts is accusing the state party of stymying a resolution that
would eliminate a group of unelected members from the roughly 400-person
state committee,” Politico wrote.

Our Revolution organizer and Somerville delegate Rand Wilson is “leading
the charge to change the rules,” said Politico. Rand argues that having a
third of the state committee unelected — makes party leadership
“unaccountable to its grassroots base.”

We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: BIG Election Wins | Progressives BEAT Manchin Dems | Summer Lee Victory in PA-12 | Jamie McLeod-Skinner in OR-5 | Bernie vs. Big Tech | Cawthorn Out of Office | Roe v Wade Actions | SC Labor Forum | M4A Day of Action | Larry Cohen: On Democracy | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]We scored major wins this week with Summer Lee and Jamie McLeod-Skinner — proving that organizing can outmatch big money. On Tuesday, Jessica Cisneros takes on anti-choice “Dem” Henry Cuellar, and we need you to become a RECURRING DONOR to Our Revolution right now to fund our voter outreach in Texas & beyond! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join us this Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize to Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! Congressional races are heating up, and we’ll be strategizing directly with Mike Ortega (CA-46), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), and Litesa Wallace (IL-17) — tune-in to meet these incredible allies and help get them into office! [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ORGANIZING TO OUTMATCH BIG MONEY Our Revolution candidates pulled off pivotal wins on Tuesday because our movement out-organized and outworked the monied interests. Our people-powered operation activated voters to elect progressives and deliver serious blows against the Manchin wing of the Party. In Oregon, Jamie McLeod-Skinner took a decisive lead over Blue-Dog Kurt Shrader — nicknamed “Joe Manchin of the House” for famously undercutting Biden’s agenda and being a key vote against lowering drug prices. Biden still came out to endorse Shrader against Jamie and Big Pharma helped him outspend her 10:1. But her progressive platform triumphed, and Jamie is set to become the first queer representative in the 5th District come November! “Kurt Schrader became the national poster boy for learning the hard way,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Hill. “Progressives won some big races despite millions of dollars from corporate billionaires pouring into Democratic primaries.” In PA-12, years of grassroots organizing in Pittsburgh helped Summer Lee overcome $4.5M in spending against her to defeat a union avoidance lawyer running as a corporate Dem. Before the money poured in, Summer had a 25-point lead — but our movement still pulled out this historic win! Also in Pennsylvania, John Fetterman won in a landslide against Establishment darling Conor Lamb. Despite insurance companies funding bizarre ads against him - and suffering a stroke days before the election - he won every county in the state to secure its Democratic US Senate nomination. In his race, Fetterman explicitly slammed Joe Manchin, who endorsed his opponent, and came out on top by a margin of 2:1. Not coincidentally, a new [ ]NBC News poll shows the same 2:1 margin among Democratic voters, who want to vote for a candidate “who proposes larger-scale policies that cost more and might be harder to pass into law, but could bring major change” vs. incremental change proposals. [ ][IMG] All told, in recent elections, AIPAC, crypto, and billionaires teamed up to spend more than $18M helping corporate-aligned Democrats and hindering working-class candidates. A flood of corporate cash blanketed the airwaves attacking progressive women of color running for Congress — resulting in losses for Nida Allam in NC-4, Erica Smith in NC-1, and Attica Scott in KY-3. “The same groups have been spending heavily in primaries across the map this cycle,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]Roll Call. “It’s insane that a couple of issue groups can spend this much money and have a real impact on races.” [ ]Our fight is far from finished! The Texas primary is this TUESDAY — chip in now to help us GROW THE SQUAD by getting more progressives like Jessica Cisneros over the finish line. [ ][IMG] On Friday, Bernie joined Jessica Cisneros for a rally in San Antonio to get out the early vote ahead of Tuesday in her runoff against Henry Cuellar - one of the WORST “Democrats” in Congress. Cuellar is anti-choice, anti-worker, and brazenly corrupt — a faithful servant of Big Pharma and Big Oil. While he has the backing of Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Jim Clyburn, Jessica has our progressive movement behind her. Also this Tuesday, money is pouring in against Jasmine Crockett and Michele Vallejo who are also running against the establishment in Texas. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We can expect to see more of the “Ohio Model for Purging Progressives” they first honed against Nina Turner in the pivotal races just around the corner, [ ]The American Prospect reports. Bernie is leading the push to bring an end to this warfare - calling on DNC Chair Jamie Harrison to take action and ban Super PAC money in Democratic primaries, [ ]Punchbowl reports. “The goal of this billionaire-funded effort is to crush the candidacies of a number of progressive women of color who are running for Congress,” Bernie said. The corporate establishment sees us growing stronger, and they’re desperate to stop the ascendance of our multiracial, multigenerational movement. [ ]Rush a donation now to help elect powerful progressive candidates and counter the corrosive effect of big money in politics! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CAWTHORN OUSTED FROM OFFICE Our Revolution is thrilled to see insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn ousted from Congress. He conceded his seat in North Carolina’s 11th District on Tuesday to Republican challenger Chuck Edwards. Our members and our partners at Free Speech For People are still battling the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene in the courts, and we need your support more than ever to uphold the Constitution which prohibits insurrectionists from re-election. With AIPAC funding 109 of them in the primaries, we have a lot of important work in front of us. We’re up against Doug Mastriano and Scott Perry in Pennsylvania, and in Arizona, we’re taking on US Reps. Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs — and State Rep. Mark Finchem who joined the mob and breached the Capitol on January 6th! TAKE ACTION: [ ]Sign our petition to your state elections official demanding they uphold the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE ACTIONS Our Revolution chapters around the country took part in a National Day of Action - Bans Off Our Bodies - organized with Planned Parenthood. Thousands came out in Princeton, NJ, Cleveland, Ohio, Columbia, SC, and other cities to rally for reproductive justice. Abortion is healthcare and healthcare is a human right. We cannot let the far-right authoritarians undo decades of work on this critical issue. Thanks to our organizers Anna-Marta Visky, Diane Morgan, Lucero Mesa, Andrea Jimenez, Miguel Ribau, and others - and to Rep. Bonnie Watson Coleman and everyone who joined these mobilizations to make the voice of the majority heard! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution continues to ramp up pressure on President Biden to sign executive actions strengthening workers’ ability to unionize and punish union-busters. “It’s incredibly powerful for the president to visibly show solidarity by inviting low-wage workers to the Roosevelt Room, that’s awesome,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Hill. “The pat on the back, the embrace, is not in itself enough. The president has to use the full power of the United States government to help these workers organize.” Our Revolution also stands with Bernie to call on Biden to help low-wage federal contract workers losing millions to bureaucratic fumbles amounting to wage theft, as reported by [ ]The Washington Post this week. [ ]Support our work to grow worker power and carry forward the momentum of the resurgence of the labor movement in America. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Speaking of worker rights, Our Revolution South Carolina convened a Labor Forum right before helping lead the Reproductive Rights Rally in downtown Columbia. South Carolina AFL-CIO President Charles Brave joined Gubernatorial candidate Senator Mia McLeod and State House Candidate Keith Grey, Sr. Brave, a longtime labor leader in both the AFL-CIO and the International Longshoremen's Association, spoke of the “critical role unions played in creating a middle-class, and the successes of the civil rights and women’s rights movements.” Senator McLeod pointed to low wages as one reason for the exodus of young people from the state, calling “South Carolina a right to work for slave wages state.” She pledged to “work to strengthen unions and fight to repeal right-to-work laws.” Grey decried increasing corporate reliance on “independent contractors” and called for “adequate funding to enforce labor protection laws on the books.” [ ]WATCH THE LABOR FORUM HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CALLING OUT CVS’ ANTI-M4A SPENDING Last week, Our Revolution joined National Nurses United for a National Day of Action, where supporters showed up to canvass customers at CVS stores around the country. We called on CVS Health to stop funding anti-Medicare for All efforts and worked to raise awareness with customers of the company’s nefarious actions. CVS is the largest donor to the Partnership for America’s Health Care Future, donating $5M to the dark money lobbying group fighting tooth and nail against M4A and any candidates who support it – including Bernie’s 2020 campaign. [ ][IMG] We are undeterred! Also last week, Our Revolution members rallied at the Capitol Thursday with Bernie, who as Budget Committee Chairman held the first-ever Senate hearing on Medicare for All and reintroduced the bill! [ ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today to power the next phase of our fight for Medicare for All. We are moving the ball forward! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] FACEBOOK v. BERNIE TAKING ON BIG TECH FOR DEMOCRACY Did you see the big story in [ ]The Daily Beast showing how Facebook suppressed Bernie during his presidential campaign? Facebook actually blocked constituents from seeing Bernie’s message and told him to change his political platform to suit their social media platform – despicable. A small number of companies have way too much power, and it’s crippling our Democracy. That’s why we’re fighting to break up the power of these big tech monopolies acting as gatekeepers to the public square. The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and app markets. This will give small businesses a fair shot and empower citizens with more choices on the platforms. [ ][IMG] [ ]But we can’t win without your support. If you live in California or Washington, click HERE to easily call your Senators and tell them to pass these two important bills! Not only are we calling for legislative actions, but we’re also calling on President Biden to use the power of the Justice Department to crack down on Big Tech. While Google is pressuring the Biden administration to force DOJ trust-buster Jonathan Kanter to recuse himself from investigating the company, Our Revolution joined dozens of progressive and antitrust advocacy groups to stand up against the tech giant, [ ]Bloomberg reported. If the DOJ doesn’t grant Kanter a waiver to scrutinize the company, “it will not only be bending to these petulant and dangerous tactics but giving other powerful corporate actors incentive to engage in similar behavior,” our letter reads. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW DOCUMENTARY: PROGRESSIVES ON A KNIFE’S EDGE A new documentary by British outlet openDemocracy asks: Can US Progressives Defeat Big Money and Trumpism? The film - Progressives on a Knife’s Edge - features deep discussions with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna, and Jamie Raskin, [ ]Common Dreams reports. openDemocracy co-founder Anthony Barnett also spoke with Our Revolution Chair Larry Cohen on the film about our organizing work, the state of the Democratic Party, and the fight against fascism. “Democracy itself is actually the leading issue when we do surveys,” Larry said. “Without a better democracy, we won't have healthcare. We won’t solve the climate crisis. We won’t deal with racial justice. We won’t deal with the inequality of wealth.” “Democrats are totally addicted to big money,” he told Barnett. “Not only can progressives defeat Big Money and Trumpism, they’re the only Democrats trying. This primary season, we must nominate candidates who reject corporate money and the rightwing economic policies that go with it.” [ ]WATCH THE DOCUMENTARY HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] 2022 MEMBERSHIP REWARDS! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack, and at $15, you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders, we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world, but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BATTLING THE PARTY FOR DEMOCRACY [ ]Politico reported this week on our fight to make the Massachusetts Democratic Party more democratic. “A group of Democratic delegates that includes members of Our Revolution Massachusetts is accusing the state party of stymying a resolution that would eliminate a group of unelected members from the roughly 400-person state committee,” Politico wrote. Our Revolution organizer and Somerville delegate Rand Wilson is “leading the charge to change the rules,” said Politico. Rand argues that having a third of the state committee unelected — makes party leadership “unaccountable to its grassroots base.” We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the resolution for a vote at the convention. If you’re interested in helping reform the state party contact [ mailto:MassDemsForReform@gmail.com ]HERE. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join us Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize to Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! Congressional races are heating up, and we’ll be strategizing directly with Mike Ortega (CA-46), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), and Litesa Wallace (IL-17) — tune-in to meet these incredible allies and help get them into office! [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As we showed this week with the victories of Summer Lee and Jamie McLeod-Skinner, we can overcome the force of big money by reaching voters directly. We have a shot to elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems in these pivotal primaries. On Tuesday, Jessica Cisneros goes up against one of the worst — Henry Cuellar — and we can defeat him if we continue to rise up as a unified front and outmatch corporate power. Help us make calls any day of the week for Our Revolution partners like Alexi Giannoulias for Illinois Secretary of State, and congressional candidates Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Amy Vilela (NV-1), and DC Council candidates Erin Palmer and Zack Parker. [ ]SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW YORK TOWN HALL Get ready for Our Revolution’s New York Town Hall this Monday, May 23rd, from 7 to 8 pm ET! We have amazing progressive candidates taking on the corporate opposition, and they need OUR help to win their primary races. We'll be joined by Jumaane Williams and Ana Maria Archila, candidates for Governor and Lt. Governor, as well as two of our most inspiring congressional candidates, Melanie D’Arrigo and Brittany Ramos DeBarros, and others! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This week, we’re ramping up calls to elect Amy Vilela to Congress. She is a progressive champion and a powerful leader in the fight for Medicare for All. [ ]We’ll be calling thousands of voters in Nevada CD-1 which includes Las Vegas - SIGN-UP HERE to make calls for Amy! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Help us defend democracy by electing progressive Secretary of State candidate Alexi Giannoulias in Illinois! [ ]MAKE A DIFFERENCE - SIGN UP TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to elect progressive Democrat and Our Revolution member David Segal to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Rhode Island’s First Congressional District, which includes much of the city of Providence. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to re-elect progressive Democrats and Our Revolution endorsed Rep. Andy Levin to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th congressional district, which includes Detroit area communities such as Bloomfield and Pontiac. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to elect progressive Democrat and Our Revolution member and endorsed candidate Brittany Ramos DeBarros to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in this Staten Island-based Congressional District. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] You can help ramp up direct voter outreach for all of our progressive candidates taking on the establishment in these pivotal primaries happening now! [ ]JOIN THE PHONEBANK FORCE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month, you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, get a sticker 6-pack, and at $15, get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf&Schofield From the Trail 05/21/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, It is now candidate forum season. Candidate forums, debates, or endorsement sessions are occurring on a weekly basis. This past week, two major media outlets, the Chicago Tribune and the Daily Herald held endorsement sessions. You can watch the online Daily Herald forum by clicking on the picture below. [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=T9YzwumsqncChRaccwfjWue6_AX2FEwH9TdQiNTCUTrvcsS3azCoYokyJnErXGkdkMttkgVg-Wa5Tq63mSf0ghVlWNHJBchdOi1DlvIdsBOPQXwpnKARr-ZGjCZDW3hAjo_EBGnrEzjZbMryA_0Jv8Ihxzz9V5jb6GQJgIPW6y0&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=2) When all the Republican candidates are together on the same stage it becomes clear that the qualifications and policy ideas of the Schimpf-Schofield team are unmatched. We are the leaders who can truly give Illinois "A New Start" and fix our broken state.
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is Jan Turner. Jan originally reached out to the campaign for a sign, but she has now knocked on every door in her 10 block neighborhood asking voters to support us. Volunteers like Jan are why we can win this election without a billionaire donor. Thank you, Jan, for your friendship and support!

****[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=3)
* * *
**Media Spotlight** In addition to the endorsement sessions, we are still conducting radio interviews. This past week, I was on with WJPF's Tom Miller for an interesting discussion about what it takes to win statewide in Illinois and how to tell if your taxes are too high. You can listen to the interview by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=v4cHwepctZ_HmTnYxcHT9sr5FncMCOHOlMrAdxIH_rkqJeAf5Wu0ubLsUixFtxbeOq4AdCq0YU_Rbip3oUXWW09PokjZNH12BIZf5P8UNWbZyPtACivrSF26ljQYAdbw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=4).
The Chicago Tribune chose not to make their endorsement session available to the public--which is unfortunate. Voters should be able to listen to candidates themselves and not have to rely on a message filtered by the media. I'm going to send a summary of what was discussed at the Tribune session to our Century Club members. The picture below is of the Tribune session. At the time I was thinking, "When Republicans fight Republicans, JB Pritzker wins." Our campaign will correct bad information when necessary, but we are running a positive campaign based on our qualifications and ideas. This election is bigger than any candidate or campaign. The goal has to be the defeat of JB Pritzker and that only happens with a unified Illinois Republican Party.

* * *
**Issue Discussion: Energy Policy
** If you watch the Daily Herald endorsement video, you will see that I am the only candidate who was talking about energy policy. As a former Strategist for Energy & Environment with the Office of the Secretary of Defense in the Pentagon, I have represented the United States in international negotiations. I have a knowledge base that is unmatched by any of my competitors about energy and the environment.
Right now, Illinois has an energy policy that is based on environmental virtue signalling. Closing down our power plants will have practically no impact on climate change. As your Illinois Governor, I will demand an all-of-the-above energy policy that will make our energy more dependable and affordable.
Once again, thank you for reading this e-blast. Carolyn and I are working hard to earn your vote!
S/F, Paul
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=5).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_21_from_the_trail&n=8), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The “Chicago Election Machine” is alive and well
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, In Illinois in the 1960s, the infamous Daley “Chicago Machine” was known for taking names from tombstones, filling out voter registration cards with the dead person’s name and then having cronies vote in the name of the deceased as if they were still alive.

Today, those who want to rig elections use more sophisticated methods such as ballot harvesting, strategically locating ballot “drop boxes” in areas with high concentrations of Democrat voters, loosening absentee ballot requirements and even going so far in some cities as allowing non-citizens to vote!

I was the first candidate to watch and express outrage following the premier of the documentary [2000 Mules](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=23c22b92f6&e=58a207e9d5).
---
|
---
| [IT'S TIME TO MAKE OUR ELECTIONS SECURE!](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=58d46970db&e=58a207e9d5 "IT'S TIME TO MAKE OUR ELECTIONS SECURE!")
---
| Election integrity was an important issue in the 1960s and it’s an even more important issue today. Of all the candidates in the Republican Special Election Primary on May 24, I am the ONLY candidate who has aggressively investigated and sought out critical election systems information from county governments that administer elections. **_We must work together to remove the shroud of secrecy surrounding our local election systems!_**

I’ve put my legal background and skills to work in demanding transparency through an initial set of public data requests to county election officials to test their systems for vulnerabilities. These counties include Olmsted, Fillmore, Blue Earth, Rice and Nobles.

As your congressman, I’ll continue my relentless pursuit for election integrity. The future of our democratic republic, indeed, the future of our country, demands it.

Please help me in this effort. I need your vote in the Republican Special Primary Election on May 24. You can vote that day at your regular polling place, or vote early at your [local county elections office](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=8115a1fdc4&e=58a207e9d5).

With grateful thanks,
---
|
---
| Matt Benda
507-383-4679
[matt@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:matt@bendaforcongress.com)
---
|
---
| [DONATE TO SUPPORT MATT'S ELECTION INTEGRITY TEAM](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=d432e02139&e=58a207e9d5 "DONATE TO SUPPORT MATT'S ELECTION INTEGRITY TEAM")
---
| _**IMPORTANT ELECTION INFORMATION:** The First Congressional District Special Primary Election will be held on Tuesday, May 24. You can vote on Election Day at your regular polling location. You can also vote early at the office of your local elections official. Click [HERE](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=6fccbbf9bc&e=58a207e9d5) to find your local elections official._
---
|
---
| | | [PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=833b6a6fc9&e=58a207e9d5 "PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS")

**We didn't see this coming, team.**
After a new poll showed Chuck Grassley's approval rating at the lowest it's ever been, we went up on TV to introduce Admiral Mike Franken to Iowa voters, defeat Chuck Grassley, and expand our Democratic Senate majority this November.
**But for the first time ever, Mike is now being OUTSPENT on TV and we are at risk of losing if we can't respond.**
Everything is on the line. Whether or not Mike Franken wins will determine if we can pass Medicare for All, combat the climate crisis, take on the NRA, and codify Roe v. Wade.
**But we need to raise another $100,000 before our deadline to win, and right now we are falling dangerously short. The only way we’ll be able to send Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**

clean_body: We didn't see this coming, team. After a new poll showed Chuck Grassley's approval rating at the lowest it's ever been, we went up on TV to introduce Admiral Mike Franken to Iowa voters, defeat Chuck Grassley, and expand our Democratic Senate majority this November. But for the first time ever, Mike is now being OUTSPENT on TV and we are at risk of losing if we can't respond. Everything is on the line. Whether or not Mike Franken wins will determine if we can pass Medicare for All, combat the climate crisis, take on the NRA, and codify Roe v. Wade. But we need to raise another $100,000 before our deadline to win, and right now we are falling dangerously short. The only way we’ll be able to send Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

subject: Stop Big Oil from exploiting American consumers

body:
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45601339/346655999/-1392508059?refcode=em_pet_220521pg_n_pt_actives_5_g_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhYzVkOC02MmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GKMkEgpHKm2gh7i_gEWYcYNfOE7ulOFTJ9aqJPxBTk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45601340/346656000/-1392508059?refcode=em_pet_220521pg_n_pt_actives_5_g_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhYzVkOC02MmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GKMkEgpHKm2gh7i_gEWYcYNfOE7ulOFTJ9aqJPxBTk=) Americans are being exploited right now by Big Oil. **Some oil companies have taken advantage of this time of international unrest and deliberately hiked their prices, hitting millions of consumers' pocketbooks hard.**

Democrats like LBR are determined to fix this. On Thursday, she joined her colleagues to help pass the Consumer Fuel Price Gouging Prevention Act out of the House. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45601341/346656001/1009979413?refcode=em_pet_220521pg_n_pt_actives_5_g_n_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhYzVkOC02MmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GKMkEgpHKm2gh7i_gEWYcYNfOE7ulOFTJ9aqJPxBTk=) This legislation empowers the President to stop unfair price hikes during emergencies. And it expands the Federal Trade Commission's authority to investigate price gouging by corporate giants.

Now, we need to get this bill through the Senate and to President Biden's desk. It won't be easy, as Big Oil's Republican allies on Capitol Hill will fight hard against it. **Not a single House Republican supported the bill, and you can be sure that Senate Republicans oppose it even further.**

So we need to rally support for this bill, and that starts with grassroots supporters like you. **[If you believe that it's time to stop Big Oil's price gouging, add your name to our petition right now and help us reach our goal of 5,000 signatures →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45601342/346656002/1009979413?refcode=em_pet_220521pg_n_pt_actives_5_g_n_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhYzVkOC02MmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GKMkEgpHKm2gh7i_gEWYcYNfOE7ulOFTJ9aqJPxBTk=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45601343/346656003/1009979413?refcode=em_pet_220521pg_n_pt_actives_5_g_n_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhYzVkOC02MmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GKMkEgpHKm2gh7i_gEWYcYNfOE7ulOFTJ9aqJPxBTk=)**
---
Thank you,

Team LBR
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Friend,

I know I don't need to tell you that _my father will go down in history as one of the greatest American presidents. EVER_.

Despite the efforts of the corporate media to convince you otherwise, President Trump was the best thing that has ever happened to this Country.

_You 've always been one of my father's most dedicated supporters, and now he wants to offer you something extraordinary, Friend._

**For the FIRST time since 2020, President Trump is dedicating a beautiful wall to an exclusive group of supporters.** These American Patriots will have their names permanently engraved on our **Official 2022 Trump Donor Wall.**

This is your chance to have your name engraved FOREVER, Friend. Can I put your name right next to mine on the wall?

Despite the efforts of the corporate media to convince you otherwise, President Trump was the best thing that has ever happened to this Country. You 've always been one of my father's most dedicated supporters, and now he wants to offer you something extraordinary, Friend. For the FIRST time since 2020, President Trump is dedicating a beautiful wall to an exclusive group of supporters. These American Patriots will have their names permanently engraved on our Official 2022 Trump Donor Wall. This is your chance to have your name engraved FOREVER, Friend. Can I put your name right next to mine on the wall? We are looking forward to unveiling the Official 2022 Trump Donor Wall , and I know your name will be among the top supporters. You don't want to miss this opportunity to be on the right side of history with us, Friend. I'm sending my father the next list of supporters TONIGHT. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Let’s vote NO on Rep. Greene in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUNiSV3keRenCD39NWuec40mJjFSw0XLm4o_Fszokw10w&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2220521_no&n=1) Team, Since being elected to Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene has made a name for herself by constantly spewing conspiracy theories, hatred, and bigotry. She's even managed to become the darling of the radical-right. **But she hasn’t done a damn thing for our district.** She voted **NO** on the child tax credit. She voted **NO** on expanding access to baby formula. And she even voted **NO** on capping the price of insulin at $35 a month. The simple fact is that Marjorie Taylor Greene cares more about spreading conspiracy theories than she does helping the residents of our district - and I’m sick and tired of it. **That’s why I threw my hat in the ring to run against her - and I need your help to win.** [**With just THREE days until Georgia’s primary election - I need your help to get me over the finish line. Will you rush a contribution to my campaign TODAY to help us get over the finish line?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUNiSV3keRenCD39NWuec40mJjFSw0XLm4o_Fszokw10w&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2220521_no&n=2) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUNiSV3keRenCD39NWuec40mJjFSw0XLm4o_Fszokw10w&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2220521_no&n=3 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUNiSV3keRenCD39NWuec40mJjFSw0XLm4o_Fszokw10w&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2220521_no&n=3)

body:
| | | We need all the help we can get | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNE8QtEzko-5BGmnVrmN0NwCVBkTsFY2oTcwvgnxv3PVWvbwDpIHF2F7suaLabtawR_LCJbrz8SWlxd5m1mnWeTRRg2fUuVXJRoI4-DQP7tvvQnLPr9Qr2gdWgIh1yqL-FURBAEodhp7qICS9OvIuBLWnWOlYbXFVSkbbC54gGZn35T3zmk3vqcfWJYYyqaQjoqVBk8Z7XY3pUfGWASHKgS5lKcCG1LXAXf8hsN4PrBRTENZdN-a-g9zR01N4Jiz2evmiMjhhpqZQJyGmShTDdEl6MyxAN0rtqu4T1IAlMoQRX0hwXgu8Q2VPSHknlcSkgKwpPN9w1pcqZ9brL80epmBANGik38KWhfEbLh1WV9jEIzDnfiqunQxVVw__diVxGbOneAGBC7UKKCF-EUBqjt-MMCx_20VgBpx1eCATz0_G7bb8Hxd7Pi8f-TLHRTCI/3m8/rQVXzvIURHmX5Yt-WNKvYw/h0/761aN2STT-R2prOsCq_8jAgefsFqjGYKH3eSMAIgOlk)

---
| Team, Arizona is shaping up to be the biggest toss-up state in the U.S. this election cycle.

We have competitive, important races up and down the ballot. Control of Congress, of several statewide races, and more will be decided this November.

Polls and expert ratings all show Arizona is toss-up territory – which means we need all the support we can get. Our big team of grassroots supporters powered us to huge wins in 2020. We’re going to need everyone again to win this year.

**[Team, we checked our ActBlue records and did not see a donation from you in 2022. | | Peter,

CA-47 is one of the top pickup opportunities for Republicans in the entire country. The National Republican Congressional Committee has even identified it as one of the top races that need to flip for Republicans to take back control of the House of Representatives.

name: Johnson Smith, Beto for Texas
subject: I want to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Will you help our campaign go up against massive GOP spending and elect Beto?
#
Hey, I'm Johnson.
I'm reaching out today because I recently joined Team Beto as a Deputy Finance Director, and I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself.
I'm so proud to be a member of this team, and couldn't be more excited to work alongside folks like you to elect a leader who will represent ALL Texans.
[If you're ready to join me in fighting to elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott, will you pitch in $3 or more right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220521-2?refcode=ema20220521-190359&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=190359_444211_kQkW00&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)
My job on this campaign is to make sure we have the funds to compete with and defeat Abbott. **But that's easier said than done.** Here are a few reasons why:
– Abbott had a _huge_ headstart in this race. When Beto announced in November, Abbott already had $55 million in the bank!
– Abbott has accepted massive checks from energy executives and corporate interests.
– During each of the last campaign filing periods, Abbott outraised our people-powered movement.
It's clear that we have our work cut out for us. **But here's what makes me so certain we can take on Abbott's corporate mega-donors: We have way more grassroots supporters than Abbott!**
We are pulling together the kind of grassroots fundraising operation that’s powerful enough to beat a Republican incumbent and the special interests backing his campaign.
[Please, help our campaign go up against massive GOP spending and elect Beto by chipping in your first $3 donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220521-2?refcode=ema20220521-190359&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=190359_444211_kQkW00&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220521-2?refcode=ema20220521-190359&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=190359_444211_kQkW00&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)**
Let's show them what we're made of.
Thank you,
Johnson Smith
Deputy Finance Director, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220521-190359-footer&t=22&refcode2=190359_444211_kQkW00&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=190359%2E444211%2EkQkW00)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=20Strahan?=
subject: ** Final Weekend of Action **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
🚨 We have less than 72 hours until the polls open! REVIEW ASAP >>>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ab364a8cd74a/final-weekend-of-action?e=daf3f68050)
Hi Peter,

I’m glad to reach you – we’re out on the campaign trail for our final weekend of action.

You know what’s at stake on Tuesday. This is our ONE SHOT to restore our voice.

Like you, I’m sick and tired of failed “leadership” in Washington... from Joe Biden and the far-left Democrats -- and from our self-serving do-nothing “representative” and national embarrassment Marjorie Taylor Green!

I’ve had the opportunity to meet thousands of Republicans across our district.

We’re FAR from alone.

Folks here in northwest Georgia are FED UP and I know we can come out on top!

It would be my honor to be your Republican nominee for this seat, to serve as your representative in Congress, and to fight for our families and communities. With less than 72 hours until the polls open, I’m counting on you now more than ever.

If you didn’t vote early or via absentee ballot, make sure to cast your ballot on Tuesday.

The polls will be open from 7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. You can find your polling location here. (https://mvp.sos.ga.gov/s/)

subject: I’m proud to be ULTRA MAGA

body:
| | | Peter,
Joe Biden called me “ultra MAGA” as if that’s an insult...

**... but I’m PROUD to be an ultra MAGA patriot.**

Under President Trump, our country thrived.
Our economy soared, _our border was being secured_ , and **America was strong.**

**It’s time to finish what President Trump started and RESCUE AMERICA from Joe Biden’s gross incompetence.**

**[If you’re proud to be “ULTRA MAGA” too, join me and sign onto our RESCUE AMERICA plan today!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e1968787649246df9bf0a7e57e0a6441&_e=Q7rzxyw4-Anag3zBJok0VCFud0jZv3c87UoZ_XK3dy2i4AUPvtSyCaWftq0uwOYNPRrX14c4ja_GfK3Dv_I21L-nXpI9GkFRE9uUfthutE1PHotL9aS5spf0SC8UzPedVdl7H9YM1s4j8TqQ7uxzlpCWUaEfcojbe3fG75p3VL59iR8fOANkGG0xxhcmUjJW0yFC_dv1ToZqPyvOxifVhmJBiGLJyC9a80LJQzbZKSaZ9esxu5HlKHZyP92AjyWbz1YxvKwnww1QxIGDU2HCvF232tVxf6QRDl2V2o2erzVGXYAd29tiw7S0oHWPBL9ycplAeKEPZUxHkxNJkgj1d8ZxgL6eJDDziqSeluqaWPBzGFCro7xSdWn4akQ-oAh4Q8WASIwwY-oTnbvMwVebCgSEUvkdd-OCactrxb_Y6ke9YaD-iqzyOH4VfsvVHVEu)**

**Our plan to Rescue America is bold and unapologetically conservative** \- _and that terrifies Washington’s elite._

But I know you’re not scared of doing what’s right for AMERICA.

Peter, I hate to alarm you – but we are about to face an even bigger crisis at the border. Joe Biden’s decision to end Title 42 on Monday (the public health directive President Trump invoked at the border) will unleash a massive wave of illegal immigration. Just look what has happened already: – 42 suspected terrorists were arrested trying to cross the border.– More than 1.7 million migrants were encountered attempting to illegally cross the border into the United States during the first year of Biden’s presidency. That happened while Title 42 was in place. Just think what will happen after Monday, Peter. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=2601%2E878179%2EpZqmmP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=2601%2E878179%2EpZqmmP).**
